name: Mike Hennessy
subject: The heartbeat of American education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children Growth Fund
body:
Peter, we have a real opportunity to make a long-lasting impact on American children.| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this **[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_t=G7KFEwRqVBAkvTYif3NRJzRmCgXNy28fe2gUtIel2aRAlN-oBQpOdTziGrnPvMefR9exjKkcsI8CUWOHxPy6QNByazREdrTaahcD0rzmyAY%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_e=p2cdsjwiaCZjrgozRlEpzbaJskiSTZCWSj26ByQwlg45obdRyLk4E3yHXCS9-5uyGzcmXALp9s7IbRv-ydF9QSriS_0KdHIo2TWdaltRNbMRbrdN9idoBqBgUcB94JbMdvAAnzEOwgcZSlaT6VXl7LkR4Bcc7z_xSdmAwc9hEy3xxOJLWFqKB6sp6-fatsOsN2M7CJ_MVQ2JM5BScbPoNwQvdCpDYIeJK7pQniTMsfHRtWR_uHh9TZ6v4w2GlQTotdO-VD2rOLlGRvcD77swYGG4Q77DFu5FQg0g4p-eX_9bncZuirK7tl917B1eaApUBMyIdJgc03PHJEXupWMyMFhaUcG38BCCDsWL9EBBoNwfIqLgcJOJNE63IeB2EzjygGvyLwLZ2uacv1aDah0lzjeuS2U8VKUrQTJgFq9QHNLfRvCP2mxvjTlNehr_bPIhNRNe42QIRLQuGBuHLKj0vg%3D%3D)
---
**1.6 million.**
That's not just a number. It's the heartbeat of American education, Peter.
**_[It represents the countless young minds flourishing in the nurturing environment of Catholic schools nationwide](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_e=p2cdsjwiaCZjrgozRlEpzbaJskiSTZCWSj26ByQwlg45obdRyLk4E3yHXCS9-5uyGzcmXALp9s7IbRv-ydF9QSriS_0KdHIo2TWdaltRNbMRbrdN9idoBqBgUcB94JbMdvAAnzEOwgcZSlaT6VXl7LkR4Bcc7z_xSdmAwc9hEy3xxOJLWFqKB6sp6-fatsOsN2M7CJ_MVQ2JM5BScbPoNwQvdCpDYIeJK7pQniTMsfHRtWR_uHh9TZ6v4w2GlQTotdO-VD2rOLlGRvcD77swYGG4Q77DFu5FQg0g4p-eX_-jCFLhOr6to7MDMEUrMuFdT5_ljyc0MmGX9qibSbq7o0oIgAvuRpbCes6Ssb4_Cgflt4K2dT7A4CVUQnliOD1LBKo_Op1IjEbKbrVXfH6T33ICaDdAQoXt18vszkWsNG8btZACM0HweQZhKndo-fJS5W4ifI-4htKujzCTRF6cnA%3D%3D)._**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_e=p2cdsjwiaCZjrgozRlEpzbaJskiSTZCWSj26ByQwlg45obdRyLk4E3yHXCS9-5uyGzcmXALp9s7IbRv-ydF9QSriS_0KdHIo2TWdaltRNbMRbrdN9idoBqBgUcB94JbMdvAAnzEOwgcZSlaT6VXl7LkR4Bcc7z_xSdmAwc9hEy3xxOJLWFqKB6sp6-fatsOsN2M7CJ_MVQ2JM5BScbPoNwQvdCpDYIeJK7pQniTMsfHRtWR_uHh9TZ6v4w2GlQTotdO-VD2rOLlGRvcD77swYGG4Q77DFu5FQg0g4p-eX__LyAKx7fzPwlezJlrhHOZeQ6YX83OEpQzBf97txC7fWCQzqJCOaByAQGnpjx5-LAqxyZeSbc0VwCSLyF_yl8HvfHq25Vphg1_SA7E9PjGCnFO5_jlzN_iGjq_wmJM9pPd-eFdOOTW5ZvwwUmgMD_V5_7yaMWoA13GsL5wpi847MQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, looming legislative barriers **threaten** to snuff out this beacon of educational opportunity.
The potential closure of Catholic schools isn't merely the loss of a tradition; it's a blow to the vibrant tapestry of educational diversity, particularly in underserved communities. **[>> PROTECT CATHOLIC SCHOOLS: ADD YOUR NAME <<](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_e=p2cdsjwiaCZjrgozRlEpzbaJskiSTZCWSj26ByQwlg45obdRyLk4E3yHXCS9-5uyGzcmXALp9s7IbRv-ydF9QSriS_0KdHIo2TWdaltRNbMRbrdN9idoBqBgUcB94JbMdvAAnzEOwgcZSlaT6VXl7LkR4Bcc7z_xSdmAwc9hEy3xxOJLWFqKB6sp6-fatsOsN2M7CJ_MVQ2JM5BScbPoNwQvdCpDYIeJK7pQniTMsfHRtWR_uHh9TZ6v4w2GlQTotdO-VD2rOLlGRvcD77swYGG4Q77DFu5FQg0g4p-eX_8T3KHnB-PJnGhrGh5-5bkBzlYN_WYa4w7uy05-FQrCS6HdIncbTP4p3pQlKQ4hAsK_zinRm5vDeOLIYD1tI0fZlRNq7nKeloTvtlB5cJ2SldZ70jkELXm5r4l4EliXB0mwikcNBDlG7SgPhznut4eswrqzdnSA_XX3xBXIlMcUlw%3D%3D)** **The significance of Catholic schools stretches far beyond their walls.**

Contrary to misconceptions, these institutions aren't exclusive enclaves for the privileged. Instead, they often emerge as lifelines for families seeking reliable alternatives to struggling public schools.

We advocate for school choice because we believe in leveling the playing field, ensuring every family has access to quality education, _including the option of Catholic schools._ **[> > SIGN TO STAND WITH PARENTS & PROTECT CATHOLIC EDUCATION <<](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_e=p2cdsjwiaCZjrgozRlEpzbaJskiSTZCWSj26ByQwlg45obdRyLk4E3yHXCS9-5uyGzcmXALp9s7IbRv-ydF9QSriS_0KdHIo2TWdaltRNbMRbrdN9idoBqBgUcB94JbMdvAAnzEOwgcZSlaT6VXl7LkR4Bcc7z_xSdmAwc9hEy3xxOJLWFqKB6sp6-fatsOsN2M7CJ_MVQ2JM5BScbPoNwQvdCpDYIeJK7pQniTMsfHRtWR_uHh9TZ6v4w2GlQTotdO-VD2rOLlGRvcD77swYGG4Q77DFu5FQg0g4p-eX_9ybwMY9oNGILvsqCy3pXtZukX1lMALjSsmYG4h0hq8TYzF9L0jbIkjE1XgjQJgmNXJUwzuaU7Kh2HOqP_il8Ci8ZrOKqWhWbiQX-5D9GnhpRZfyAklkgSMBIMbyTjoZiEASnGGEvcR66l2rPi3f86ry_KldDCg4VRfhKtuTPi3-A%3D%3D)** At the **American Federation for Children Growth Fund** , we champion educational diversity, recognizing that every child's needs are unique.
Our goal? _To empower families like yours to choose the educational path that best suits their children, whether it's a Catholic school or another model._
**[Join us in urging lawmakers to tear down barriers and expand access to Catholic education for all families.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_e=p2cdsjwiaCZjrgozRlEpzbaJskiSTZCWSj26ByQwlg45obdRyLk4E3yHXCS9-5uyGzcmXALp9s7IbRv-ydF9QSriS_0KdHIo2TWdaltRNbMRbrdN9idoBqBgUcB94JbMdvAAnzEOwgcZSlaT6VXl7LkR4Bcc7z_xSdmAwc9hEy3xxOJLWFqKB6sp6-fatsOsN2M7CJ_MVQ2JM5BScbPoNwQvdCpDYIeJK7pQniTMsfHRtWR_uHh9TZ6v4w2GlQTotdO-VD2rOLlGRvcD77swYGG4Q77DFu5FQg0g4p-eX_-RC56WhncWuEw1-94spyms0bqTgejGjO6oQXebUWKenpwJ2n2BzlCfLmpaYrvDh-wkmptKwtGepos1yT9ce6x6SeWlz8XgZh735IL3D5aXZJKlVwwN9b-PvSRC8JTjdDjWoapB1nmZcmBxY7XHQfx2A98L4UItqSmV19CURAzsKQ%3D%3D)**
---
[SIGN THE PETITION NOW](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a45b4be6272a468f9dea5684a44fe364&_e=p2cdsjwiaCZjrgozRlEpzbaJskiSTZCWSj26ByQwlg45obdRyLk4E3yHXCS9-5uyGzcmXALp9s7IbRv-ydF9QSriS_0KdHIo2TWdaltRNbMRbrdN9idoBqBgUcB94JbMdvAAnzEOwgcZSlaT6VXl7LkR4Bcc7z_xSdmAwc9hEy3xxOJLWFqKB6sp6-fatsOsN2M7CJ_MVQ2JM5BScbPoNwQvdCpDYIeJK7pQniTMsfHRtWR_uHh9TZ6v4w2GlQTotdO-VD2rOLlGRvcD77swYGG4Q77DFu5FQg0g4p-eX__OdHAcwwezKYDjjKmEjF6_BmM-6iKINGS3xoqpNxWQefFZfFm4qNYJsuazCjrsTC_n1m1WFtjMf5wGExJGqq997vsoyRIKqh1apOmavhO7qMxIKBl4W-qI4nNlbVwfxEzpaqN23MvqBh3f6f4kgC_7UhprcSDoOv8CZmXYgmNClw%3D%3D)
---
Thank you,
Mike Hennessy
American Federation for Children Growth Fund

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I strongly endorse Kari Lake for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
She is tougher than a boiled owl

|
---
Friend,

The current situation in our country is nothing to write home about. Taking back the US Senate in 2024 will be as difficult as putting socks on a rooster, but together, we can turn the tide.

**I just endorsed Kari Lake for Senate in Arizona, and here's why:**

**_"As a mother, Kari understands the challenges facing Arizona families, and she will fight to secure our border, cut costs for hardworking Americans, and revive the American Dream. Kari's dedication to putting America first and fierce determination to stand against Chuck Schumer's radical agenda makes her our best choice to represent Arizona in the Senate. I urge all Arizonans to support Kari Lake and our shared vision for a stronger, more prosperous future for our nation."_**
[ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=7649de52c40c408b85386f8805f13e78&_e=9Rf5GWc8imZOKVa7hlZflzNdi0tYGG1y-kvTYQ-VPlEPL37_0r4vOuvfzbx0zW3djttOsyu4wj0Bi9T8BlJ-Su92PdXtAtVuPGbLA6RiPL3CRvWYPImMeEKFDzi3N41BHprmhiCgXuSltRf_w0aje-gsW7e90erKvF3v2KqL_Pok9J0AacHqzDMQH2lqyzACAS0GABGIpYCYDC3R3lyVPSjTv9TPu0BoTRjHaVMq3wejg5OQU0g13u15ExIrW7Fdybgbw13CsLcMVkkBw6HIZKM96Tp2sCFPZJS8a_D7Fm0haLO9ZiD7SCpZYr3V_WTaemoDku4jL9ssR9yeLgoTbGc_bn0_qeCw7s-Mc_g-Jsvn2pORFurIXNgNaAqnomFfWhKhQdAxdRcJ15h6wACywg%3D%3D)
Kari is tougher than a boiled owl and is the only person in the race who will fight tooth and nail for the American people.

Flipping Arizona gives us a real shot at stopping the loony policies coming out of the US Senate under the Socialist leadership of Chuck Schumer.

**[Will you join me in endorsing Kari Lake for Senate?

I urge all Arizonans to support Kari Lake and our shared vision for a stronger, more prosperous future for our nation." To solve our greatest challenges, we need to ensure that everyone is at the table. As we say in firefighting, _“All Lands, All Hands, All together, we can solve any challenge.”_

That's exactly what I've done as Washington's Commissioner of Public Lands, delivering epic wins for our state. It's what I vow to do in Congress as I fight every day to restore and protect abortion rights, lower the costs of basic necessities and uplift our middle class, expand clean energy development and reduce carbon emissions to fight climate change, and so much more.

We need leaders in Congress who know how to effectively deliver in the most divisive of times, not another politician to grandstand on the values that we hold dear while failing to deliver. I'll continue to create groundbreaking solutions in Congress, taking the policies we’ve pioneered in Washington State with me, but I need your help to get there.

After a crooked judge imposed an UNCONSTITUTIONAL gag order that took away his 1st Amendment rights, President Trump said this before he went back into that ICE COLD courtroom:
_**" Frankly, our Constitution is much more important than jail...It's not even close. I'll do that sacrifice any day."**_ **\- President Donald J. Trump**

name: Jill Stein
subject: Echoes of Abu Ghraib: Israeli secret prison exposed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_prison&n=1)
---
Peter,

Horror upon horror. Even as the Rafah gate is choked off by Israeli tanks and the noose is tightened around Gaza, a sickening new report from CNN came out today exposing a secret desert prison where Israeli Occupation Forces are torturing Palestinian detainees.
****
---
---
Here’s what we know: Three Israeli whistleblowers have come forward with details and photographic evidence of psychological and physical torture, including ritualistic humiliation and dehumanization, of Palestinian citizens unlawfully incarcerated in Israel’s Negev Desert.

Whistleblowers described prisoners’ limbs being amputated due to injuries caused by constant handcuffing, and medical procedures performed by underqualified medics – branding the prison with the nickname “a paradise for interns.”

**The images shared by the whistleblowers are too disturbing to share here. It’s a shocking throwback to innocent Iraqis detained in Abu Ghraib prison and tortured at the hands of U.S. forces and contractors – torture that was exposed to the world exactly 20 years and 12 days ago.**
---
---
##### _Click_[** _here_**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=YVGbyYAq5PNcdoVkFsU1avqT0sd_WWstTIzjOuBbNQs&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_prison&n=2) _to read._
---
We don’t know the total number of Palestinians who have been herded into detention camps like Sde Teiman. We do know the number is in the thousands – if not tens of thousands – and that they were taken from both Gaza and the West Bank.

We don’t know how many more of these secret prisons exist, and we can be certain we have not heard the worst of the abuses yet.

**It bears repeating that Biden could end ALL of this right now with a single phone call. Instead, our government continues to funnel weapons and cash to Israel indiscriminately.

** Our government’s continued, unconditional diplomatic cover for these horrors makes our country complicit in Israel’s war crimes.

**_Stop the weapons. Stop the aid. Embargo this monster. The world must act NOW.

_** In solidarity,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_prison&n=3 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_prison&n=3)
---
* * *

body:
| Peter,

Did you see Ami’s email? There are serious attacks on reproductive freedom happening across the nation and we need to mobilize now to ensure that November doesn’t deliver a victory for the anti-choice extremists.

**We need to add 1,700 names to our petition before our deadline tomorrow at midnight.[Will you join Ami and take a stand against the GOP’s anti-abortion agenda today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84732147/472443087/89929670?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240510_PT_1.2_1MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkMTFhOS0yYjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTmLnhmrdexYQniylWEqu1vAmh6-wp3Dv3Kvm_omf8s=&emci=a474e4a2-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c82d11a9-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)**
**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84732148/472443088/89929670?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240510_PT_1.2_1MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkMTFhOS0yYjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTmLnhmrdexYQniylWEqu1vAmh6-wp3Dv3Kvm_omf8s=&emci=a474e4a2-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c82d11a9-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)**
* * *
**_Begin Ami’s Original Message:_**

Peter, just last week in Florida, a six-week abortion went into effect and Democratic Arizona state legislators had to fight tooth and nail to repeal a draconian 1864 abortion ban.

Ever since the Supreme Court delivered the devastating _Dobbs_ decision, extreme Republicans have been scrambling to undo years of legislation protecting reproductive freedom.

Look, it’s time that we kick politicians and judges out of Americans’ exam rooms.

[**Will you sign my petition by tonight to stand up for reproductive rights before Saturday night? I need your help to fight against the GOP and their nationwide abortion ban agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84732149/472443089/89929670?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240510_PT_1.2_1MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkMTFhOS0yYjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTmLnhmrdexYQniylWEqu1vAmh6-wp3Dv3Kvm_omf8s=&emci=a474e4a2-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c82d11a9-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84732150/472443090/89929670?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240510_PT_1.2_1MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkMTFhOS0yYjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTmLnhmrdexYQniylWEqu1vAmh6-wp3Dv3Kvm_omf8s=&emci=a474e4a2-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c82d11a9-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)**
**Let me break it down for you—abortion bans do nothing but jeopardize the health and safety of Americans.**

If we allow these extremists to win in November, they will roll out their anti-abortion agenda on the national level, and we need to take a stand against it now.

As a doctor, I know the ramifications of abortion extremist actions are huge. That’s why I’m proud to have voted for the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify access to reproductive health care and introduced the Affordability is Access Act to ensure insurance companies fully cover over-the-counter birth control without any out-of-pocket costs.

Extremist Republicans are pushing abortion bans in states across the nation and I’m not going to stand for it.

[**I need 3,000 activists to help me in this fight against reproductive attacks. Will you sign my petition today and support reproductive freedom?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84732151/472443091/89929670?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240510_PT_1.2_1MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkMTFhOS0yYjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTmLnhmrdexYQniylWEqu1vAmh6-wp3Dv3Kvm_omf8s=&emci=a474e4a2-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c82d11a9-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)
**[I Stand for Reproductive Rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84732152/472443092/89929670?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240510_PT_1.2_1MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkMTFhOS0yYjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTmLnhmrdexYQniylWEqu1vAmh6-wp3Dv3Kvm_omf8s=&emci=a474e4a2-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c82d11a9-2b0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)**
Be well,

Dr. Ami Bera

Menendez’s potential Independent run puts the Senate Majority at risk. If he chooses to run, he’ll only need to win a few percentage points in a 3-way race to tip the scales and help the GOP pick up a seat in New Jersey.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84732296/472450938/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240510_2_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNTVmNTkyLTJlMGYtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ATj71LbvtTtVKPzh78ijw1sqCiPfyAaSQV7bHD0MY8=)
Friend,
If Bob Menendez runs as an Independent, we’ll need the strongest, most battle-tested candidate possible to ensure he does not tip this seat into Republican hands.
Menendez’s potential Independent run puts the Senate Majority at risk. If he chooses to run, he’ll only need to win a few percentage points in a 3-way race to tip the scales and help the GOP pick up a seat in New Jersey.
**Recently, a new poll showed if Senator Menendez runs as an Independent in the November election, he could get 9 percent of the vote, making this a close race. **
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84732297/472450939/1723258714?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240510_2_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNTVmNTkyLTJlMGYtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ATj71LbvtTtVKPzh78ijw1sqCiPfyAaSQV7bHD0MY8=)
**I know I can be the strongest candidate and help keep this seat, and the Senate, in Democratic control. **
While it is not clear who the GOP nominee will be, it is clear that New Jersey cannot be the state that gives the Republican Party control of the Senate again.
Donald Trump is the standard bearer for the Republican Party, and our working families can’t afford to have someone representing us while pursuing a MAGA agenda of banning abortion nationwide, taking away healthcare from our families, and destroying our democracy.
We need the strongest Democrat possible to help mobilize voters this November. I’ve proven I can beat Republicans in New Jersey, and I will help Democrats hold the Senate and win races down the ballot for the general election.
[_**Today, I’m asking you to help us build a strong statewide campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Upset the Setup. We have to stand together and win this race to ensure that we can hold the Democratic Senate majority.**_ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84732298/472450940/1723258714?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240510_2_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNTVmNTkyLTJlMGYtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ATj71LbvtTtVKPzh78ijw1sqCiPfyAaSQV7bHD0MY8=)

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: MAGA Republicans pass multiple bills to roll back environmental progress -- this is bad
body:
__I can 't overstate how important this is - we need your support. |
---

|
**I hope you 're following this, Peter,** [because we're calling on all LCV members for help right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMXNqa-)

MAGA House Republicans have just jammed through a slew of anti-environmental bills. **Each of these have already passed the House:**
* H.R.764, led by Rep. Lauren Boebert, **arbitrarily removes Endangered Species Act protections** for the gray wolf (_passed 209 - 205_).
* H.R.6285 **overturns historic protections for the Arctic,** opening up pristine Alaskan wilderness to oil and gas drilling (_passed 214 - 199_).
* H.R.3397 **blocks historic protections for public lands** that would conserve wildlife habitat, restore places impacted by wildfire and drought, safeguard Indigenous subsistence culture, and expand outdoor recreation (_passed 212 - 202_).
* H.R.3195 **forces lease sales to mining companies** in Minnesota's Superior National Forest near the Boundary Waters (_passed 212 - 203_).

**This is bad -- _really bad_ -- but keep reading.** In a matter of weeks, members of Congress will head home for the Memorial Day break. That means we have a narrow window of opportunity to raise our voices against them and encourage champions in the Senate to stand strong against these bills even getting a vote.

The environmental movement needs to show up in a big way -- and for that, we need you. [I can't overstate how important this is -- and how much we need you to renew your LCV membership right away to power our hard-hitting campaigns. Even $5 will have an impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMXNqa-)

Every day, LCV's teams are on Capitol Hill talking to members of Congress and their staff. We are flooding offices with calls and filling inboxes with messages from environmentalists like you. We're ramping up the pressure in a major way to make sure anti-environment forces in Congress can't enact their dangerous agenda into law.

But the truth is, a fight like this is expensive -- and with all the attacks on the environment happening in Congress right now, our resources are running low. The thing we need most of all is your support.

**To keep our work going strong, we need to raise $45,000 before the end of the month. If everyone reading this right now were to pitch in just $5, we 'd blow through that goal in minutes.**_Here 's where things stand:_

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis

**Deadline:** 11:59 pm, May 31, 2024
**Fundraising Goal:** $45,000

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMXNqa-) |
---|---|---

[Renew your membership for just $5 right now, Peter. Our grassroots movement has the power to stop Big Polluter-backed Republicans from rolling back environmental progress -- but only if everyone steps up.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMXNqa-)

Thank you for your support of our work.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11002727&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTk4MDIxODI0MwS2&spReportId=MTk4MDIxODI0MwS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11002727&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTk4MDIxODI0MwS2&spReportId=MTk4MDIxODI0MwS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfk~) |

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley’s greatest achievement in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This DEFINITELY isn’t something he’d tell you about himself.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley’s greatest achievement during his time in the U.S. Senate isn’t what you’d expect — and it’s definitely not something he’d tell you about himself.
**Please let us explain.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49714?refcode=em20240510-5484&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5484%2E614464%2EWiyiyp)**
Since Josh Hawley was elected to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2018, he’s been a champion of the out-of-touch culture wars too many politicians use to distract us — all so he could do things like block wage increases for working Missourians, strip away our freedoms, and refuse to vote for any investment into our state without much blowback.
Then came January 6th, 2021. That’s the day Hawley showed all of us who he really is — just a coward who will raise his fist when he thinks it’ll get more power for himself, then cut and run the moment things get real.
**After that day, Hawley’s support base started to crumble.** His former mentor, three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley in 2018 was _“the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”_ One of Hawley’s longtime mega-donors even called him “undemocratic” and a “political opportunist” who “should be censured by his Senate colleagues.”
Since then, a flood of public approval polling proved that Hawley is the most unpopular U.S. Senator up for re-election in 2024 — with ratings even worse than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida!
So here’s Hawley’s greatest achievement: **Solely based on his own actions and record, he’s made himself the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election.**
**We have a real chance to defeat Hawley and elect a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this year.[So if you’re ready to help us get it done, will you please rush a donation of any amount toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs, so we mean it when we say anything makes a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49714?refcode=em20240510-5484&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5484%2E614464%2EWiyiyp)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49715?refcode=em20240510-5484&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=5484%2E614464%2EWiyiyp) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49715?refcode=em20240510-5484&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=5484%2E614464%2EWiyiyp) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49714?refcode=em20240510-5484&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5484%2E614464%2EWiyiyp)
---
Hawley knows he’s vulnerable. That’s why he’s spent the last year desperately trying to rewrite his record by creating confusion about his positions on abortion, workers’ rights, Citizens United, and so much more.
But Missourians know the truth. Hawley is just a fraud and a coward who will do and say whatever it takes to get more power for himself.
**That’s why polls are already showing Hawley in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce.** Missourians are ready to take back their power from corrupt politicians like Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country.
**[So Peter, will you rush a donation of any amount to help us replace Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? With this race already in a dead heat, investing early in this Senate race could be your chance to make a real difference in this year’s election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49714?refcode=em20240510-5484&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=5484%2E614464%2EWiyiyp)**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What we are doing to win a decisive victory in Michigan this November.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Nothing matters more this fall than ensuring a victory for democracy, reasonable sanity, and the middle class of Michigan and this country. That effort runs through this U.S. Senate race, and through Michigan.

Here's what I am doing to make it happen:

**Laying the foundation for the largest organizing effort Michigan has ever seen,** one that will turn out our voters and lay the foundation for cycles to come.

**Traveling around the state meeting with voters** and building support for our campaign in "blue" areas and also so-called "red areas" — the kind of work that will lift Democrats’ chances even in areas they don't historically do well.

**Grassroots fundraising** so we have the resources to run the kind of paid media campaign that can reach undecided voters, persuade them, and move them to the polls.

**We're building the kind of campaign that will not only deliver victory for our campaign, but for President Biden, and — critically — one that will hopefully transform the swing state of Michigan into a consistent winner for open-minded people everywhere.**

This is a defining time — one where future generations will look back and thank us for meeting the moment, or wonder what we were doing when it mattered most.

[_I need the support of people everywhere who want to see Democrats win in Michigan, hold the Senate and the White House, and move this country forward. So, will you please make a contribution of $10, $25 or more to the Voter Protection Project and my campaign help us win a decisive victory this November?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67510?t=6&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67511?t=7&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67512?t=8&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67513?t=9&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67514?t=10&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67515?t=11&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K)
Thank you for your continued support. It’s always said because it’s always true: I could not do this without you.

Elissa
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14346%2E878179%2EIrO28K).**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c5b2a9c886f0435ab874f6f1ae2030c7&_t=8D0YPTCMbMbQxNIe9w8ftmw8nBwu8PqhLklS1NXz2UQlV6GH70rMQYDpTr28j9HtyxeGCjb50fUhEEc8FqnRJrStCIPC_lVCOILSvREFQBQ%3D)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c5b2a9c886f0435ab874f6f1ae2030c7&_e=5SNwbJ9W9vOC_QDs3f-DmYZ87JjPb1w5RjqO4yKJf8T0bIXFfXgyD2Nrn-dlrYj3nIHyIqL4-HkG51m1u49T5CCzXiOLqaMw7mfpDWOzh2PC4pgSMxTyw0tEr4s04Q2zLl2TCihUA_mFI_h9_wTWewAyqv40QBJE7PHL5jB7psIwl7spzkeOjKfjyIHrxy11BL5LIOEsAVo3YL545x4Llz7NmAayxfNij_cNst8VNQ6tHHWdVDK-19edIT9DhD5SG3DkvKnVgtgcRJmn_WHu60IYvKIZHYPIOchLg5jpn0Hid3dCvSgt9nSnGo2M42N4sRRcsoZNMewilCOgiSnnAhs75-AdshmcV5FwA_uDZr5wDMfNy-9VsXP9oLlea9I_Y1kydgOmJG7ikH3yoTNDvGOq0wWSSlIv5-rEjHWoU1k%3D)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c5b2a9c886f0435ab874f6f1ae2030c7&_e=5SNwbJ9W9vOC_QDs3f-DmYZ87JjPb1w5RjqO4yKJf8T0bIXFfXgyD2Nrn-dlrYj3nIHyIqL4-HkG51m1u49T5CCzXiOLqaMw7mfpDWOzh2PC4pgSMxTyw0tEr4s04Q2zLl2TCihUA_mFI_h9_wTWewAyqv40QBJE7PHL5jB7psIwl7spzkeOjKfjyIHrxy11BL5LIOEsAVo3YL545x4Llz7NmAayxfNij_cNst8VNQ6tHHWdVDK-19edIT9DhD5S_PDt-J23YdgtlmyfQJHqlyGcNrBfqnfF3bRQWZ43Kfrl7qT21qED0hIddan91v5Bs6FIcm29smaED_JWxkamJaHYSAbFySvb1caPNuQfAZyZZKC834gITnbcOWYj11b6BkDeJjcxhivxveuywKCxTlCEOHNMTWewz5VIpFpmf20%3D)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c5b2a9c886f0435ab874f6f1ae2030c7&_t=8D0YPTCMbMbQxNIe9w8ftmw8nBwu8PqhLklS1NXz2UQlV6GH70rMQYDpTr28j9HtyxeGCjb50fUhEEc8FqnRJmBDZp8UKPRNshmNfK39nrKybo7HCj9LzdBH57A6D95RZ6ImmbWk4Qtobs5YSUWMaE12ocLCp4n21ggp8FCpp60%3D)

body:
We need to put an end to backroom deals, don’t you agree?
Friend,Are you fed up with the corruption festering in Salem? [**It's time to take a stand and demand accountability from our elected officials.**](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-r/) Portland progressives, **led by far-left Tina Kotek and her allies,** have infiltrated our state government, pushing their radical agenda and ignoring the will of the people. They've turned our statehouse into a den of corruption, where backroom deals and special interests reign supreme. [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-y/) Friend - we can't sit idly by while our state is overrun by politicians who care more about their own power than serving the interests of everyday Oregonians.**[That's why I'm asking you to add your name to our petition to demand accountability from Salem. Let's send a powerful message that we won't tolerate corruption any longer.](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-j/)** **It's time to clean house and restore integrity to our state government.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-t/) [**Every signature counts, so please take a moment to sign our petition today.**](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-i/) After you add your name, forward this to your friends and neighbors to ensure that our voices are heard.Fighting beside you, Christine Drazan [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-d/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-u/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlklyul-dihkkhuuli-o/) Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan. name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Help me stop radical "Gender-Neutral" sports policies
body:
Peter- The stakes have never been higher for the future of women's sports in New York. Our state is on the brink of implementing a gender-neutral policy in school sports, which poses a grave threat to the integrity and fairness of women's competitions.

Help me fight back against these radical policies. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies]

Radical agendas are fueling this drastic move; my opponent, Laura Gillen, remains silent under the thumb of her party bosses, refusing to oppose policies that could destroy the very essence of female athletic competition all for political gain.

I am deeply committed to opposing these reckless policies and staunchly support the "Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act." This Act is critical—it safeguards the competitive and physical safety standards necessary for fair sports environments for our female athletes.

In contrast, Laura Gillen's silence reveals her priorities, choosing party loyalty over the welfare of her constituents.

This Act is not just about sports; it's about fighting to preserve spaces designed to empower women. As these radical proposals gain traction, we must unite and act swiftly. We need your voice, your passion, and your determination to help us combat these policies.

I urge you to join our efforts by volunteering [https://despositoforcongress.com/vol/?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] or donating [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] today.

Will you chip-in? Your support is vital as we work to protect our female athletes and ensure that women's sports remain competitive, fair, and safe. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies]

CHIP IN $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] CHIP IN $250 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=250&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Help+Me+Stop+Radical+Gender+Neutral+Sports+Policies]

Please do not let the interests of our young athletes be sidelined by those who put political agendas before the rights of women.

Stand with us as we champion the true spirit of athletic competition and fairness.

Firmly for fairness and integrity,

Anthony

name: Stephanie Mohr
subject: Pardoned by Trump
body:
I’m asking you to sign this Emergency Pardon Petition

| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump, I’m asking you to sign this **[**Emergency Pardon Petition**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqv2sgjnhmoopenjpf1ntpps2f8mois1irj9sb4g_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h60pr6c9h2bs)** because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. On December 3, 2019, the Kansas City Police Department observed a red pick-up truck chasing another vehicle through the city streets. Officers unsuccessfully attempted to catch the truck – and involved the department’s helicopter to track it. The chopper tracked the car to the backyard of a home – and Detective Eric DeValkenaere and his partner were the first to arrive at the scene. Eric approached the passenger side of the pick-up and his partner approached the driver’s side, both shouting commands at the driver to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. Eric saw the suspect reach toward his waistband and grab a handgun, pointing it directly at his partner. Fearing the suspect would shoot, Eric discharged his firearm four times into the windshield of the pick-up as it continued driving into the garage.When officers entered the garage, they found the suspect deceased with his arm hanging out of the window and his .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground. (A weapon they would later learn was stolen.)No doubt Eric saved his partner’s life that afternoon – and probably his own.**But instead of receiving an award for his heroic actions, Eric DeValkenaere was charged with Involuntary Manslaughter and Armed Criminal Action by a District Attorney desperately trying to hold onto her elected seat on the bench.** Worse, the Missouri Supreme Court just declined to take Eric’s case – exhausting his options through the justice system._Even though the Missouri Attorney General agreed Eric is innocent, woke anti-cop prosecutors and the defund the police mob somehow still won!_**A pardon from Missouri Governor Mike Parson is one of Eric’s last remaining options for freedom.****[Now you know why I’m asking you to follow this link to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhvegjpqns2b5iq50ancvcscuvn9f7gvmhpi4d8g_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h60pr6c9h2bs)** My name is Stephanie Mohr and I’m proud to be on the Board of Directors for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund – a non-profit organization that supports and defends wrongly accused officers like Eric. Over the last few years, LELDF has helped many men and women in blue clear their names and win back their freedom.I am also one of those officers LELDF has helped. You see, I used to be a police officer with the Prince George’s County Police Department in Maryland. Then one night I was called to a burglary scene. I did everything by the book – including releasing my canine to apprehend the suspect. We arrested the suspect, an illegal immigrant who was convicted and deported. So, imagine my shock when five years later the U.S. Department of Justice announced it was indicting me for violating the suspect’s civil rights by allowing my canine to bite and hold his leg so we could arrest him. And after two trials – in which the government flew in two illegal alien criminals to testify against me – I was convicted. I spent ten years in prison. But I was one of the lucky ones – not only did I have LELDF helping me fund and mount my defense – but they also helped me secure a pardon from President Trump restoring my good name.That’s why I can’t turn my back on a decorated police officer with a wife and three children at home waiting for him. **And I hope you won’t either.** **[**Will you sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Missouri Governor Mike Parson right away?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfb95hf84jmvkdkan4s2nva96k3o2aggdob2j0u0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h60pr6c9h2bs)** Eric should have been commended for his service and life-saving actions that day, not convicted and sentenced to years in prison! The reality is we can’t get back the last several months Eric has been sitting in prison or the nearly four years this nightmare has been hanging over his head.But with your help today, we can bring Eric home to his wife and three children. **[So please, won’t you take just 30 seconds of your time right now to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Governor Mike Parson?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0rb3ruqc1rttku86rn6rb7225tj2h3eh7oatea0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h60pr6c9h2bs)** After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support.Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric’s freedom and restore his good name, I’m begging you to [**sign the Emergency Pardon Petition today**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrbc0samgrpg0d0fiq50bva7jhlqnfpep4mnufk0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h60pr6c9h2bs)Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Gratefully,
---
---
Stephanie MohrDirector, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere – a decorated Kansas City Police Detective – will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won’t have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. And the only way to get him out is to get Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon him. **[Will you please take 30 seconds right now to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition and help me fight for Eric’s freedom?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcaj5n51anc5m6a9uvnsd54pgfqnovueo2fl745o_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h60pr6c9h2bs)** I hope you’ll also make a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF. No matter what, please pray for Eric and his heartbroken family.
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ojfh56sdl29grk9s490npmh52jbbb4osogbtfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h60pr6c9h2bs)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: I’m asking you to sign this Emergency Pardon Petition | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump, I’m asking you to sign this because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. On December 3, 2019, the Kansas City Police Department observed a red pick-up truck chasing another vehicle through the city streets. Officers unsuccessfully attempted to catch the truck – and involved the department’s helicopter to track it. The chopper tracked the car to the backyard of a home – and Detective Eric DeValkenaere and his partner were the first to arrive at the scene. Eric approached the passenger side of the pick-up and his partner approached the driver’s side, both shouting commands at the driver to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. Eric saw the suspect reach toward his waistband and grab a handgun, pointing it directly at his partner. Fearing the suspect would shoot, Eric discharged his firearm four times into the windshield of the pick-up as it continued driving into the garage.When officers entered the garage, they found the suspect deceased with his arm hanging out of the window and his .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground. (A weapon they would later learn was stolen.)No doubt Eric saved his partner’s life that afternoon – and probably his own.But instead of receiving an award for his heroic actions, Eric DeValkenaere was charged with Involuntary Manslaughter and Armed Criminal Action by a District Attorney desperately trying to hold onto her elected seat on the bench. Worse, the Missouri Supreme Court just declined to take Eric’s case – exhausting his options through the justice system.Even though the Missouri Attorney General agreed Eric is innocent, woke anti-cop prosecutors and the defund the police mob somehow still won!A pardon from Missouri Governor Mike Parson is one of Eric’s last remaining options for freedom. My name is Stephanie Mohr and I’m proud to be on the Board of Directors for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund – a non-profit organization that supports and defends wrongly accused officers like Eric. Over the last few years, LELDF has helped many men and women in blue clear their names and win back their freedom.I am also one of those officers LELDF has helped. You see, I used to be a police officer with the Prince George’s County Police Department in Maryland. Then one night I was called to a burglary scene. I did everything by the book – including releasing my canine to apprehend the suspect. We arrested the suspect, an illegal immigrant who was convicted and deported. So, imagine my shock when five years later the U.S. Department of Justice announced it was indicting me for violating the suspect’s civil rights by allowing my canine to bite and hold his leg so we could arrest him. And after two trials – in which the government flew in two illegal alien criminals to testify against me – I was convicted. I spent ten years in prison. But I was one of the lucky ones – not only did I have LELDF helping me fund and mount my defense – but they also helped me secure a pardon from President Trump restoring my good name.That’s why I can’t turn my back on a decorated police officer with a wife and three children at home waiting for him. And I hope you won’t either. Eric should have been commended for his service and life-saving actions that day, not convicted and sentenced to years in prison! The reality is we can’t get back the last several months Eric has been sitting in prison or the nearly four years this nightmare has been hanging over his head.But with your help today, we can bring Eric home to his wife and three children. After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support.Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric’s freedom and restore his good name, I’m begging you to you in advance for your support. | | Gratefully, Stephanie MohrDirector, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere – a decorated Kansas City Police Detective – will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won’t have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. And the only way to get him out is to get Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon him. I hope you’ll also make a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF. No matter what, please pray for Eric and his heartbroken family. | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Most of our elected officials actually hate us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Mayra JFC
body:
It’s the biggest problem our movement faces right now

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv7qqpovd3oiqcruicfk47esarf9g7rk97anshqo_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h62pj1cjh2bs)
* * *
---
Friend,

It's true- most of our elected officials actually hate us.

Democrats for sure- but don't kid yourself, there's just as many Republicans too.

It's one of the biggest problems our movement faces right now.

They pretend to be Pro Trump. They pretend to be America First.

And before the knife's in your back- they're sending your money to Ukraine, or they're sending your child to die in one of their forever wars.

I tell you this with confidence because I've seen it. I've experienced it.

I stood on the debate stage as a candidate for President of the United States & called out the establishment for what they are- wolf in sheep's clothing, likely manufactured by Raytheon & definitely paid for with your hard earned dollar.

So when I meet a true America First patriot, I make it a priority to do everything I can to help them defeat the D.C uniparty & drain the swamp.

__**Today, that patriot is Mayra Flores.**__

Mayra's running in the biggest race in America- the one seat our movement can & should win.

All signs point to this race coming down to a handful of votes & a handful of dollars, making this the one race where you can make a world of difference.

[**CLICK HERE TO HELP**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znpckjaok108du7veogj0t6fkjg8kevkgf2bb5gg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h62pj1cjh2bs)
---

So I'm asking you today to give what you can, and if you can't give today- that's perfectly ok.

The America you know & love is right around the corner and with Mayra Flores leading our movement in Texas, I'm confident we're going to be ok.

[CLICK HERE TO HELP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk5jqmhrucd6sth2ilshh2us7dhtb0aqplel9me0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h62pj1cjh2bs)

Thank you for all you do!
-Vivek Ramaswamy
|

Alpharetta, GA 30009

Thank you for all you do! -Vivek Ramaswamy | | | Paid for by Team Mayra JFC PO BOX 516 Alpharetta, GA 30009 Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuosm49gikp60n57lfm112ihlc4r6121baslft2g_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6aoj6cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk4c0044eqjf8bj0kjlqkje2sc8qupqk9apn1j00_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6aoj6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrp7u3ejrfier34refna1auorv0s73np0bdmbjv0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6aoj6cph2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Easier said than done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here’s my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq6d13h3qnht9k81ov08de2klb2mta4id7hvnhng_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.
_**[GOAL #2:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsmg766binq9l6umjghvktcsgk095n0qet1ng1po_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "GOAL #2:")**_ Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
_**[GOAL #3:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoml6jcdljlttn8125fe1ca13gp4pd0t4lchedog_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO.

_**[So here's my final pitch to you. I'm partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we've NEVER SEEN BEFORE.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5d7lmdaoapsrqmt1681tgvoq41pvgqcorvn6ff8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "So here’s my final pitch to you. I’m partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we’ve NEVER SEEN BEFORE. ")**_

The Radical Left Democrats have an army of Liberal megadonors on their side... But if EVERY America First Conservative pitches in JUST a few bucks - we'll surge ahead and shock the world.

PLEASE:

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbingc8mti5vo9krnsc8tnvt6mjsmm5fhd9hhb98_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "Vivek Ramaswamy")
---

**Even a small amount can help build our movement!**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8q2hhoa2021ep1iofkdh6oo0porkt5k985cfbto_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help.

If the Radical Left Democrats keep outraising us and manage to win this election, we could face the very real possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.

_**[I hope you'd agree America - as we know it - wouldn't survive something like that. Please join me now while there's still time to prevent that dark reality.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0gikd3jdj2m05e3fiuu0285gjosgtj4vhi9m5o8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "I hope you’d agree America – as we know it – wouldn’t survive something like that. Please join me now while there’s still time to prevent that dark reality.")**_

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsqrju34c3r46i0aqsfblnb4aurk7oh9o04gp4ng_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaj7ea9iv8utk711t9ui6kq18jre9jk4uk2gfuho_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0jfs7u1s9uoq4gq1lhvg5jju456nqaivmeemdjo_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdfqq68kgkd3hh4k6ph3908d4jssssihu7evjiug_rp22sh2s8i6ep35c5h6eo34c9h2bs "START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")
---

Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

body:

[CONSERVATIVE JIM BANKS WINS SENATE NOMINATION IN INDIANA](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkbtu5SAYhJ8Gd1hcfOEULo5kWdoiq0gptkQYsPNnzUWAE-XtV5z4PMB2iBEz8w1_XuSLggP8_ls5O0HOMmXpU9byY8WQfcE2FxzDAUUywjpMekyppI2ZekbFJho70ZH2HRWc0OZ9IrTnG-uFua101aQX3Wg3cuPCECo6bRuYqg_pKSVjd2NjO_CVjMyOPdsGJShBHTmjUcW24DMYm3UI8dEAdG5D2ptjei8lZsTviC2ILdnqM9n2C3yyptXBIbZUBsSWqPCq_N-MYwKn0jf-BF1C-q4P-XIWJ501cDrEZ-sUHIgN9TKHM2mL-ByY-5nj9X5JWrmoYPeIzxcIkV7JR8oVcmXgTypf7_LjIcmfQg-LohGff7294ecST-vgi_UF8Xk7vUkKMvgdsSFVvlTPfC7ptIgNypUYMhQItUjXpMnELzgOyMOIOrJXlrpEU_7jU_8FAAD__-GKraA)**

We just got some GREAT NEWS out of Indiana, Friend.

| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X4tuC0VA0mPgnCikWgdutQ~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OsMrvuyFSOtUIJRo_1HFkQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIcnKP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJFTkVGSVRTX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQwNTExVwNzcGNCCmYzITE_ZtGOV01SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

body:

# SATURDAY, MAY 11, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1997, IBM's computer _Deep Blue_ defeated Russian chess legend Garry Kasparov. It was the first time a current world champion lost a chess match to a computer in tournament conditions. ([See photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1yqzAQQOGnEd169IeMCxW3ofNtUzJrtIJNBGIkGY_fPpPUqU9xZr6P-3RHTrwv_3Ej32KecG580tSDUqDtZLvgI5Em05FXV9VbIwdlutWrq0OD6OIQaCBl9HyzzgzGGbJRm9Cx11Jb2Sslh95ZfUGJdItG3gixV9YJKylwy-XymXlvK8X0zieVy5y3Lvm1taMK80_oUegR-fGsvFOtP1nocUtCj7qHN2GpgEuGlgO-Yc0vCEQHPNKT4KzwhfXAkk-YV9wXCoAMMRc6qXTFh-PFKXF1V2HlsiGn3337E-M7AAD__9PsYYg)) Here at _The Flyover_ , we still love _The Office_. While our shenanigans don't rise to the level of Pam, Jim, and Michael, we also like to have fun and make each other laugh. The recent [announcement of a spin-off](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuxCAQRb_G7rBmePhRUKRxt2lTWgiGNQm7Y2GyaP8-yqZNc3WLUxydj8t2cSmn-_Xd3cjWyJvzNT1oMwJRSL3pPthIJEn1ZHFCoxXMqPrdIuI0eo8eSIH2CtSsCBdys_EhIPTJSpAaDCLMZtRycOBoiQoWcs6gHjsNFFLlMnxyutedYn7yg8rg-dZnu9d6nJ166-TaybW1Nuyc87Mxh0IHl_pHdnKtj9eIO7Xz9-0kOMbkSUTOmZv4PsRBzrP_EieVRKfgEqgIlMrMixon6OTaFxuOlnJO5zh1Gq43l_LLpf5b5icAAP__4jJk3Q) got us talking about other workplace comedies we enjoyed. Send us your favorite workplace comedy and help us decide the best by taking the poll below. Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1ugzAQAOCnsbcg_5zBDB4qRUyla0d0wWe41uCIuKn69lXVMdm_6XsfpxE587684UahpjLhXPlOkztpfTIwgYwhERmykoLutAOrvLZyDbGP7qIxtWC7HjF55U2c00zeeme6i-RglAHltFbetWAaVEh9sqonRKehFaAoci1H81F4ryul_FPudDRz2WQOa63Xm7AvwgzCDI9EmGHEhedX3j__jB1I2HO8fnPOfGs7AWrZkPO_bb_qJuwZlDzCcyPr04DfAAAA__9YtluK). This weekend's sponsor is our friends at [NativePath.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL9q9DAQxJ9m3dlotSv_KVR8YNzdVx2kNLK1Oiv4bGMrF_L2QSFlml2GGZgf83Ybby6ucXv8d0-xKeyjm1N8yWhKxFLzyIW3QUQLFWKxQcOkWqRisUi-IZHA0phOJsbQ1nOYTMfIflJzEa1WmpVBVK2pWVdOOekCqU6cM8g1sBIf035W73vc0iJh_dpfclbz_ixWu6R0XED_QA-ghzBVm8toh0tLToAeTp9PdSwH0HBFD9SjajXo-viYgPrc3hDoesasfmnK-xDieaUSjVLZ1EB9_gTU34fitP74jOsar7oBVo-ni-sPUvpzoO8AAAD__0V6X98) Check out their natural health products today's edition.
|
---
## U.N. Supports Palestine
The United Nations approved a measure 143-9 Friday to grant [new "rights and privileges" to Palestine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL_G7ogWWDAUFNeky7VXWsRex3vCYAFJlL8_5epXjqYZzZ_bfIucOD9-x4NC38ocl84vmo2QUiiccVzDRqRIjxTkJA1qcFKPe1jvYK1VUXlnNVryzqwTLGiRvHZejhwUKAQjJThjUV0iRPKbBk8xGol2QKCVe6mXv4Vz32lLn_KielnKMaaw9362Qf8a1HVQ13hmerev-kLtvCQa1PWZRaVW0rNzyeKMiVrnzDE3cdBxp9p2PkXlx96beDYRW6Pjnj7CTcZYIOenTU2rtQDgARVs2iIg4VjDer45JW52GhAeR-T0v6z_-OlfAAAA___QI2f2) and called on the Security Council to reconsider Palestine's request to become the 194th member of the United Nations. The U.S., Israel, Argentina, Czech Republic, Micronesia, Nauru, Palau, Hungary, and Papua New Guinea [voted against the proposal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1ugzAURp_GbI78Hxg8dGFL147oGi7hVo6N8CVV3r5K586f9J2j83WbbkCZyv0THhh5rRPMTE-cvNRaGje5bokrokHbYdRX7Z1VvbbdFiEtKUFKuCY7aH8dQj_7oIJxdk12Vh1Fo4xTXmvV--DMBRTgsFo1IIDXLgincCGux-W7UuEN1_yqTzwuc310OW7MexP2Q5hRmJE33Cjn9ybMuNdM80uYkQrjUYCpFsjCjC744K2TvGFD2cu5noUPwibfDFzk2SQVWfe9Nip3eZYmMzA2ljtkbEyFoMgDW83n-1WYsTvisv9QztTCVTh1fwD9iXT8b7LfAAAA__9AFXAU)--25 countries abstained. Palestinian U.N. Ambassador Riyad Mansour spoke before the vote and called support for his country an "[investment in peace](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAUheGnwQ4HEFALijR2mzalc5HrehNQB9h19u0zmzrtOc03_9dtvgFF2u-fkNDV9ZhhqfTE2XApudKzboJbERV2DTrZS6M7Mciu2Zw1OHiLve2FDQq1XT0sAYax0175UTXklFBaGCnFYKxWLQjAce3EiABGasu0wED1yO33QXvdcI2v44m5XY7URLfVehbWfTA1MTVd19VmfFTM5f2_lyPHwNSUKISIHKFUpqbHzu-4Y4bIoRRMPr54wco9LD_8hIil0k6wc0-BJ0wec9no5G8rF4ZLwdTUZBfOi2KkYnumxT0BxT9W_TfSbwAAAP__ysppJA)." Israeli Ambassador Gilad Erdan spoke after Mansour and said Palestine hated Jews and is not peace-loving. The resolution is now before the Security Council, where the U.S. [vetoed a proposal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQheGnwR0WA9ghBcVt3OW2W1oExvGsMFiAY-XtV95623OaT__XY344ipRe_92Gti15dr7RG-eBA3CpZ90FuyBKVB1auMGglTCgutWCMOjUzYzBS_BDEHeAUS0KlXka0KojK4XUYgAQZhi17J1weF-UuKNzA-iRaYGBWi79d6bUVlziJ7-x9D5vXbRra3tl6h-TE5PTeZ59waNhqdd_LbnEwOS0UQgRObramJyOxCv6o1D7cJ-P5Cnyd27I23qUGtyH7y5ibZTIJX4kvuH2xFJX2vnl5UJzMExOXbFhPylGquONafHaHMVfWvsz1E8AAAD___kvaok) to recognize Palestine last month.
## Solar Storm Makes Northern Lights Visible
The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration issued a rare G4 storm watch Friday after several days of solar activity sent explosions of plasma and magnetic fields toward Earth. [See storm images here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gb0THGRwzMHRhS9eOFsJnmwqbCK6O_PdVOnd-0tPT-3pMj5ByOtbPsJPjpUwhcjppMlIpiXrS3ewWIqS-I6fuyugeRtV3m-v1gtaOBONi7TBGwIhaKQATIVgFXXIIqMEoBaMZNN4CBLJLD5ZCMEoPQgPNiUu9fZd08EZLvspJ9RbL3mW3MT-b6D8EeoH-uJ6l8RsJ9G-xQA9GoFcg0L9KzbM86NUE-kYnVZIrlT2sB3GKspUcqmxc6t5kLD95ljOdoXFgkkxxO0ou6yXQd9XNz1fKObXhLjSse0j5r4j__fMbAAD__88NZiU). According to NOAA, G4s are [the second-strongest form](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhSAUQL8GNwxcQJ4DQxe317WjucpVaVBeBCX9--Z17naSM5zkfD3HJ4YYjvUTd3JlSSPOJdw0Gi4lBz3qxruFCEg15KSVRivxkKrZnJoWY60nUNZMUmDfW2mn2egOJu8FNMGBAC2MlOJhOg0tCqR-UaInRCN1x7QgH0o62-8UjrLREn_STWc7p72JbivllZn6YDAwGGqt7Tzlg2p-ewbDGxkMmW46ia-UdlwPKmHmuaRz5xXLvPGQ80WeX8eVL4w8p4gnp5uOwmBoTudfNcQYcmeZFuuOIf7ly78zfgMAAP__QPRifw) of geomagnetic storms and could disrupt the electric power grid, navigation, radio, communications, and satellite operations. Transmission lines, railroad tracks, and pipelines are also vulnerable to the storm. The geomagnetic storm could also enhance the aurora borealis, making the [Northern Lights visible](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL8Gd0RweIQUFLdxl9tuaR3BccwuD8vgRPv3q2y93UhTjDQf9-WOKaf6-I-F_FjbgmGkJy2GS8lBL3qKfiUCUhN5eZVGK-GkmjbvLIKLq6YbGgiWjHJKWxetAWNECFPyIEALI6Vwxmq4oEC6rUrcCNFIbZkWFNNox-WzpTo2WvN3e9JxCa1M2W9j7J2pfwxmBvPYaEs5vx2DeWuFKr06g7nvGIjBrK0xTgPvLePB-2hH4aGdOfKAZyf-IvqiGnlopZw1BRypVR5TP879jZ3Xhshgng4f91fKOXV7ZVo8Cqbf7jT-PPQTAAD___I3aLg) from northern California to southern Alabama.
## Liam and Olivia Are Top Baby Names
Liam and Olivia were again [the top baby names](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1jwADseGLp4S9eO1jM8x1QYLKCx8vdVM3e64YaT7uu-3DHEkB6feJBtW17QtfCkxXApOehFd95uRECqIytHabQSN6m63Y6kvJ_M6obNOdDTagx6M6qbdNoJb7pgQYAWRkpxM4OGHgXStCkxEaKRemBakA8tl_47h9R22uIrP6n0Lh9dtHtrZ2Xqg8HMYL6uq0-rS3TVP89g9tiQPwqee3CVwbzi-uIJD6ocBCh-5Nr4mc-fiIUfGIlv9EZxCaWRehy6Yv15hRhDHUamxePAEN_59u-M3wAAAP__Ga9gvg) in the U.S. for 2023, according to the Social Security Administration's annual list of most popular names for newborns released Friday. This is Liam's seventh time as [America's top name](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAQQH-NvREdcPhjYOiSLV07Wmc4kquwiQxNlH9fpXPHp7c8va_LciHJsl8_aWPfUlkoNHnw4pTWyuCCffSJ2bDt2etRO7QwadvfPOjJhAgc3EhgwK5jsgSzDQwJE7tevAGD4LSGyQ1oTgTEc7IwM5HTOHQIHKWV4_RdZG83TvlVHnycQtn67G-t3WtnPzpz7syZ7js_61u94WgSMnfmvNL6UjttXFUtQSiryuHnkPZSWWhTJctDSAWcR8tDHJyBRLjSjLxOcQQOqNch9IeP96fkLHUYO4TrRpL_Otq_V34DAAD__yudYuk) and it joins Noah, Oliver, James, Elijah, Mateo, Theodore, Henry, Lucas, and William as this year's most popular. Olivia has topped the girls' list for the fifth year, after unseating Emma. Other popular girl names are Emma, Charlotte, Amelia, Sophia, Mia, Isabella, Ava, Evelyn, and Luna. There were [3.58 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszz1uwyAUAODTwBbEr4GBoYu3dKmqjtbDebapwESG2srtK3XuBT7p-7pPd0g57es7FAx9qRPMPZ04mZsQN6knTR9hQZSoKAZhhdGKO6HoFnhUyipnZ-et8sMSvQXPtUZn3CDA0hQkl5obIbgzg5YMOKBfFPcIYIQeiOb4SL0e7LumvW-45Fc98WBzLTSHrfdnI-qNyJHI8bou1hqwtZ5EjhXmTuQYIb52KNiIHPefEvH4_Ijp6FtjWy-ZHuHxvFLOqQ2WaL4WSPlP7_9efwMAAP__ZtlVCw) babies born in the U.S. in 2023, down from the 3.66 million babies born in 2022.

It was the first time a current world champion lost a chess match to a computer in tournament conditions. () Here at The Flyover , we still love The Office. While our shenanigans don't rise to the level of Pam, Jim, and Michael, we also like to have fun and make each other laugh. The recent got us talking about other workplace comedies we enjoyed. Supports Palestine The United Nations approved a measure 143-9 Friday to grant and called on the Security Council to reconsider Palestine's request to become the 194th member of the United Nations. The U.S., Israel, Argentina, Czech Republic, Micronesia, Nauru, Palau, Hungary, and Papua New Guinea countries abstained. Palestinian U.N. Ambassador Riyad Mansour spoke before the vote and called support for his country an "." Israeli Ambassador Gilad Erdan spoke after Mansour and said Palestine hated Jews and is not peace-loving. The resolution is now before the Security Council, where the U.S. to recognize Palestine last month. Solar Storm Makes Northern Lights Visible The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration issued a rare G4 storm watch Friday after several days of solar activity sent explosions of plasma and magnetic fields toward Earth. . According to NOAA, G4s are of geomagnetic storms and could disrupt the electric power grid, navigation, radio, communications, and satellite operations. Transmission lines, railroad tracks, and pipelines are also vulnerable to the storm. The geomagnetic storm could also enhance the aurora borealis, making the from northern California to southern Alabama. Liam and Olivia Are Top Baby Names Liam and Olivia were again in the U.S. for 2023, according to the Social Security Administration's annual list of most popular names for newborns released Friday. This is Liam's seventh time as and it joins Noah, Oliver, James, Elijah, Mateo, Theodore, Henry, Lucas, and William as this year's most popular. Olivia has topped the girls' list for the fifth year, after unseating Emma. Other popular girl names are Emma, Charlotte, Amelia, Sophia, Mia, Isabella, Ava, Evelyn, and Luna. There were babies born in the U.S. in 2023, down from the 3.66 million babies born in 2022. Montana is the most important Senate race in the country and The Hill ranks my seat the most likely to flip. Meanwhile, my team tells me our fundraising took a massive nosedive while our opponents outspent us on the airwaves. If we don’t catch up on our fundraising soon, we’ll have to make some tough decisions about what to cut from our budget. That could cost us the election. But here’s the good news: A generous group of donors saw how tight the polls are and decided to match every single contribution to my campaign for the next 24 hours. [Please, split a critical donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now. Every dollar you give will go twice as far, so there’s no better time to give.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30889ea4-d5e7-4d3b-b4af-89829bb1fc47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
