But here’s the good news: A generous group of donors saw how tight the polls are and decided to match every single contribution to my campaign for the next 24 hours. | | | Outside groups have put a massive target on my back, and they’re coming after me with everything they’ve got. Mitch McConnell and his cronies are spending nearly $65 million to attack me—and they’re just getting started. Political experts rank this seat a toss-up, which means it’s anyone’s game to win. That’s why this donor match couldn’t have come at a better time. For the next 24 hours, your donation will be matched. This opportunity might not come again, so we need to take advantage of it. None of us want to wake up after Election Day with regrets: | | | | | | | | Thanks for stepping up, Jon | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94a681dd3bf943f5a8eb36b6cae464ba&_e=_eZ5aGSLmww-sBa577BvGPnBs7UTi9340mAwrlV4wgLwV850FGBZuydsfkf_ARTFwM0LeFWZayU9FTE2W_J8BOb91iWn3rUnS3fwYaDx1b5WpNB3OlXgoPi1Ze4_Utk4sjdEu3rn7dWLDxZHBh49pqo82j33baCGeRYs6qBFkagDAU5b-ySOCEmghoApW9B6_aHMOMsQv2Wvrilgrxo4EY2B3Q-lL8RCXuBtx2zNisyLkudc5P-LmwN_kl8TeBEGpcpHfMiF5MKOW-w1iA6s9bdCQOvkUpbzlnQgTFhNaHUZuBcpi-lN5YTfkXPYd3j2HNmVva4CAqjHcMkd29FfMxljUp3HIC9I4DtWSn962ehvYRcGMDPtVFLZMtvPr832knVJ-_9wQg0Grh8bMX_-tA%3D%3D)

| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94a681dd3bf943f5a8eb36b6cae464ba&_e=_eZ5aGSLmww-sBa577BvGPnBs7UTi9340mAwrlV4wgLwV850FGBZuydsfkf_ARTFwM0LeFWZayU9FTE2W_J8BOb91iWn3rUnS3fwYaDx1b5WpNB3OlXgoPi1Ze4_Utk4sjdEu3rn7dWLDxZHBh49pqo82j33baCGeRYs6qBFkagDAU5b-ySOCEmghoApW9B6_aHMOMsQv2Wvrilgrxo4EY2B3Q-lL8RCXuBtx2zNisyLkudc5P-LmwN_kl8TeBEGZytCQ7GI7Ej28WlWd7n8vcgoGTwLJc2dtsUqzWjI9Rr_ahXXTgLzkCZEcim1zRX7qdLcOmueP0K-2Xc94Oi8naTdKKxV8-14S33yBDsEsfHnJo3cjATXxlJy-UFwCJ40xa1EhWLyX7uo-yWNr1BESQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94a681dd3bf943f5a8eb36b6cae464ba&_e=_eZ5aGSLmww-sBa577BvGPnBs7UTi9340mAwrlV4wgLwV850FGBZuydsfkf_ARTFwM0LeFWZayU9FTE2W_J8BOb91iWn3rUnS3fwYaDx1b5WpNB3OlXgoPi1Ze4_Utk4sjdEu3rn7dWLDxZHBh49pqo82j33baCGeRYs6qBFkagDAU5b-ySOCEmghoApW9B6_aHMOMsQv2Wvrilgrxo4EY2B3Q-lL8RCXuBtx2zNisyLkudc5P-LmwN_kl8TeBEGDr67vs5H3Ww0bWpib3jZbPJw55g2iB1_xADEg1kAcUl2Ru3Tmadth_ryLGg_zUVEhaGKkgE5mJVDyG_CPwuvxF3et1KAlhbYcqXfKEWBmgdUkCv03SaWjK2Nlukt9ABfAaHsbd-4f_Iv7R6G38gXTw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

__**" YOU'RE A TRAITOR, TULSI!"**__

That's what the woke, liberal elite said to me when I left the Democrat party.

This is Tulsi Gabbard, former congresswoman, former Democrat, and military veteran.

In 2002, I ran for Congress to fight for _**YOU**_ against corrupt corporations, the Deep State, and endless wars.

But when I got to Washington, I saw the _ugly truth_ : _**the Dems wanted me to bow to the elites and praise the swamp!**_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=770d8ef651ee4e9daa77c73cd3114036&_e=mseueWjZztkGWbeHTl-lXEfQuGbfyhM220jhzQoCZ4ZTpHWs3BFUmI92E6UnalUgkeziDu4-REzhl8XrSmcwg_e82_oubLkZrgU-3svMXSeL4n3gPa-bdux-UrefCOXHMIfLzYkcSqmyMKAWS-XoQdakijOWF_e4LFpVIW1y68_UtVo9SzMQRM9Txih--wj6ta3J8sWWGhV0bTWqjUYZGz_jqLWXiRzZoEaKgjTkHQpqxtMPz0ZfRSY0JLpaVekwfwv2rJLGt8k_eu5xwTKFZWKRWjjMZ6PcqLnU9XFqc187cCM4KosI6ap7TRy5CNuYOgY3A18lBiPumd4fw1mzZeBurllRTVUujvpoWly0G7XlLWp7kK2F6aR-JE1Q_sdsiLVyzBh9uYq9R6yJYR0JFyZeLy4hyd8_Gk-5_IOw2AF2knxqBCTfPnYvECpMmKPDFPQUtcwSfkZ_Kxlohb8CJg2P3BSTDTDSfVhwZK-zbu0%3D)
**I _REFUSED_ and stood up for _YOU_ , because the only side I've ever been on is the American people's side. **

And what did I get? **_ATTACKS._ _SMEARS._ _OSTRACISM._**

But I won't back down! I'm taking the fight to the Washington elite, and******_I NEED YOU_ beside me!**

Join the battle to _**TAKE BACK**_ our country from the corrupt Democrat establishment!

_**Let's DRAIN the swamp, RESTORE integrity, and put AMERICA FIRST!**_

**[Please join me here in this crucial fight for our freedom!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=770d8ef651ee4e9daa77c73cd3114036&_e=mseueWjZztkGWbeHTl-lXEfQuGbfyhM220jhzQoCZ4ZTpHWs3BFUmI92E6UnalUgkeziDu4-REzhl8XrSmcwg_e82_oubLkZrgU-3svMXSeL4n3gPa-bdux-UrefCOXHMIfLzYkcSqmyMKAWS-XoQdakijOWF_e4LFpVIW1y68_UtVo9SzMQRM9Txih--wj6ta3J8sWWGhV0bTWqjUYZGz_jqLWXiRzZoEaKgjTkHQpqxtMPz0ZfRSY0JLpaVekwfwv2rJLGt8k_eu5xwTKFZWKRWjjMZ6PcqLnU9XFqc187cCM4KosI6ap7TRy5CNuYc00iASHd-OfbyeQiVULQN8Qqd50SS-9O3I7ydWI_5uVtEBhQppC21mdFvkT_R5oFNuZXbB8dUSbvwTSzZYCGLCESgUwQ3v7G6PA2cqbztTPs2VYktHJcMYUFzlAVsV-8XzRvP_-9oqvOWJNgjsrAtnx95rPWcCR19goPlyXp4hc%3D)**

name: AMAC Action
subject: This is our last chance…
body:
The radical democrats are LURING hordes of illegals into the country

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b47f883fc294dab920e6b352d2384d4&_e=vqtZGq0VYfbnH8neDm2YXvecCtj4ag-XX4oz4DW70B5F8TfL3usME618lRWK6swdicXkRpqot497TNUgaWU4I-SLgYR99BpIlgOvCHWQRcvvvXtReEVO_VZKcNxjg1KjmbX3EVnnm1A6jawTtEX1HBXZ03ZefhGYnZD2Nj7VSdsG7GO48Nq0eJw5tjhN1xLBd0CGz63ncOwkbGvTDhBVKiIUUKJD3ZMnU2uukYZeDJCqNB5dB5-jurYI6IfuKw7wFs8LV0nMTG0RCJUzPFGRgD-PiBbKB6AjrtKErTz7aDB-vqfplSkbIMZtmOyVMiMyterUb-mAqviZDSxDv99Jdw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, The radical democrats are LURING hordes of illegals into the country by offering **FREE** shelter, **FREE** healthcare, **FREE** food, and even **FREE** Pre-Paid Debit cards. And they're doing it for one reason...** _to win elections by giving illegals a pathway to vote_**. We are working with Congress to push emergency legislation to ensure that the Biden administration can't allow non-citizens to vote in the upcoming election.
---
__**[__**Can I count on you to help?**__](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b47f883fc294dab920e6b352d2384d4&_e=vqtZGq0VYfbnH8neDm2YXvecCtj4ag-XX4oz4DW70B5F8TfL3usME618lRWK6swdicXkRpqot497TNUgaWU4I-SLgYR99BpIlgOvCHWQRcvvvXtReEVO_VZKcNxjg1KjmbX3EVnnm1A6jawTtEX1HBXZ03ZefhGYnZD2Nj7VSdttwYCCIPFd9JyA6uMOZGpHmM0yGwSc6uHTu-DrNXVOq5KietqIHY36rNsIAg7iuAt50j1TKXlxa3lW3vaOcEEc-F_PbDz3vzkdux4mgOO-i_dQDg2mC5khDdjnVFDPwwvKZEvZ5AZrHq8iGcswGNd-jPieAaWp3SWq0PwhYn_uNQ%3D%3D)**__
---
| | [**Yes! I want to stop****illegals from voting**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b47f883fc294dab920e6b352d2384d4&_e=vqtZGq0VYfbnH8neDm2YXvecCtj4ag-XX4oz4DW70B5F8TfL3usME618lRWK6swdicXkRpqot497TNUgaWU4I-SLgYR99BpIlgOvCHWQRcvvvXtReEVO_VZKcNxjg1KjmbX3EVnnm1A6jawTtEX1HBXZ03ZefhGYnZD2Nj7VSduvHeq0XkyhVsRUPUvYFvRbzQnJ-tC4UdmWa0-P0iyGeoP_TwEGsXuQpUvV4TtZgqy5y6ARLEnSyrt0bRU-MbKg81Xg3rnM7P3VD9Sqf4KbR4nlW13miV5nAhv1L8lTV5atoa4TOZQQB43XacuOa41HHce1k1KHIHvbca9ep2UB8w%3D%3D)
---
The Biden Administration has allowed millions of illegal immigrants to enter the United States and are scheming to give them a pathway to vote in our elections. This country can't take another 4 years of Joe Biden's radicalism, and we can't let them steal this election by letting millions of illegals vote. This despicable Democrat scheme must be stopped! **[**If you agree illegals MUST NOT be allowed to vote in our elections, I need you to make a special contribution of $24 to stop illegals from voting.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b47f883fc294dab920e6b352d2384d4&_e=vqtZGq0VYfbnH8neDm2YXvecCtj4ag-XX4oz4DW70B5F8TfL3usME618lRWK6swdicXkRpqot497TNUgaWU4I-SLgYR99BpIlgOvCHWQRcvvvXtReEVO_VZKcNxjg1KjmbX3EVnnm1A6jawTtEX1HBXZ03ZefhGYnZD2Nj7VSdsg0OLqSvx7p_0GNFisNHW0AVOk1n-0EwwTj4DtEboFwpEzVOtzYfAzSVF3cqatJZCL3a2u7LK_r4316AUIp4l7wqOxB-Hc9boEALt8L2GDi_seQh9cp40iApaqwv9JvFtwgBYwkY51n_iCfGMGsKi6ikuyhNhsd1PxsdwvPrYoNw%3D%3D)** {\var:first_name Friend}, my name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before - we're the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you've ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we've been fighting AGAINST "Obamacare", AGAINST "Medicare for All," and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to "transform" America and our elections. That's why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. {\var:first_name Friend}, we only have 7 months to make sure illegals cannot vote in the 2024 election. That's why our critical work pushing emergency legislation designed to stop this scheme is so time-sensitive - and it's why I need your help today. You and I both know America can't afford to let the radical left cheat and steal another election. If we don't stop the scheme to allow illegals to vote now, we might have to suffer through a fourth term of Obama-Biden that could be even worse than the first three. That's why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that your vote determines this country's future, not illegal immigrants, is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. _**[That's why today, I'm asking you to make a contribution of $24 or more to AMAC Action.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b47f883fc294dab920e6b352d2384d4&_e=vqtZGq0VYfbnH8neDm2YXvecCtj4ag-XX4oz4DW70B5F8TfL3usME618lRWK6swdicXkRpqot497TNUgaWU4I-SLgYR99BpIlgOvCHWQRcvvvXtReEVO_VZKcNxjg1KjmbX3EVnnm1A6jawTtEX1HBXZ03ZefhGYnZD2Nj7VSdszdDcLqF9TvUfOUzu09UE2CVmJPmPrt8FI0mqXP_sfNLsu0Dnj_lBuuqoBx4WEaIY7r3FHzMwA9O3ca5KECt3s-DK1j8cV5QxzRcFRp-TRKDVbT96J5-NCwI1z_gJ7fNMKvgCHUn_s8V9OsEAGAPZEoKZCwZGOumY-XwbINJecRQ%3D%3D)**_ _**We the People**_ , should decide the **outcomes** of our elections - NOT illegal immigrants; _**We the People**_ , should decide the **rules** of our elections - NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; _**We the People**_ , govern ourselves and won't surrender our freedom to 3rd-world style Socialist banana-republic tyranny. And if _**We the People, you and I, {\var:first_name Friend},**_ don't step up right now - our children and grandchildren simply won't get to experience the same country you and I grew up in. But it takes time and money to organize a massive operation to get emergency legislation passed... ...and I need to know what resources we can put toward this crucial fight to keep our elections safe from the radical democrat scheme to allow illegals to vote. And {\var:first_name my friend}, remember that if the Democrats succeed, not only will they allow an army of illegals to vote in the upcoming election, but they'll pass legislation making them all permanent citizens, and conservatives will be powerless to stop them. This is our last chance. **[So please, for the sanctity of your vote, make your best possible contribution to AMAC Action today to defend your vote from the Democrat's scheme.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b47f883fc294dab920e6b352d2384d4&_e=vqtZGq0VYfbnH8neDm2YXvecCtj4ag-XX4oz4DW70B5F8TfL3usME618lRWK6swdicXkRpqot497TNUgaWU4I-SLgYR99BpIlgOvCHWQRcvvvXtReEVO_VZKcNxjg1KjmbX3EVnnm1A6jawTtEX1HBXZ03ZefhGYnZD2Nj7VSdvz8y2nt1ytJKbVpJG60YuYR6u4OV7yp_nS69XxgIdThdoWG10bilNNorQm5O8eJdxxhZbwWbbH0Xz1MTzV-FcdWsGkR50Bb_PYckTaYGID8lc8tsSpUQv5tViLadvjR9dzMLKDj1OirAuDSxUG_ezS5I8-Hrhr-ToDyrrowZkhPw%3D%3D)**

Bob Carlstrom, President AMAC Action

clean_body: The radical democrats are LURING hordes of illegals into the country | | | | Fellow American, The radical democrats are LURING hordes of illegals into the country by offering FREE shelter, FREE healthcare, FREE food, and even FREE Pre-Paid Debit cards. And they're doing it for one reason... to win elections by giving illegals a pathway to vote. We are working with Congress to push emergency legislation to ensure that the Biden administration can't allow non-citizens to vote in the upcoming election. | | The Biden Administration has allowed millions of illegal immigrants to enter the United States and are scheming to give them a pathway to vote in our elections. This country can't take another 4 years of Joe Biden's radicalism, and we can't let them steal this election by letting millions of illegals vote. This despicable Democrat scheme must be stopped! {\var:firstname Friend}, my name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before - we're the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you've ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we've been fighting AGAINST "Obamacare", AGAINST "Medicare for All," and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to "transform" America and our elections. That's why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. {\var:firstname Friend}, we only have 7 months to make sure illegals cannot vote in the 2024 election. That's why our critical work pushing emergency legislation designed to stop this scheme is so time-sensitive - and it's why I need your help today. You and I both know America can't afford to let the radical left cheat and steal another election. If we don't stop the scheme to allow illegals to vote now, we might have to suffer through a fourth term of Obama-Biden that could be even worse than the first three. That's why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that your vote determines this country's future, not illegal immigrants, is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. We the People , should decide the outcomes of our elections - NOT illegal immigrants; We the People , should decide the rules of our elections - NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; We the People , govern ourselves and won't surrender our freedom to 3rd-world style Socialist banana-republic tyranny. And if We the People, you and I, {\var:firstname Friend}, don't step up right now - our children and grandchildren simply won't get to experience the same country you and I grew up in. But it takes time and money to organize a massive operation to get emergency legislation passed... ...and I need to know what resources we can put toward this crucial fight to keep our elections safe from the radical democrat scheme to allow illegals to vote. And {\var:firstname my friend}, remember that if the Democrats succeed, not only will they allow an army of illegals to vote in the upcoming election, but they'll pass legislation making them all permanent citizens, and conservatives will be powerless to stop them. This is our last chance. | | For Freedom, Bob Carlstrom, President AMAC Action | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Is Mississippi’s Education System Good Enough? No. Here’s why...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572425?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Many university degrees produce a negative return on investment, according to a report out this week.** Data from the Foundation for Research on Equal Opportunity shows that the cost of many college degrees is not offset by increases in lifetime earnings.

This prompted me to take a look at some separate Mississippi-specific data from the State Workforce Investment Board on graduate earnings. I discovered an extraordinary variance in the future earning potential of different degrees.

**Here are the earning averages for fifteen different degree types for Mississippi public universities: **
---
|
---
_What graduates earn three years after graduating from Mississippi public universities by degree type. _
| So what? **Demand for engineers and insurance professionals is far greater than for actors and anthropologists. **Some degrees require more rigor than others.

But then I took a look at data on what happens to Mississippi high schoolers. **Approximately 6 in 10 of those that do complete public high school in Mississippi fail to either start any form of college education, or start but fail to complete any kind of college education.**

**Of those public high school graduates that do go into any kind of post-secondary education, about 1 in 3 drop out.** Patrick Sullivan wrote a powerful piece about this for the Magnolia Tribune recently.

**Pointing out awkward facts about education in Mississippi can be a sensitive subject.** Much has been said about the relative improvements in Mississippi’s reading and writing scores in recent years. To be fair, our state is no longer 49th out of 50, but 30-something-or-other.

**Great, but the data also shows that only 31 percent of 4 th graders were at or above proficiency in reading in 2022.** In other words, more than two in three Mississippi 4th graders were not proficient in reading.

The data also shows that a mere 32 percent of 4th graders were at or above math proficiency in 2022. **_Forgive me if I don’t rush to celebrate a system that fails to produce proficiency for two thirds of public school 4 th graders. _**

In the worst school districts, a student has the odds of achieving proficiency overwhelmingly stacked against them. **But even in __the best__ performing school districts – the ones they keep telling us are good – nearly 4 in 10 students are not proficient.**

**_These are the hard facts about public education in our state, and facts do not care about politicians’ feelings._** Neither should you if you want to improve the life chances of young people in our state.

Poor proficiency rates in primary education help explain why one in three public high school graduates are dropping out of college education later on.

**The underperformance of our education system helps explain the low rate of workforce participation in our state.** Unless we acknowledge the underperformance of our education system and address it, we will see our state held back.

**_If our private school system was producing these kind of outcomes, I suspect politicians would have acted yesterday._** Instead, the inconvenient facts are brushed under the carpet.

If we are to change Mississippi for the better, this has to change. **Policy makers must not keep going along to get along. **That is a recipe for yet more mediocrity.

**The time for taking false comfort in marginal improvements is over. **The implementation of phonics reading in primary schools might indeed have raised reading standards, but on its own, it is not the strategic change in education we need.

If we want an education system that prepares young people for the life they might live, we need action to ensure:

* **Higher standards in the classroom – which means more parent power. **

* **Ensure more of our ****high school graduates complete a useful education after high school.**

* **Allow students to take degrees with better returns on investment, both for the individual student and the state as a whole.**

Have a wonderful weekend!

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c246602f7f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

body:
It's the biggest problem our movement faces right now

| |

Friend,

It's true- most of our elected officials actually hate us.

Democrats for sure- but don't kid yourself, there's just as many Republicans too.

It's one of the biggest problems our movement faces right now.

They pretend to be Pro Trump. They pretend to be America First.

And before the knife's in your back- they're sending your money to Ukraine, or they're sending your child to die in one of their forever wars.

I tell you this with confidence because I've seen it. I've experienced it.

I stood on the debate stage as a candidate for President of the United States & called out the establishment for what they are- wolf in sheep's clothing, likely manufactured by Raytheon & definitely paid for with your hard earned dollar.

So when I meet a true America First patriot, I make it a priority to do everything I can to help them defeat the D.C uniparty & drain the swamp.

__**Today, that patriot is Mayra Flores.**__

Mayra's running in the biggest race in America- the one seat our movement can & should win.

All signs point to this race coming down to a handful of votes & a handful of dollars, making this the one race where you can make a world of difference.

[**CLICK HERE TO HELP**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=76c5c9b26d3b48e4852d8d9e98cbdb7f&_e=lC1PT5WYrxOyPoGrzH3NNPDWXSEiVhbzx441V_xOfhJGl_XZKDx0sWDuQ6jtz-tYgpehUfnZbrx8mW8_yWfA_AJ6MXmpN8-u6-4hUL--QQl1GIDODG1HLpOeJ3OP-Z0ZxHA7HrperNpiJsXy575Xfn7sr4KvtCVlFWbezs7TU2mMkIF997xGjng2ZRmi9Q0aGqZDK-GulGNzaQMn_IERyvWQyMQj6mH_Dlo61ObT6F--P8ESs21_5PnKW8G-QTo0gf7WRYhWBUuPWOFDUy__BwzPAU89oCfc9Z1-1B8-21eZLO5uYk0I77Jx7apFrTfQj6F0myf3CHzlJu2VWolJ3frJUnMUZpdlH8OJhsl76MUosaWtelttgIkeXkjO8q5-D1f2uW1iRQt_QqDfOawvXB2qYtOdmszLFPmIPYrN8FhRb_qnIS6VT879Rs_ELzH7oMO8UnRoWZnxBLeMe0a8PA%3D%3D)
---

So I'm asking you today to give what you can, and if you can't give today- that's perfectly ok.

The America you know & love is right around the corner and with Mayra Flores leading our movement in Texas, I'm confident we're going to be ok.

[CLICK HERE TO HELP](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=76c5c9b26d3b48e4852d8d9e98cbdb7f&_e=lC1PT5WYrxOyPoGrzH3NNPDWXSEiVhbzx441V_xOfhJGl_XZKDx0sWDuQ6jtz-tYrxOsNQyzV7HZ8vX5q_t3hEtNcgPrR_iNJsEX-UZoP3-NTRW6gmtolQE-F45N-dzzpGmPL1Zaj89p1WyZG3WP2tMuu93GRk9hu2hWhg2QmFvR6KwsYfEBHpwTIjQRCrK4oK_gL6xNzVfdBLd1tfhYewFsLoFBZArdm8Veh6qWvlmp3bF2FKFuaFay1P_7zJfZAzApJTFoFDvOM8HLXGH0I7fHydsF7gUmS96WrllNnYuN-4aWmBhohb1KJGtSUq5NO8GVkd3aM73S08FyBKlltndVxL9TVmJM79qa_vSFW0z-SiVXM49eQeCUh2LPafiB5fm0285UayrFMdQMAwCXC0KhGglHuvNoCJ1341RRhHzsbETub_q5V1x-nwmTZ_MpE5DXGsoBBRklrgsNVogbzg%3D%3D)

All signs point to this race coming down to a handful of votes & a handful of dollars, making this the one race where you can make a world of difference. So I'm asking you today to give what you can, and if you can't give today- that's perfectly ok. The America you know & love is right around the corner and with Mayra Flores leading our movement in Texas, I'm confident we're going to be ok. Thank you for all you do! -Vivek Ramaswamy | | Paid for by Team Mayra JFC PO BOX 516 Alpharetta, GA 30009 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: too excited to sleep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1007&amount=25&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ][IMG]

Apologies for the early email,
Peter, but I just couldn’t wait to
get the day started! ☀️

I’m reviewing our campaign plan for the final few days before Tuesday’s
Democratic Primary, and two major points stick out to me:

1) With the race this close, it’s clear that the winner will be whichever
candidate reaches the most Marylanders in the final days.

2) We can win this thing. We’ve got the experience, key endorsements from
MD elected officials, thousands of grassroots supporters, and a plan.

If we keep doing what we’re doing, and pull out all the stops to ramp up
our GOTV efforts, I like our chances,
Peter. But it’s going to take
every single one of us giving it our all.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1008&amount=25&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ]Can I count on you to have my back in the final few days before
Tuesday’s Democratic Primary? If so, it would mean the world to me and my
team if you could make a quick grassroots donation to start our Saturday
with some positive energy!

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ]Chip in $100
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ]Chip in $250
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24025?t=1014&amount=35&akid=1613%2E52803%2EutUJK7 ]Other Amount

It’s anyone’s race,
Peter, so let’s keep up our
momentum and bring home a win on Tuesday!

—Angela Alsobrooks

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [LIVE NOW] Pre-Trump Rally Coverage
body:
Peter, Bill is LIVE NOW from The Original Hot Spot Pizza on the bustling Boardwalk in Wildwood, right near Morey's Pier. It’s
|
---
| Peter, **_Bill is LIVE NOW_** from The Original Hot Spot Pizza on the bustling Boardwalk in Wildwood, right near Morey's Pier. **It’s Saturday, a perfect day for some pre-Trump rally coverage!**
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO TUNE IN NOW](https://xtz223.keap-link009.com/v2/click/3b3927b385143f57965c7cccf2ef5c01/eJyNkMFKw0AQht9lzrFxtxU0IFJraUNikWItnmSbjLg02Qyb2cZtybu7rdKTgpe5zPd_PzMHYDTKcFpCAp-8l3IIEVgsNGk0PGkMq-K0lVcjMRQRVNpsZ7ZxBMnh1_AZOKWkkBGwJwzI83I8ydLF7C1PF1kgSdnQ8U_P5ejsmT6O0xz6_k8x1pqnu-BuIWHr8HhRqcNVvLJV4D-YqU3iuOu6gW8cuw0OiqaOqVK-0i3fHcftU34_3-Pu1WxczdmFITvfPty8L6_9WrysC7FSoUoRoSl__pSh_y7svwCM9nHI)
---
| **Join Bill from 12PM-1PM today as he dives into the excitement and enthusiasm of today's event.** He's right at the heart of the action in Wildwood, bringing you real-time insights and interactions with patriots who are gathering here to show their support. **Expect some real, raw conversations with the folks who make up the backbone of New Jersey and our great nation.
** [**Click here to watch live!**](https://xtz223.keap-link009.com/v2/click/48d9c528e8614e47734905c05bea6c21/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzqlxo4U2UIq1oiGpFKmKJ1mTKV1MNsNm1nSVvHtXWzy10Mtc5vu_n5kTMGqpOSkghk8-RtEAAjCYK1KoeVxrlvllG90OxUAEUCq9n5raEsSnX8NX4JKKRD8AdoQeeVuMxmkyn26zZJ56kqTxHf_09IdXz-RllGTQdX-KsVI8OXh3AzEbi-eLCuWv4qUpPf_BTE0chm3b9lxt2e6wl9dVSKV0pWr48TweXrOn2REPG72zFac3msxs_3z_vrhza7Fa52IpfZUkQl38_ClF913YfQGLDHHG)
_(if the stream is experiencing delays, refresh your browser and stick around for a few minutes until you see it begin)_ We’re talking all things Trump, discussing what his leadership means for our community and the critical importance of standing strong behind our President as we move forward. This is grassroots coverage at its best, with patriots stopping by to share their passion and perspectives. Don't miss out on this unique broadcast. Whether you're nearby and can drop in or you're joining us online, [tune in now](https://xtz223.keap-link009.com/v2/click/e9a61cfdbea2aaced44c9ae0d5af5b0f/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzqlpooINFLFWNCSVIlXxJGsypYvJZtjMmq6Sd--qxZOFXuYy3__9zJyAUQnFcQ4RfPMxDLvggcZMkkTF40qxyC7bsN8LuoEHhVT7qa4MQXS6G74Bl1T4OPCALaFDPhajcRLPp9s0nieOJKFdx389vZtn8jaKU2jbP8VYSp4cnLuGiLXB80W5dFfxUheO_2KmOvL9pmk6tjJsdtjJqtKnQthC1jw8j-f39GV2xMNG7UzJyYMiPdu_Pn0uBnYdrNZZsBSuShChyn__lKC9FrY_kb5xzQ==) and be part of the excitement. Let's rally together and keep the spirit of America alive! Common Sense Action Team
---
| Did you see this previous message from Bill? In case you missed it, check it out now: I wanted to share a touching story that recently unfolded, showcasing the incredible kindness and generosity that epitomizes the spirit of New Jersey. Last week, we received a call from Penny, a 71-year-old woman facing a challenging situation with her broken HVAC system. As she tearfully explained her predicament during a discussion about affordability in our state, something remarkable happened. Ryan, a service manager at First Choice Plumbing and Heating, listened to Penny's story and immediately offered a solution: a free HVAC system and installation. This act of kindness not only provided Penny with much-needed relief but also sparked a new friendship that warmed all our hearts.
When my wife Jodi and I visited Penny's home to witness the installation, we were deeply moved by the generosity extended by Ryan and his team. Not only did they donate the system and labor, but they also paid Penny's HOA fees for the entire year—an extraordinary gesture of compassion and solidarity. This moment reminded me once again why New Jersey is such a special place. When it comes to rallying around those in need, New Jerseyans stand out as the epitome of kindness and generosity. This is precisely what the Common Sense Club holds near and dear to its heart—making New Jersey a better place for all New Jerseyans. It's about extending a helping hand, fostering connections, and embodying the values of compassion and community. I invite you to watch the video of our meeting with Penny for the first time, and I hope it inspires you as much as it has inspired me. With gratitude, Bill
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/19268636/e8024d593c9bbf57) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

Dear Neighbors,
With Mother's Day just around the corner, what better way to celebrate the special women in your life than by showing your support for a leader who champions the values we hold dear? This Mother’s Day, consider a gift that gives back to the community and supports a brighter future — gift a Heidi Campbell yard sign!
Place a Heidi yard sign in your yard or gift one to a loved one to show your commitment to strong, compassionate leadership. It’s not just a sign; it's a statement of support for progress and the betterment of our community.
Request your free yard sign today! Click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ANuxmAsWB0CHLK9S_7eA4Q2] [https://chatgpt.com/c/d2fbd14e-2ca4-4a13-acea-c09327cbd170#] [https://chatgpt.com/c/d2fbd14e-2ca4-4a13-acea-c09327cbd170#] to sign up and we’ll take care of the rest. Yard signs are a powerful way to spread the word about Heidi's mission and help ensure our voices are heard.
Let's continue to stand together for the values that unite us. Thank you for your ongoing support and for making this Mother’s Day meaningful.
Warm regards,
Kate Briefs
Campaign Manager, Heidi Campbell

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
"Worth watching"

|

Dear Peter,
Not often does a political campaign video garner the attention of world famous entrepreneur and businessman Elon Musk.
Musk’s comment, “worth watching” on his social media platform X (formerly Twitter) was about the explosive new documentary, narrated by Woody Harrilson, called “Who is Bobby Kennedy.”
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/who-is-bobby-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=musk_5_11_24_rs_nd1&n=3)
Is it worth watching?
According to Elon Musk and over 34,000,000 people and counting, the answer is a resounding, “Yes!”
Of course we _know_ you will agree with Musk.
But more than worth watching the film about Bobby Kennedy, we hope you find Bobby worth supporting with your vote in November, and with a contribution right now.
Your gift will keep the momentum growing and going.

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Michigan GOP primary keeps getting messier
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1418%2E135344%2EBqPHCg)

Last week, a new poll came out taking stock of the race to be the Republican nominee for U.S. Senate here in Michigan.
And the big winner in that poll?
“Undecided.”
Not ex-congressman Justin Amash.
Not multi-millionaire Sandy Pensler.
Not even Mike Rogers, who is telling anyone who will listen that he’s essentially the nominee now that he has Trump’s endorsement.
Instead, “undecided” had a clear majority of 54% of people polled. The next highest response, Mike Rogers, hardly broke 30%.
That may be why the GOP primary is messy and getting messier. Pensler, who is worth at least $80 million dollars, has launched a seven-figure ad campaign attacking Mike Rogers. These attack ads, which link Rogers to Hilary Clinton, are now running on the most expensive TV out there — broadcast TV — in the Detroit, Grand Rapids, Flint and Traverse City media markets. And Mr. Pensler has said he’ll be running TV ads statewide all the way through the primary election in August.
This news all but guarantees that the Republicans will be fighting it out right up to primary day on August 6th, leaving just three months afterwards for the eventual nominee to campaign for the general election.
This is good news for Elissa’s chances, but only if we can take advantage of it by doing the early work necessary to introduce her to voters in all 11 media markets across Michigan. The next few months are our opportunity to get a head start and prepare for whoever comes out of the Republican primary process.
[**Will you chip in $3 today to help us make the most of this opportunity and head into the general election with a strong chance to win?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-may24.waY6cu&refcode=em240511-1-sa&t=2&akid=1418%2E135344%2EBqPHCg)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Smiley for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=020df0750fdf4c51bd55728a39f816e6&_e=HJLZ5phKDQQCjQI3R4jLVP0j-XGaW7jjQd2wZU4Er5R-mw4kCXl1LtxyZPZLVfdbxBej5FyYPd1HdRF60z5cujWFWAm99YSpbytbIfQqgZ_tEL6X1jzrTVcg8lnTEyzw6unwAL7C23zOkKfGQ48BCOxTzRLnSGYmCwyuSff_b7mgxxMKs-MF8EWbQF0AoLwhsqgXb9MCUJy_-dxDBR5_MtuAPHN_KOF3VHhSiNIOn-w9I7ObI_k457WNoP6iNvkWBYYJOPLgSTtTkGZvLv6ihQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, I was 23 years old when I first got the call: my husband Scotty's Army unit was ambushed by a suicide bomber.

When I showed up at Walter Reed Hospital, he was in a coma, and his eyes were pierced by shrapnel.

**With Scotty unable to vouch for himself, I was his only advocate - and I experienced government dysfunction for the first time while fighting for his rights as a wounded soldier.**

**My name is Tiffany Smiley. When my husband was critically wounded in Iraq, the government elite tried to hold my family back. But we fought the establishment bureaucracy - and won.**

Since that day, I've dedicated my life to changing how government works for veterans and their families.

**Now, I 'm ready to take that fight to Capitol Hill. I'm running for Congress to secure the American Dream not just for our veterans and gold star families, but for EVERY American who has been failed by the system.**

**[We're just getting started, and I'm going to need an A-Team by my side to pull off a victory. If you're ready to make government work for the people again, I want you on my team.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=020df0750fdf4c51bd55728a39f816e6&_e=HJLZ5phKDQQCjQI3R4jLVP0j-XGaW7jjQd2wZU4Er5R-mw4kCXl1LtxyZPZLVfdbxBej5FyYPd1HdRF60z5cujWFWAm99YSpbytbIfQqgZ_tEL6X1jzrTVcg8lnTEyzwHhnVH4ZtIPck-nAS-QNJTenn5x4jX2Vjvh4aE573RmnOsqW094OLhPjT0I5azgseCZUEPSno8dRDFpCqKzycTrEZkfx2idwkhifqa-W6r3BF8KOni6a2-U0VDbjZpPAMsL9yDsaKzMMyA4gY77K5iA%3D%3D)**
---
[](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=020df0750fdf4c51bd55728a39f816e6&_e=HJLZ5phKDQQCjQI3R4jLVP0j-XGaW7jjQd2wZU4Er5R-mw4kCXl1LtxyZPZLVfdbxBej5FyYPd1HdRF60z5cujWFWAm99YSpbytbIfQqgZ_tEL6X1jzrTVcg8lnTEyzwdVXIGsehHb1PQqUUl3ZxP8AlN-cKLGZeN_culOXLCaCyP4yBp_Zn-DmWZiqcMNT8VV98K4MwXqTEIx5dhevquDZYJk6BxtITQ2I3xIfPlolfq1j_RoSyX1UYyuwsFkR7ggcNTCG30Tixix7To6BDuA%3D%3D)
---
[**SUPPORT TIFFANY SMILEY**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=020df0750fdf4c51bd55728a39f816e6&_e=HJLZ5phKDQQCjQI3R4jLVP0j-XGaW7jjQd2wZU4Er5R-mw4kCXl1LtxyZPZLVfdbxBej5FyYPd1HdRF60z5cujWFWAm99YSpbytbIfQqgZ_tEL6X1jzrTVcg8lnTEyzwQdsU_jh27AeuObX8V_q6vmIyddled9lxMy53hQKKmV8oLp9_jriuHx-A1AAg7PtPpyz4csSrCF5fHq0V_X6n2fSWcOGdBwGMSnqm7yX9dil6cj0EFvDhUjSgCvebENwtI0IewR1_SMskj-BHScXWfw%3D%3D)
---
Sometimes it seems like the harder we're fighting, the worse things are getting.

The swamp, the bureaucracy, and grandstanding politicians are picking away at the American Dream.

We're spending money we don't have while our border is wide open and bringing crime and drugs to our cities.

Families are struggling with ever-increasing prices while homeless veterans sleep on the streets.

**But no matter how dark our days are, I still believe in America, and I believe we can do better.**

I've worked to change government from the outside for almost twenty years.

But now I'm ready to get into the belly of the beast and deliver real change for Washington families from Congress itself.

**[I hope that you, my friends and neighbors in the fourth district who've always been there for Scotty and me, will be with us once again as we take the fight to Congress.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=020df0750fdf4c51bd55728a39f816e6&_e=HJLZ5phKDQQCjQI3R4jLVP0j-XGaW7jjQd2wZU4Er5R-mw4kCXl1LtxyZPZLVfdbxBej5FyYPd1HdRF60z5cujWFWAm99YSpbytbIfQqgZ_tEL6X1jzrTVcg8lnTEyzwsE1km0iGZyVee3VmUQHy4_NxGXqZXB1YIqNtp4NxpwS-THPYLUoTW22o7DBGtrT1nEUDlYSTvPvTlJDBXxdPORlEEJ-oWoKvQwQPgE0d-3Ju5ykXUNU2GYLTDp4D8AjpY-QwYfxSJ4PYRUUWo84mWg%3D%3D)**
---
[**SUPPORT TIFFANY SMILEY**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=020df0750fdf4c51bd55728a39f816e6&_e=HJLZ5phKDQQCjQI3R4jLVP0j-XGaW7jjQd2wZU4Er5R-mw4kCXl1LtxyZPZLVfdbxBej5FyYPd1HdRF60z5cujWFWAm99YSpbytbIfQqgZ_tEL6X1jzrTVcg8lnTEyzwxkdFzQiUyjRKJKJW5jfQj6l1Qh882g2GaymD4hGZrDXb3QSJBbMVbJv9kNBApsXTLgWLN1Fr9CXPDboM7FArQlUcCHKg_-a_uy5N_F_KxdGspIMBmSqMHHKtSfyD4SUH0Jk2kRG5v2chUUE1FZE9gQ%3D%3D)
---
I can't thank you enough for all the support you have shown me over the years. clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, I was 23 years old when I first got the call: my husband Scotty's Army unit was ambushed by a suicide bomber. When I showed up at Walter Reed Hospital, he was in a coma, and his eyes were pierced by shrapnel. With Scotty unable to vouch for himself, I was his only advocate - and I experienced government dysfunction for the first time while fighting for his rights as a wounded soldier. My name is Tiffany Smiley. When my husband was critically wounded in Iraq, the government elite tried to hold my family back. But we fought the establishment bureaucracy - and won. Since that day, I've dedicated my life to changing how government works for veterans and their families. Now, I 'm ready to take that fight to Capitol Hill. I'm running for Congress to secure the American Dream not just for our veterans and gold star families, but for EVERY American who has been failed by the system. Sometimes it seems like the harder we're fighting, the worse things are getting. The swamp, the bureaucracy, and grandstanding politicians are picking away at the American Dream. We're spending money we don't have while our border is wide open and bringing crime and drugs to our cities. Families are struggling with ever-increasing prices while homeless veterans sleep on the streets. But no matter how dark our days are, I still believe in America, and I believe we can do better. I've worked to change government from the outside for almost twenty years. But now I'm ready to get into the belly of the beast and deliver real change for Washington families from Congress itself. I can't thank you enough for all the support you have shown me over the years. I am so excited to embark on this new mission together and I know with your continued support, we can win this. For America, Tiffany Smiley | | Paid for by Smiley for Congress | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Smiley for Congress.

| | | | | _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him.**I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider[splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Blue Amp Action.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d489d89-e8cc-460f-8798-99f1e5af05bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_ Peter – can we huddle real quick? I need to relay the level of seriousness this campaign just reached. 1\. Public polling shows me and one of my opponents are neck-and-neck. 2\. But that same opponent just collected a check for $600,000 from a PAC that backs election deniers and insurrection supporters. 3\. So now we're being outspent on ads, and that's a dangerous spot to be in just a few days out from the election. Billionaires who donate to Donald Trump, Ron Desantis, Ted Cruz and Lauren Boebert are trying to influence this election, Peter. And if I can't raise $50,000 by tomorrow at midnight to renew my ads, they'll dominate the airwaves and crush our chance to defend democracy. [**Can you chip in anything between me and Blue Amp Action to help me win on May 14? We need someone seasoned at protecting democracy to serve in Maryland's 3rd, and that's me >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3e9156f-1279-4392-b551-c1e5110b08bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Chairman Eric Underwood
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY ()
body:
🇺🇸 Tuesday, MAY 14th - Be a Difference Maker

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/1a020eea8fe9/n41kepo7ku-12694432?e=25844e23a8)
https://ne.gop/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365

** Good Morning Republicans,
------------------------------------------------------------
Verse of the Newsletter: 2 Thessalonians 3:3 But the Lord is faithful; he will strengthen you and guard you from the evil.
>From the initial returns of delegate totals, we have an UNPRECEDENTED county convention turnout. 2024 will be a HISTORICAL level of engagement by Republicans 2-3x greater then before and from these relationships we can move into the next phase of 2024 - Relational Organizing at the door of the voters. This has already been embraced by over 70+ Candiates and Counties as they use Voter Engagement App resource. We are over 100,000 door knocks or literature drops before a Primary which is simply an amazing metric.
What is relational organizing? At its core, relational organizing is building relationships with the people you KNOW and engaging with them in the political and electoral process. In years past, campaigns have called this a "friends and family program." Repeated studies have shown increased voter turnout and INFLUENCE where relational organizing was used. Which is easier...having conversations about politics, candidates, donation requests, sign location requests, with total STRANGERS or using your ESTABLISHED connections/relationships to discuss values, solutions, and the GOP ENDORSED candidate YOU are supporting?
With new volunteers and relationships we will have the resources to focus on new GROWTH for the Republican party. Do you know that it's been over a decade since the last meaningful Voter Registration drive by the NEGOP? A coordinated, organized, PURPOSEFUL attempt to gain MORE Republican voters through engagement. More voters you say...gosh, what could we do with MORE voters?!? Signing up NEW voters, flipping Independent voters to Republican, flipping Conservative Democrat voters to Republican. The avenues for engagement are limitless, except for the time, talent, energy, and donations (https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7a94f487f9&e=d0aa4a4733&utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365) it DOES take to plan events and programs.
I have attached the current voter makeup for Nebraska in a series of images. The key element to understand is how many voting age (18+) citizens are in each county (https://www.census.gov/library/stories/state-by-state/nebraska-population-change-between-census-decade.html?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365) . The two lowest populated counties like Arthur & Blaine (https://sos.nebraska.gov/elections/voter-registration-statistics?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365) have 95% of the 18+ citizens as voters and a vast majority are Republican. But in Lancaster & Douglas County it's closer to 80% of the 18+ citizens are registered voters. This map shows a total of 18+ citizens in Douglas County, view the chart below to see the number of voters.

https://www.census.gov/library/stories/state-by-state/nebraska-population-change-between-census-decade.html?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365
Consider this...if the citizen is over 18 and not a registered voter, then we, as the party, have NEVER knocked on their door to connect them to our VALUES. They don't show up on any list that is readily available as voter data, so we skip them.
What would happen if we sent out teams of people to meet these citizens?
What would happen if we sent out teams of people to discuss the values of the party?
What would happen if we sent out teams of people to LISTEN to their concerns of the direction of our country and state?
...AND...then get them registered to VOTE Republican?
All our 2024 candidates could make an IMMEDIATE impression and connection AND a RELATIONSHIP with this NEW voter by just knocking on their door within the next few weeks after. This methodology for WINNING elections is not NEW, but for the Republican Party in Nebraska...we just have not bothered with it in decades. This is what many, many other states do!
In all but TWO counties Republicans have the advantage of REGISTERED Voters (Douglas -5500 and Thurston -550 Approx). So why are there 900 elected Democrats and 875 of them are in the LOCAL governing bodies of NRD's, Power Boards, Educational Service Units, AND most importantly...our 244 Public School Boards? We need to engage Independents to join the Party that MATCHES their Nebraska values because a voter is more APT to vote for the party they represent!

https://sos.nebraska.gov/elections/voter-registration-statistics?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365

Congressional Breakdown
https://sos.nebraska.gov/elections/voter-registration-statistics?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365
So much opportunity in 2024. So much to do!
We have an awesome Featured Speaker - Lt. General Michael Flynn! We will be showing his movie "Flynn - Deliver the Truth. Whatever the Cost." on Friday night, May 17th including a Q&A session

FLYNN Movie Premiere Tour
Friday, May 17^th Lincoln, NE
5:00pm Doors open
5:00pm – 6:15pm Meet & Greet
6:30pm Movie starts
8:30pm Q&A session
9:00pm Event ends
https://www.flynnmovie.com/showing/flynn-movie-premier-lincoln-ne/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365 (https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1a46cd6709&e=29f1bbf6e5&utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365)
https://www.flynnmovie.com/showing/flynn-movie-premier-lincoln-ne/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365

You might be asking...What is the National Convention (https://gopconvention2024.com/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365) ? Go to https://gopconvention2024.com/about/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365 (https://gopconvention2024.com/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365) for more details.
https://youtu.be/ciqyZRizqdA?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365

During what may be the most important election of our lives, it is the job of the RNC’s Committee on Arrangements (COA) to plan a blockbuster, 4-day Convention that will be broadcast across the world. We will host upwards of 50,000 guests in Milwaukee, including the delegates who will nominate the next President and Vice President of the United States.

Thousands of delegates and alternates will be selected by all 56 states and territories. They will travel to Milwaukee, WI July 15-18, 2024, to meet and select the Republican Nominee for President.
Nebraska is allocated 33 National Delegates and 33 Alternates. At our Nebraska State Convention on Saturday, May 18th in Lincoln, we will elect 3 Delegates (and alternates) from each Congressional District (9) AND then 24 At-Large Delegates (and alternates) equaling 33 Delegates and 33 Alternates.
We have plenty of work to do with Legislation Support, support of candidates, connecting to coalition partners, event planning, and discussing the different committee's and groups need to be successful in 2024!
The truth shall set us free.
Blessings,
–Chairman Underwood
Donate (https://ne.gop/donate/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=7c3ec76d29-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-7c3ec76d29-21732365)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Donald Trump can’t run from this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)
---
I’m just going to state the obvious: Donald Trump is attempting to hide his anti-abortion stances ahead of the 2024 election because he wants to win — and he knows that the anti-abortion agenda is extremely unpopular. But he can’t run from his record:
* He appointed anti-choice Supreme Court justices who overturned _Roe v. Wade_
* He’s boasted about being the president who “got rid of _Roe v. Wade_ ”
* He said there has to be “some form of punishment” for women who get abortions
* And he’s also said he wants to let states monitor women's pregnancies so they can know if they've gotten an abortion

And by the way, when asked point-blank, he has refused to say he would veto a bill that imposes a nationwide ban. Trump is responsible for the appalling state of abortion rights in America. Full stop. Trump overturned _Roe_ , and his right-wing extremist allies are ready to go even further and block abortion access nationwide. Conservative groups that support him are laying out plans that outline how they can leverage government agencies and executive orders to slash abortion rights without Congress involved. And they’re taking it to extreme levels: no abortion rights, no mailed abortion medication, no IVF, no contraception access — in both red and blue states. [**It’s no secret that Donald Trump is an anti-abortion extremist. And when I say abortion will be on the ballot in 2024, I mean it. So can you please split a contribution between the Biden-Harris campaign and our re-election campaign to strengthen our abortion rights movement and prevent MAGA extremists from passing these radical plans?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?t=8&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi)
---

---
After November, we face two paths. If Trump wins, extremists will come for abortion rights in every state. But if we re-elect President Biden with a Democratic Congress, we can ensure reproductive freedom across the country. We have to stay in the fight, and we have to win. I also want to underscore that President Biden is not just saying, “Give me a House, give me a Senate, and we’ll make _Roe v. Wade_ law of the land.” That is an important priority — but he’s also been fighting for this in additional ways. For members of the U.S. military who are stationed in states that ban abortion, President Biden has made sure that they will still have access to reproductive care. The VA has started expanding its services for abortion care for veterans. And President Biden is fighting in the courts right now, making the argument to keep medication abortion available everywhere. There is no sharper contrast between the two people who are running for president than there is on abortion. I’ll keep saying it: Abortion is on the ballot this year. So I’m going to pull on every lever to fight for the right to an abortion nationwide. That means campaigning against MAGA Republicans' out-of-touch extremism in order to prevent their plans for a national ban. That means electing pro-abortion Democrats in the Senate and ending the filibuster so we can codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. That means reversing the right-wing takeover of our Supreme Court by working to expand and rebalance it. That means supporting local candidates and ballot measures that will defend abortion rights at the state level. [**And that means making sure President Biden wins and we prevent Donald Trump from passing extremist anti-abortion plans. But we rely on your support to get this done. So will you please split a contribution of $28 between the Biden-Harris campaign and our re-election to help ensure we can pass national abortion protections?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2188?amount=28&t=14&akid=2164%2E4032634%2EllCNoi) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |

This campaign isn’t just for Colorado; it’s about building a stronger future for all of us. **To put it frankly, flipping the House blue hinges on protecting this seat. **
Yadira's already proven she can beat the odds. In 2022, when pollsters didn’t give her a shot, she won this seat.
**Now, she’s the first Latina from Colorado elected to Congress and is working across the aisle to advocate for families in Colorado’s 8th District.**
Our opponents have big-money donors, but we've got something better—a grassroots movement that believes in Yadira’s vision. **[The truth is, we can’t win this fight without you. Even just $8 will help keep Yadira working for us in Congress. Can you pitch in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84743805/472492184/-1931070807?refcode=email_051124_8forco8&amount=8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmM5NGFkZi05OTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R7NsYMRlmFZMT_igFu3Ns25ndymZYS6VKfR53chtwGI=)**

| Hi Friend, Team Whitlow needs your help!
With fewer than 20 days to go before our runoff election, we're ramping up the momentum to make sure every voter in TX-31 knows why voting in the May 28th Runoff is so critical.
[Can you help us get the message out?](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sqIocG0zT0RvVa1i2-S2DRld2s6_mSmSrIp3Eik5w-2fEty8YWe2EqoNIqcIUdoQUkcDDiJAdXE_B81gsrURSOYxJ-jcYBKDiC1F08ppyXh1QGy_zGPFfnWI6y4tMlad-3nBw5xSf1TIrLa3py7iC0kWpFe5XI3WFGM0P3zEY7bbS_f5aOXrRl7KUpe5eg7rdD3riyPusxsam8pIw5fZqrouqPf7DFrs2ATZagiBgT5ztaekN7kbDOvtAWZL4lPg7Pj0qU0aHveZRacyZDdaW_ccJn_x8Z8ogKxgCeJMGeF7YMsZrFWfTQ==&c=_s7nlZYTd5_p-kl9TAAsFgvurZDKE00L5lxo20Gd9fWgd9Tj0_ROZw==&ch=hTjuyWRe3SGU0bjBz1UMYUFqMDl4xm0DyfvAznjGq7SgzwyMCzpGyQ==)

| Our team will be hosting in-person and virtual phone-, texting-, and postcard-writing teams from now until Election Day, and we'd love to have you onboard.
If you can volunteer an hour or two (or more!), [please sign up for our volunteer activities, here.](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sqIocG0zT0RvVa1i2-S2DRld2s6_mSmSrIp3Eik5w-2fEty8YWe2EqoNIqcIUdoQUkcDDiJAdXE_B81gsrURSOYxJ-jcYBKDiC1F08ppyXh1QGy_zGPFfnWI6y4tMlad-3nBw5xSf1TIrLa3py7iC0kWpFe5XI3WFGM0P3zEY7bbS_f5aOXrRl7KUpe5eg7rdD3riyPusxsam8pIw5fZqrouqPf7DFrs2ATZagiBgT5ztaekN7kbDOvtAWZL4lPg7Pj0qU0aHveZRacyZDdaW_ccJn_x8Z8ogKxgCeJMGeF7YMsZrFWfTQ==&c=_s7nlZYTd5_p-kl9TAAsFgvurZDKE00L5lxo20Gd9fWgd9Tj0_ROZw==&ch=hTjuyWRe3SGU0bjBz1UMYUFqMDl4xm0DyfvAznjGq7SgzwyMCzpGyQ==) If you can join us IRL, we'll be calling and texting voters, and writing postcards, on May 15th and May 19th. And we're hosting virtual phone and texting banks to help meet every schedule!

[](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sqIocG0zT0RvVa1i2-S2DRld2s6_mSmSrIp3Eik5w-2fEty8YWe2EqoNIqcIUdoQUkcDDiJAdXE_B81gsrURSOYxJ-jcYBKDiC1F08ppyXh1QGy_zGPFfnWI6y4tMlad-3nBw5xSf1TIrLa3py7iC0kWpFe5XI3WFGM0P3zEY7bbS_f5aOXrRl7KUpe5eg7rdD3riyPusxsam8pIw5fZqrouqPf7DFrs2ATZagiBgT5ztaekN7kbDOvtAWZL4lPg7Pj0qU0aHveZRacyZDdaW_ccJn_x8Z8ogKxgCeJMGeF7YMsZrFWfTQ==&c=_s7nlZYTd5_p-kl9TAAsFgvurZDKE00L5lxo20Gd9fWgd9Tj0_ROZw==&ch=hTjuyWRe3SGU0bjBz1UMYUFqMDl4xm0DyfvAznjGq7SgzwyMCzpGyQ==)

| And keep your eye out for even more volunteer opportunities!
You know exactly what's at stake in this election -- the future of everything from our democracy, our reproductive rights, to our public schools. By supporting Team Whitlow, you can be a BIG part of what drives the change across Texas.
Can't join us? [Please consider making a donation today of whatever you can chip in. We're a grassroots campaign -- and that means we rely ](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sqIocG0zT0RvVa1i2-S2DRld2s6_mSmSrIp3Eik5w-2fEty8YWe2EpxL17bvAu8o7RAjbwL37FOK846LW8CFVQ5iq7bib7qIMeRliMyuh0fq3jOKh5iXOO7Y5g1HE4UvdlAMNLBvSqC_DSk9RQqcRiUye-W21-owO6Dr-QuwQI1CX1qexnD8WfAzP0acWcD-5IphdwCaX6MaF0ZrZ4WI8A==&c=_s7nlZYTd5_p-kl9TAAsFgvurZDKE00L5lxo20Gd9fWgd9Tj0_ROZw==&ch=hTjuyWRe3SGU0bjBz1UMYUFqMDl4xm0DyfvAznjGq7SgzwyMCzpGyQ==)[solely](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sqIocG0zT0RvVa1i2-S2DRld2s6_mSmSrIp3Eik5w-2fEty8YWe2EpxL17bvAu8o7RAjbwL37FOK846LW8CFVQ5iq7bib7qIMeRliMyuh0fq3jOKh5iXOO7Y5g1HE4UvdlAMNLBvSqC_DSk9RQqcRiUye-W21-owO6Dr-QuwQI1CX1qexnD8WfAzP0acWcD-5IphdwCaX6MaF0ZrZ4WI8A==&c=_s7nlZYTd5_p-kl9TAAsFgvurZDKE00L5lxo20Gd9fWgd9Tj0_ROZw==&ch=hTjuyWRe3SGU0bjBz1UMYUFqMDl4xm0DyfvAznjGq7SgzwyMCzpGyQ==)[ on folks like you to help power our campaign.](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sqIocG0zT0RvVa1i2-S2DRld2s6_mSmSrIp3Eik5w-2fEty8YWe2EpxL17bvAu8o7RAjbwL37FOK846LW8CFVQ5iq7bib7qIMeRliMyuh0fq3jOKh5iXOO7Y5g1HE4UvdlAMNLBvSqC_DSk9RQqcRiUye-W21-owO6Dr-QuwQI1CX1qexnD8WfAzP0acWcD-5IphdwCaX6MaF0ZrZ4WI8A==&c=_s7nlZYTd5_p-kl9TAAsFgvurZDKE00L5lxo20Gd9fWgd9Tj0_ROZw==&ch=hTjuyWRe3SGU0bjBz1UMYUFqMDl4xm0DyfvAznjGq7SgzwyMCzpGyQ==)

-- Team Whitlow

body:
My opponent likes to talk about how out-of-state interests impact Montana, but the real issue is Tester himself. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=458a504bb4274727a9a0d008e1c701ca&_e=zkNwGsnJqiuaN8Ati_clcN5lDmNARrBYDgw-r9SE62fMFVy7UHxUR76BuMjP0wBfGExOhGe4EEw9PP-Y9uhfeXNo6WBEemialWBQmbIH-v7RC6NRUpQN4EpUWHvOFdCt3iEf23DRQ4NTLJI1IP7YFU4jFcAJsRe_ueNfpDOSNXfRI_YOogHMGdEKzhA-vjNZLKi25QX5hw_cKJrcofzxGMnnJgNOCJ-dz5LQE5MYIIQB4sCaOvlNLgMOu34G-B0-k9dA5KLvbKQIzmi28IHorST8bkU53IQ2gT3ssMnO4T4uDLDWqZUSJXy_LOgx0jzJxTEHNkxN2LsSI9h7YVKfd817-s2CZkqhqQ7lO3HqYHnPiO5xKCgvC9n0gB69Y687AAcROSRb17Srk-xd3OJvKnNsyzsUcmMu_EH_sp02eNE%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself.

You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry.

**My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support.**

I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, _**“Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.”**_

Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. **[We don't need a bought-and-paid-for Hollywood Senator representing American interests any longer.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=458a504bb4274727a9a0d008e1c701ca&_e=zkNwGsnJqiuaN8Ati_clcN5lDmNARrBYDgw-r9SE62fMFVy7UHxUR76BuMjP0wBfGExOhGe4EEw9PP-Y9uhfeXNo6WBEemialWBQmbIH-v7RC6NRUpQN4EpUWHvOFdCt3iEf23DRQ4NTLJI1IP7YFU4jFcAJsRe_ueNfpDOSNXfRI_YOogHMGdEKzhA-vjNZLKi25QX5hw_cKJrcofzxGMnnJgNOCJ-dz5LQE5MYIIQB4sCaOvlNLgMOu34G-B0-2UJ825xEeTeVAWYJk3pOIuJLw5V3uA3eNDRA2g9t_n_tHdXbnOZHyRF6pVKu4SyE3XQkcXf6Up5t2CXIEkrEdCQU96Y6EzlgOmINeI8A6TgWVEMehQO8AdsMv0OUHAK7aaO7VPem2kIyG6UowqvbxHK1aH0uf8BqLiTlYul3aLI%3D)**

[**HELP ME DEFEAT CALIFORNIA'S FAVORITE SENATOR ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=458a504bb4274727a9a0d008e1c701ca&_e=zkNwGsnJqiuaN8Ati_clcN5lDmNARrBYDgw-r9SE62fMFVy7UHxUR76BuMjP0wBfGExOhGe4EEw9PP-Y9uhfeXNo6WBEemialWBQmbIH-v7RC6NRUpQN4EpUWHvOFdCt3iEf23DRQ4NTLJI1IP7YFU4jFcAJsRe_ueNfpDOSNXfRI_YOogHMGdEKzhA-vjNZLKi25QX5hw_cKJrcofzxGMnnJgNOCJ-dz5LQE5MYIIQB4sCaOvlNLgMOu34G-B0-sMsuzc2XOerlR9jxAe4kAPiRU5a2At6aQHsU5e8byR8cUtIm3K3f7IEWn6t-krFL-83Ul-EOqlNPF6w9G0VPyakBSUZyZhHQdKVXJrncp8DUylvoJ66dAkqZUSS0XxXMhhhoYr8I1WZ1op5lmbJH7-Mx20sWmHVuPRz246Jpe9M%3D)
**
Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite like Barbara Streisand, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? **

With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, _**there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next six months.**_

I appreciate your help with this matter.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=458a504bb4274727a9a0d008e1c701ca&_e=zkNwGsnJqiuaN8Ati_clcN5lDmNARrBYDgw-r9SE62fMFVy7UHxUR76BuMjP0wBfGExOhGe4EEw9PP-Y9uhfeXNo6WBEemialWBQmbIH-v7RC6NRUpQN4EpUWHvOFdCt3iEf23DRQ4NTLJI1IP7YFU4jFcAJsRe_ueNfpDOSNXfRI_YOogHMGdEKzhA-vjNZLKi25QX5hw_cKJrcofzxGMnnJgNOCJ-dz5LQE5MYIIQB4sCaOvlNLgMOu34G-B0-quMQ2MGvGs2UDNrEOYQUMzbur5EXX2fAPv_7xovFYHvaPyEOs6ggOS-fbhCMNvhR16ofEZhuhLVaWf1dKbwDzJRkYHMg7zlP1UmzH85Oi0-ZwRRKGbo-C8CSU_yu15vKY_m3vo2nANSt1PeoSRDmuy08kuF51frh0g2Psj36T2c%3D)

I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Peter,

I hope I’m not interrupting your morning coffee, but I want to catch up.

This campaign hasn’t been easy. Emailing supporters like you helps make me remember why we are in this fight, Peter.

Our backs are against the wall. The media is against us. Big Tech is against us. The DC swamp is against us. The corrupt DOJ is against us.

**[It’s getting hard to see the finish line, but we can’t give up.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=03fc0307627642aea0cd522fa3317b28&_e=TJJCcvMllA-5TeN1Asi_Al-YDRet7xytyqlnGVGTcuC-NcA7d_S0pb1RUAQnD7fTDnUmV49A1q6PSHV7BjBshGs5BkLdDVC8Y7Lvv_BLx53oOrfvUj3wIFVHoq24LGtsPlNRC6T5zApmFe3iCwPas6ElcKLoc5B0vOCKoNwJUBc_GyplM1JmCh6tOgtjQqN7pgWfg6aOEA2jP_qzCwGUMXqy9vqosvG6xiICT6quJd7s6dpc85rNb0gzX0h8ecpZSmNwROrwWtNYnPR8E_8q1b2D5XbAOI9Oj6r5AQ7ih7Pxcoohg3rbfoMRxZullZqmJoU8-tSKZEtTs-QjLQp1YFCqKihsuoX0u505QA2bIF4Qo4Ps_PB37zfGfu15qYan)**
I’m not sure if you saw, but last quarter my liberal opponent recorded one of the biggest cash hauls in Missouri HISTORY!

**[But despite the setbacks, I’m still optimistic.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=03fc0307627642aea0cd522fa3317b28&_e=TJJCcvMllA-5TeN1Asi_Al-YDRet7xytyqlnGVGTcuC-NcA7d_S0pb1RUAQnD7fTDnUmV49A1q6PSHV7BjBshGs5BkLdDVC8Y7Lvv_BLx53oOrfvUj3wIFVHoq24LGtsPlNRC6T5zApmFe3iCwPas6ElcKLoc5B0vOCKoNwJUBc_GyplM1JmCh6tOgtjQqN7pgWfg6aOEA2jP_qzCwGUMXqy9vqosvG6xiICT6quJd4_RqmBhYQcP0U66tdZSHFzkZdhMdbaLT7EcHk7k4GdG68_ynmhU8QqpZhp1ElD2iGpkFbKbSoE5-8jxo3IPyZGV9WuJkctitPHiWRHzUHdz_LhbQYHQcVDBGhMj4Mlg5pHYklE7Sm-G97MxSEwQ6tV)**

My opponent’s money comes from out of state megadonors - not from the hardworking Missourians I’ve been honored to meet on the campaign trail.

But money goes far in politics, and I’m afraid he’ll be able to use his massive cash haul to spread lies about us and gain ground in this race.

Analysts across the country agree - this race could decide control of the Senate, and right now, I could use your help.

**[**Can you help my campaign and get us back on track to win come November?**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=03fc0307627642aea0cd522fa3317b28&_e=TJJCcvMllA-5TeN1Asi_Al-YDRet7xytyqlnGVGTcuC-NcA7d_S0pb1RUAQnD7fTDnUmV49A1q6PSHV7BjBshGs5BkLdDVC8Y7Lvv_BLx53oOrfvUj3wIFVHoq24LGtsPlNRC6T5zApmFe3iCwPas6ElcKLoc5B0vOCKoNwJUBc_GyplM1JmCh6tOgtjQqN7pgWfg6aOEA2jP_qzCwGUMXqy9vqosvG6xiICT6quJd6JKNYPkd_XMFUwrtufBrBlatGT7XvEKm8CZnzlSZDN1SCHWrPfFIadm_9inRzOFg6Z2OEOFl8mREzPmPkTLnnlmbDPv-45R-slnM_3a3WopglF4kgXLjOubYin3J29pu3CyTm2sL00hHgMLnuEPKya)**

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Knock knock knock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=95c39412192c4600821a590bd2168db4&_e=NgQi9HajVsAnf_tB9YNL7FVCuX-jeueyAW7dhGwc6V_QxkTB-Vz1FpyX2OBiHIJMbaNjNgcjr4eltT7ep0jWO6eGewcTX9YZCgP-xOzrfVcvzQDrnpC0-WOME1gkL7BRi0L3Dv_zo0M3_f-5hXEHgBN3aBp11LU359VArSehOQbjC32IC_UQcCblQ28PPTfGnjrQMJLDmwNiyPc2wIwE-3bu73sbF_l4gyPnjWA3HxJqQ33R3VGzmO_kSQ52q_kG9PYnSJ5O3K12s8n8l8JzlXzPyWVJ59jZf1pwM3lOBvk%3D)
---
**Knock, knock, knock.**

_It 's the scariest sound you'll hear when you live in a communist country. _

_It 's the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away. _

_It 's the sound of always living in fear, and it's my family's real-life story. _

We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth.

**America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back.**

I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, and Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world.

I love this country - but right now, it's taken a dark turn.

Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden's Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election.

_And he 's doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets. _

We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it.

I've been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go.

**It 's time to save America while we still have a chance. **

**I 'm Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I'm running for the United States Senate.**

**[If you 're all-in to defend the greatest country on Earth, join our team today.](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=95c39412192c4600821a590bd2168db4&_e=NgQi9HajVsAnf_tB9YNL7FVCuX-jeueyAW7dhGwc6V_QxkTB-Vz1FpyX2OBiHIJMbaNjNgcjr4eltT7ep0jWO6eGewcTX9YZCgP-xOzrfVcvzQDrnpC0-WOME1gkL7BRi0L3Dv_zo0M3_f-5hXEHgPMNoGK9Ki0Ld6-qbXvVam4RFARTMykMhl9-lUH2TdhWhKG5BrsgXj0tXcwRKhE4RfN2NZb78M4kMz9EbLAqNNqnLV6JGINaxtWd_9E0k5Uv3aw0Icmw-MORX3KuKgaKh2Hv27U1a0VZ6NpQqjelBrA%3D)**
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM - STAND WITH ME TODAY**](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=95c39412192c4600821a590bd2168db4&_e=NgQi9HajVsAnf_tB9YNL7FVCuX-jeueyAW7dhGwc6V_QxkTB-Vz1FpyX2OBiHIJMbaNjNgcjr4eltT7ep0jWO6eGewcTX9YZCgP-xOzrfVcvzQDrnpC0-WOME1gkL7BRi0L3Dv_zo0M3_f-5hXEHgO0Rh5WvxJQT_pISAHdlOFxidx-Nru2Joovzk_K6bdpHxDnK70lSBdUdZQJ3suY58TykpuEYa6GZnboPogz6vnmmFNKI54LaAclBsa2ewjtpH7c9N3leOh5TW1rcMsMPdMbOBaXTmuu6evFKGipu4Ew%3D)
---
I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Fellow Patriot.

And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it.

We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom made suits.

If we're going to preserve our freedoms, we can't be intimidated. We must be fearless.

**[It 's time to fight for the American greatness that lies within us. Join our team today - because I know you haven't given up on America yet either.](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=95c39412192c4600821a590bd2168db4&_e=NgQi9HajVsAnf_tB9YNL7FVCuX-jeueyAW7dhGwc6V_QxkTB-Vz1FpyX2OBiHIJMbaNjNgcjr4eltT7ep0jWO6eGewcTX9YZCgP-xOzrfVcvzQDrnpC0-WOME1gkL7BRi0L3Dv_zo0M3_f-5hXEHgPAuTAjuUJjNHCJPmVoK53uaiSBXVT625Mwz_GnbPepN2NFe_VHOYVAbBbDVmRagJRrVYGCrwUJtAlAz8ld3VidYm2WiHNCiMoEkwe-2X_1dnugVxvphbam8ej-8TU9vAX94JfYeRR7YsdO2P_rOszs%3D)**
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM - STAND WITH ME TODAY**](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=95c39412192c4600821a590bd2168db4&_e=NgQi9HajVsAnf_tB9YNL7FVCuX-jeueyAW7dhGwc6V_QxkTB-Vz1FpyX2OBiHIJMbaNjNgcjr4eltT7ep0jWO6eGewcTX9YZCgP-xOzrfVcvzQDrnpC0-WOME1gkL7BRi0L3Dv_zo0M3_f-5hXEHgFbcdMLqhICLI6k3YQySu1GCur9CpU9-Gzaiva-DTxWYBkO28m_BUxN8BNofgsgCHAwmcZmnmgO2aFmyiPihQClNw7K_C5tqdBFx4kumpbmGLC_CIF_0_uHgZ4rZu-ERxvgOYiVMbyIrupzvGvPnkXg%3D)

Let's win this. In Liberty,

name: Andy Kim
subject: Donald Trump is in our backyard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
In my first race, people thought we couldn’t win in a Trump-won district. But we ran on the issues that mattered most to New Jerseyans, and we proved them wrong.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84744603/472494982/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmJhYTI5MC05YTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ckko11EGj-ogQ4U5IjYDNZGcXfg8hDPq2u7Glh36A8A=&emci=a326ca42-520d-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=ffbaa290-9a0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Today, Donald Trump will be in New Jersey. He's going to go on stage in front of his MAGA-loving base and spew all sorts of lies, dangerous policies, and insults. We can either sit on the sidelines, or we can stand up and help fight back. **_I know what I'll be doing._** **I ran to stand up to Donald Trump.** I ran to protect my family and families like mine when my member of Congress threatened their healthcare. In my first race, people thought we couldn't win in a Trump-won district. _But we ran on the issues that mattered most to New Jerseyans, and we proved them wrong._ Now, I'm running for Senate because New Jersey deserves better. We deserve a senator we can trust, we deserve a senator who understands what working people go through every day, and we deserve a senator who will restore integrity to this seat. **It's been over a half-century since a Republican won a Senate election in New Jersey, and I intend to keep Democrats' streak going this November.** But there are a lot of undecided voters we have to win. clean_body: In my first race, people thought we couldn’t win in a Trump-won district. But we ran on the issues that mattered most to New Jerseyans, and we proved them wrong. | | | | Today, Donald Trump will be in New Jersey. He's going to go on stage in front of his MAGA-loving base and spew all sorts of lies, dangerous policies, and insults. We can either sit on the sidelines, or we can stand up and help fight back. I know what I'll be doing. I ran to stand up to Donald Trump. I ran to protect my family and families like mine when my member of Congress threatened their healthcare. In my first race, people thought we couldn't win in a Trump-won district. But we ran on the issues that mattered most to New Jerseyans, and we proved them wrong. Now, I'm running for Senate because New Jersey deserves better. We deserve a senator we can trust, we deserve a senator who understands what working people go through every day, and we deserve a senator who will restore integrity to this seat. It's been over a half-century since a Republican won a Senate election in New Jersey, and I intend to keep Democrats' streak going this November. But there are a lot of undecided voters we have to win. We know that Trump visiting New Jersey means Republicans are eyeing this race – they're getting ready to pour millions of dollars into New Jersey to retake the Senate Majority and even flip the state in the Presidential election. We must stop them for the sake of our country's future, and I can't do it without grassroots supporters like you. = = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .
