# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84745394/472497416/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240511_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5N2RhM2QzLTliMGYtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nftI6q2Pc7KmE5o8YQtWF5Q8OvP8mbYO9WwepwHTW_U=)
Listen, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.
**I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate _will_ flip red.**
I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap.
**We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least _$30,000_ by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat – but right now, we're way short. **
[_**Please, can you pitch in $3 or more to split between me and Upset the Setup right now to help us turn this around before it's too late? GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap. We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least $30,000 by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat – but right now, we're way short. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for doing your part to help defend Nevada and the Senate. – Jacky Rosen | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. clean_body: | | | Peter, it’s urgent that we reach out to you right now. It’s Sen. Scott. Joe Biden & Kamala Harris are making trips to Florida, and it’s no secret why - they want to rally voters to turn on President Trump and me. All they do is lie. We have one serious issue: our fundraising numbers are falling behind and they are somehow breaking fundraising records. We know that you get a lot of emails, but if we lose Florida, we have NO chance of winning the White House or taking back President Trump’s Senate Majority. | | | | | | Thank you, Rick Scott | | | Team Rick Scott Featured Merchandise *Made in the USA Golf Balls and Joe Biden, the two things that seem to get themselves lost the most! Claim your set of "Help, I'm Lost" Golf Balls today! Become an Official Member of Team Rick Scott by claiming your 2024 Membership Card! Socialism sucks, simple as that. Claim your "Socialism Sucks" T-Shirt today and let socialists know that they are not welcome in Florida! | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record-high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: **.

I cannot believe we're just 3 days from this election.

Between early voting and vote-by-mail, thousands of Marylanders are already making their choice on who is best equipped to protect our democracy and serve MD-03 in Congress.

But MAGA super PACs made their choice a few months ago – and spoiler alert – _**it's not me.**_

That's why they're pouring millions of dollars into one of my opponents and outspending us by more than double.

**[Being outspent by a MAGA super PAC could cost our grassroots movement this race, Peter. clean_body: Spoiler alert, it's not me! | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey, it's Harry. I cannot believe we're just 3 days from this election. Between early voting and vote-by-mail, thousands of Marylanders are already making their choice on who is best equipped to protect our democracy and serve MD-03 in Congress. But MAGA super PACs made their choice a few months ago – and spoiler alert – it's not me. That's why they're pouring millions of dollars into one of my opponents and outspending us by more than double. | | When we began this campaign, I promised to serve the people and combat MAGA-extremism in every single one of its nasty forms. That makes me pretty unpopular with these guys: So the MAGA money has made their choice. A super PAC that takes money from the same people who bankroll campaigns for Trump, Ted Cruz, Lauren Boebert, and Marjorie Taylor Greene are lifting my opponent up right now. Even worse? It might work to beat us... If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Harry Dunn and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | 🖤 Harry The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: Trump is making his move Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General
body:
Peter, Next Friday, Donald Trump will be in Minnesota, headlining the Minnesota GOP’s biggest fundraiser of the year. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84746868/472502282/-1585020271?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGI1YTYyZi05ZTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-2FiTEcXaTKFG3QM4ZoLtfSZfrlrv1AJn1Qc62Rxow=)
---
Peter,
Next Friday, Donald Trump will be in Minnesota, headlining the Minnesota GOP’s biggest fundraiser of the year.
In the last five polls in Minnesota, Donald Trump has been virtually tied with President Biden. The Trump campaign has had Minnesota circled as one of its key “battlegrounds” all year, and now, they’re making their move.
**The path to the White House runs straight through Minnesota, and Trump is willing to do, say, and spend anything to flip us red and secure his re-election.**
Peter, but here’s the bottom line: No matter how much money Trump and his campaign spend spreading lies across our state, sowing division, and fomenting hate, it’s no match for our decades-strong people-powered movement.
This is the most consequential moment we’ve faced so far in this year’s critical election, and we’re not sitting on the sidelines. To make sure we have the resources we need to hold the line when Trump’s in town, we set a goal of raising $15,000 ahead of his visit.

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’ll never take your dollar for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
When you pitch into this campaign, we immediately use that investment to fight back against a mountain of super PAC attacks headed my way, and organize and turn out Montanans.
| | |
---
Team, I see it happen all the time. A lot of campaigns and politicians waste your money when you contribute to them.

Not us. When you pitch into this campaign, we immediately use that investment to fight back against a mountain of super PAC attacks headed my way, and organize and turn out Montanans.

**I don’t take a single dollar for granted. I still get my flattop haircut at my local barbershop—and all it costs me is $12, including tip!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84746964/472502620/1743277108?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3808-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI5MTgwYi05ZTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbYqOh39T4Cv7jLFXMsQKrHKuWAlm1NGgKLcH0Szaxc=)
My finance team just told me that we’re running short of our midnight fundraising goal, and that can make a huge difference in whether or not we have what it takes to win.

These super PACs are ramping up their plans for Montana. **They’ll spend upwards of $50 million to try and change me into something I’m not with misleading attacks.** We need your help to gather the resources to fight back.
[**Friend, they’ll spend and say anything to defeat me. But my word is my bond—if you can split $10 between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's today, it’ll go a long way. I promise we’ll put your money to good use. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84746965/472502621/1743277108?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=10&refcode=jtk3808-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI5MTgwYi05ZTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbYqOh39T4Cv7jLFXMsQKrHKuWAlm1NGgKLcH0Szaxc=)

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: A Death Threat from Beijing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.primaryupdate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=c220fb2a74d741e29ea22978b49f4248&_t=x56eSI5CbURYPEvRyt8IeMjj1mnGXCiEU2dyJoxkihqYatrliX0pPsLyvSA7BdSgrvHA5RVy0M5CLciUQ27xgc97x6hs-R4QfPR__WdQ9Io%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.primaryupdate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=c220fb2a74d741e29ea22978b49f4248&_t=x56eSI5CbURYPEvRyt8IeMjj1mnGXCiEU2dyJoxkihqYatrliX0pPsLyvSA7BdSgrvHA5RVy0M5CLciUQ27xgc97x6hs-R4QfPR__WdQ9Io%3D)

---

Fellow American,

[](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c220fb2a74d741e29ea22978b49f4248&_e=ofpWAJFKig0u0NMaGAjE5vxM_sY3GA8OIGaJfvrD47pUcrIR1faQUtx3lZ4vhGCBoJqYIK2NFa4gLvwu57vAGzF9uM99Ky-xqqQWokdQ5jUQRYVzFCzDoQwNZTL6SO2mNXcpZzjKAZhmKZmUvOyQXX0NBTJu49ZK55BbqpLmUPP2B-zSEkYnbw_RPdueDlDLPktCXM18UrT5j8lmPKL4N_CTklt4OTElV9XqFgQ2fxjP3YpX2aWSN1ntN8U6ZUF3DoGiYdSMnAt-V0pRi0oY0tLSKQ9usTVmELt8weCTVfe_75OPBiQHUmGPn_436Ye3C1J8-ToygbFjgnHYx_yaKlNGFvTTWangvPcM-iey8noWR8JfmfJ__TtPWEXezgALhxwclvz1uYgR6sR93mGGdp04YS2BAQ3RrXZFKsof_f8%3D) Yes. I received a death threat from Beijing because I love Liberty, Freedom, and the United States of America. More on that in a minute.

Right now, I want to introduce myself.

_My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I fled Communist China and escaped the evil Communist indoctrination. I'm running for Congress because I fear the country I love is becoming like the country I left._

You see: I was born to illiterate working-class parents in China's western Sichuan province just before Mao's Cultural Revolution. I grew up in extremely poor living conditions with food rationing, social chaos, and indoctrination into Communism.

At a young age, I learned a hard lesson about surviving in a Communist regime: conform and keep your thoughts private. Do not trust anyone, even your friends.

Everything changed when an American exchange student showed me a pocket-sized version of "The Declaration of Independence." Even with my limited English skills, I could understand most of these words: "We hold these truths to be self–evident...." It's like a lightbulb came on. I had never heard such beautiful words before, and I loved them so much that I spent many hours with my American friend to learn more about these new concepts and America.

_**I had a new dream: I wanted to go to America.**_

In 1988, I made it to America with only $100 in my pocket, which I borrowed, along with a $1,200 loan from my sponsor. I spoke very little English. In the 33 years since I have enjoyed living in this great country. I received a graduate degree, got married, raised three children, started my own business, and was naturalized as a U.S. citizen in 1995.

Fast forward to today: I've spoken out against Communism and Socialism appearing on Fox News, Tucker Carlson Tonight, Fox Business, Newsmax, Timcast, Huckabee TV, John Stossel, Joe Pags Show, Gothix TV, Shawn Ryan Show, Epoch Times TV, and Glenn Beck Radio.

I've authored opinion articles for The Epoch Times, Town Hall, National Review, Union Leader, Concord Monitor, and Granite Grok.

_And here's where the death threats from Beijing started: when I decided to run for Congress._

The Democrats don't want my story to reach the ears of my fellow Americans because they hope to enact their Socialist Agenda.

But more importantly, you and I cannot afford to let the woke liberal elite plunge the America we know and love any further down the dark path of Communism and trample on our God-given rights.

**[Please, will you stand with me and make a special donation of $25, $50, or $100 to stand with me?](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c220fb2a74d741e29ea22978b49f4248&_e=ofpWAJFKig0u0NMaGAjE5vxM_sY3GA8OIGaJfvrD47pUcrIR1faQUtx3lZ4vhGCBoJqYIK2NFa4gLvwu57vAGzF9uM99Ky-xqqQWokdQ5jUQRYVzFCzDoQwNZTL6SO2mNXcpZzjKAZhmKZmUvOyQXX0NBTJu49ZK55BbqpLmUPP2B-zSEkYnbw_RPdueDlDLPktCXM18UrT5j8lmPKL4N_CTklt4OTElV9XqFgQ2fxjP3YpX2aWSN1ntN8U6ZUF3DoGiYdSMnAt-V0pRi0oY0kzkTtJIE_HSntI4My7lvDnCYzkecPZHiV0p54uFCmL_RdkA8AmpaduSy5WkjtIHx94utdH6IJmX0py_5ufI7rhC7Z7DETbX9RURhMyKV4-XCt3y9_3BgAKZ6svKqrtkj3NtAqCWmzfpl8_7N037Hdw%3D)**

_Believe me. I'm not fear-mongering when I say you cannot imagine the horrors of Socialism and Communism. It is evil._

**[That's why I need you to stand with me and preserve the freedoms and values of our American heritage.](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c220fb2a74d741e29ea22978b49f4248&_e=ofpWAJFKig0u0NMaGAjE5vxM_sY3GA8OIGaJfvrD47pUcrIR1faQUtx3lZ4vhGCBoJqYIK2NFa4gLvwu57vAGzF9uM99Ky-xqqQWokdQ5jUQRYVzFCzDoQwNZTL6SO2mNXcpZzjKAZhmKZmUvOyQXX0NBTJu49ZK55BbqpLmUPP2B-zSEkYnbw_RPdueDlDLPktCXM18UrT5j8lmPKL4N_CTklt4OTElV9XqFgQ2fxjP3YpX2aWSN1ntN8U6ZUF3DoGiYdSMnAt-V0pRi0oY0sxaXbWrNjAEvMGcG8JWCf3YOiDzpi1o4SEo9gwTcpFy4FuK5ObKaQ0e15pAex7uRZYpWxbmI5xHNETGlo7SGA3xOCr4_69HdEhR2PMaSJDFNxzMPKBIxrxCZID_gxnW2HRCk5uqdSW2bgN8ujKoxl0%3D)**

For freedom,
Lily Tang Williams

**[P.S. Even if all you can afford is $5 — I will use every penny wisely in my campaign to defeat my liberal opponent who has been a rubber stamp for Biden's America-Last agenda. We can win this together.](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c220fb2a74d741e29ea22978b49f4248&_e=ofpWAJFKig0u0NMaGAjE5vxM_sY3GA8OIGaJfvrD47pUcrIR1faQUtx3lZ4vhGCBoJqYIK2NFa4gLvwu57vAGzF9uM99Ky-xqqQWokdQ5jUQRYVzFCzDoQwNZTL6SO2mNXcpZzjKAZhmKZmUvOyQXX0NBTJu49ZK55BbqpLmUPP2B-zSEkYnbw_RPdueDlDLPktCXM18UrT5j8lmPKL4N_CTklt4OTElV9XqFgQ2fxjP3YpX2aWSN1ntN8U6ZUF3DoGiYdSMnAt-V0pRi0oY0rhb9DISKTxxoQR-o0Lb1YR68EH_5yAhm0IH_OaKqFfa3Qn4RkCkoWnRVOEDLqXiVz06W0yomf-iOlzBrEmlOV4wYdwBMhjZSg5Q2pQvcbYfOyV9KmO8-U624E6yqgCwEUlazEu4Ye8KXlvoIMGMs1c%3D)**

| _I fear that the country I love is becoming like the country I left. That's why I am running for Congress.

_It's time for the majority to speak up and defend our country from the radical left and keep the American Dream alive for our children_._
---

name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: Forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter,

The spring election is over and it’s time to get serious about November.
And here’s why:

President Biden and Donald Trump are tied in Wisconsin – that means we
need to work ten times as hard to spread the word, get out the vote, and
turn WI blue this fall.

We have new, fair maps that triple the number of competitive districts in
our state – that means we need to triple our resources and triple our
organizing efforts if we’re going to flip critical seats in the state
legislature.

Wisconsinites silenced by the WisGOP for over a decade will finally have
their voices heard – and we need to get them (and everyone else) fired up
for what’s ahead.

Everything comes down to November,
Peter. And with your help, we’re going to win
decisive victories up and down the ballot this fall.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240511-1?refcode=em20240511-1&amount=5&refcode2=678_587540_hR8uCU&akid=678%2E587540%2EhR8uCU ]Can you split $5 between WisDems and Leaders We Deserve
to help us make the early investments we need in organizing, mobilizing,
and GOTV heading forward into November? >>

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240511-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240511-1-678&refcode2=678_587540_hR8uCU&akid=678%2E587540%2EhR8uCU ]Donate $5 »

Because of your support, we’ve never slowed down our organizing efforts.
And we can’t afford to miss a single beat right now.

This is the election of our lifetime,
Peter, and victory in Wisconsin will come down
to a handful of votes per ward.

It’s on us to keep pushing, keep contributing, keep volunteering, and keep
showing up every day between now and the November election. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240511-1?refcode=em20240511-1&amount=5&refcode2=678_587540_hR8uCU&akid=678%2E587540%2EhR8uCU ]Will you
stand with WisDems and Leaders We Deserve by chipping in $5
today?

Forward!

Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair

clean_body: Peter, The spring election is over and it’s time to get serious about November. And here’s why: President Biden and Donald Trump are tied in Wisconsin – that means we need to work ten times as hard to spread the word, get out the vote, and turn WI blue this fall. We have new, fair maps that triple the number of competitive districts in our state – that means we need to triple our resources and triple our organizing efforts if we’re going to flip critical seats in the state legislature. Wisconsinites silenced by the WisGOP for over a decade will finally have their voices heard – and we need to get them (and everyone else) fired up for what’s ahead. Everything comes down to November, Peter. And with your help, we’re going to win decisive victories up and down the ballot this fall. [ ]Can you split $5 between WisDems and Leaders We Deserve to help us make the early investments we need in organizing, mobilizing, and GOTV heading forward into November? >> [ ]Donate $5 » Because of your support, we’ve never slowed down our organizing efforts. And we can’t afford to miss a single beat right now. This is the election of our lifetime, Peter, and victory in Wisconsin will come down to a handful of votes per ward. It’s on us to keep pushing, keep contributing, keep volunteering, and keep showing up every day between now and the November election. [ ]Will you stand with WisDems and Leaders We Deserve by chipping in $5 today? Forward! Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair

| | There’s no doubt you’ve heard about the anti-Israel protests happening on many well-known college campuses across the nation in recent weeks. While school administrators have acted slowly— _or in some cases not at all_ —these events have sparked much discussion and debate over what the role and responsibility of a university should be to its paying students. **_Friend, will you share your opinion with us?_** **_Should universities have an obligation to provide their students with a safe, distraction-free environment—even if it means shutting down disruptive protest encampments?_**
---

clean_body: Approve or Disapprove? | | | | | There’s no doubt you’ve heard about the anti-Israel protests happening on many well-known college campuses across the nation in recent weeks. While school administrators have acted slowly— or in some cases not at all —these events have sparked much discussion and debate over what the role and responsibility of a university should be to its paying students. Friend, will you share your opinion with us? Should universities have an obligation to provide their students with a safe, distraction-free environment—even if it means shutting down disruptive protest encampments? | | | | | | Please submit your response by 11:59 PM tonight—we hope to hear from you soon. Thank you! | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Can you take a moment to add your name and personally endorse our campaign today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
No one can take on the right-wing and fight back against extremist Republicans alone. That's something that will ONLY happen if we're all in this together.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)

Friends -
I'm writing this morning to ask a quick but very important question: **Can you add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign today?**
I'll explain more in just a moment, but if that's all you need to hear to sign on, please use this personal link:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/May-Endorse/personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may24-personal-endorse/?source=em240511-1-t1&refcode2=1127.791427.HXPM-1&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)
Let me start at the beginning.
When I launched my first campaign for Congress in 2018, I really didn't know what to expect.
I knew that I had the support of our friends, neighbors, and community in Minnesota, but to tell you the truth, it was a big step. One that raised a lot of questions.
Would we be able to raise enough money to compete? Would the right-wing and their dark money super PACs prove too much to handle? Would we be able to bring our progressive movement together in a way that could fend off the attacks and lies that were headed our way?
Nobody knew for sure — but one thing I DID know was that if we were going to succeed, I couldn't do it alone.
That I would need the support of a huge grassroots movement behind me. That taking on the wealthy and powerful special interests who want to see our agenda fail is something that can ONLY happen if we're all in this together.
Since then, your support and the support of thousands of progressives across Minnesota and the entire country is what has enabled us to run three successful campaigns for Congress — but our work is far from finished.
**That's why I'm reaching out to ask you to say you're with me today. It may seem like a small and simple action, but it's one that speaks volumes about our grassroots strength.**
So please:
**[Add your name today to say you endorse our people-powered campaign for Congress today. It's so important that we show we're all in this fight together.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may24-personal-endorse/?source=em240511-1-t1&refcode2=1127.791427.HXPM-1&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)
Please know that your support for this campaign is not taken for granted. Thank you so much for everything you do.
In solidarity,
Ilhan
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may24-personal-endorse/?source=em240511-1-t1&refcode2=1127.791427.HXPM-1&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1127_791427_HXPM-1&akid=1127%2E791427%2EHXPM-1)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I got a few minutes this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
The only reason I am here...
---
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=minutes)
---
| | Hey there —
I had an extra few minutes this morning so I wanted to share some thoughts with you. Here’s the truth: No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you.
People like me don’t often make it to Congress. I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and I joined the Marine Corps after graduating and went to Iraq. The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way.
As a kid, the support from my family. In combat, the support of my fellow Marines. In these campaigns, support from people like you.
But now I have a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and working to expand voting rights, protect abortion rights, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate. I need your help. So please: [** _Can you split a $20 contribution between my re-election campaign and No Dem Left Behind? This month has been tough on fundraising, and I need your help to get things back on track before it’s too late._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-az-split?refcode=minutes&amount=20)
---
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot.

Ruben

name: Byron Donalds, Co-Chairman
subject: Regarding Republican Ballot Harvesting:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’re fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat
As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we’re doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

| |

---
| | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=006acc65dbe043bfa596460b07dd6d66&_e=efYlAgUHyLMZOfK7JhERx_IYC1EsbhX7pTlVXER4z-4TYnBjhIOYxPU3NAVp7DlaiqoQwARlBSbOPGzkbBd7-SdLbEQ5bD0cXPcQ9ErQqTjCfmtZzsc7epUPaYg8f7LXu8OCGvPncuHOyDbxU6c5Puo-S1e2cww6cyol76eafeTQV4vXi6Hwbh0Q09BhE729AFkWgS6-2PYBcxgfHv4rVAyUL4i9cz-rDk0aU2sb56w2SzuhjaQARnbQkXfrBEOW6SIE3LfyixsMj0N-fvXxGHYAcHsWFRKtPoUYroEGhv3tKD6Yajdfb5shHlIiD9WIguOfL7kVja4padqWp6b0WYrjF_3ih0UcDgg3QcEos_JU5O0LDJbdk1DHhxkE3pxCNSarjemSnQMqAc3_Fq7X5b9LcgP_Cm6k8UGCwP7L-ao%3D "Byron Donalds")
---

Hey - my name is Byron Donalds.

As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

_**[A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen- so bear with me for a minute:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=006acc65dbe043bfa596460b07dd6d66&_e=efYlAgUHyLMZOfK7JhERx_IYC1EsbhX7pTlVXER4z-4TYnBjhIOYxPU3NAVp7DlaiqoQwARlBSbOPGzkbBd7-SdLbEQ5bD0cXPcQ9ErQqTjCfmtZzsc7epUPaYg8f7LXu8OCGvPncuHOyDbxU6c5Puo-S1e2cww6cyol76eafeTQV4vXi6Hwbh0Q09BhE729AFkWgS6-2PYBcxgfHv4rVAyUL4i9cz-rDk0aU2sb56w2SzuhjaQARnbQkXfrBEOWHEkYPqzr5Ut_CAkhhh-At9JSoIfO0pdXhLlbqQ4iYTc16Ff5D19GbeepcW81gH15d58FwbsQiN4zF-pyaauMlTaEHErqPeXl8PRQjxGANyiuT5WanewuuaSikwzc48VzywGryGML3zeUkv26WS3XZqFVT2rCw-3-C-PSMRn35rQ%3D "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:")**_

-> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them
-> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
-> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own
-> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them
-> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box
-> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat

These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts.

As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. **If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day.**

_But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive._ We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs.

And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding.

I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. _**[That's why I'm coming to you now - would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it's 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=006acc65dbe043bfa596460b07dd6d66&_e=efYlAgUHyLMZOfK7JhERx_IYC1EsbhX7pTlVXER4z-4TYnBjhIOYxPU3NAVp7DlaiqoQwARlBSbOPGzkbBd7-SdLbEQ5bD0cXPcQ9ErQqTjCfmtZzsc7epUPaYg8f7LXu8OCGvPncuHOyDbxU6c5Puo-S1e2cww6cyol76eafeTQV4vXi6Hwbh0Q09BhE729AFkWgS6-2PYBcxgfHv4rVAyUL4i9cz-rDk0aU2sb56w2SzuhjaQARnbQkXfrBEOWwlHvkTIUaExJXqVpIRnm-al8_4AUqYtLdM6IOhOI-DOKFhROVT2e_qG-3rc0rRn6-tAG9-PKJzFfD_Oj9-zO0woMGS5bhXOCnAhFXzvRQTDyMwlMADhfzLPPqe6ymHii09MDJ_oZWy2oZ4kAg8MGN3Yn__iq9xgIitxQdDhv00A%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our protests, calls, and petitions are working
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Important update, Peter: Since the
Israeli military began invading the refugee city of Rafah earlier this
week, President Biden has finally taken a stand against Netanyahu by
pausing a massive shipment of bombs from the U.S. to Israel.

This is a major step in the right direction and goes to show our protests,
calls, and petitions are working. But we need an immediate, permanent
ceasefire NOW to prevent further loss of innocent lives.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/petition_20240511_ceasefire/?source=em20240511-34733&akid=34733%2E1203867%2EJGQTRC ]Sign our petition urging President Biden to take the next step and do
whatever he can to broker a ceasefire in Gaza →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/petition_20240511_ceasefire/?source=em20240511-34733&akid=34733%2E1203867%2EJGQTRC ]Add Your Name

Peter,

Since the far-right Israeli government began its genocide and ethnic
cleansing of Palestinians in Gaza back in October, at least 34,000 people
have been killed, more than 78,00 have been injured, and over 1 million
have been displaced.

Throughout this military aggression, Israel told Palestinians to flee
south to Rafah. Now, this city of more than 1.4 million refugees is being
told to evacuate, but there is nowhere left to go: about 70% of homes in
Gaza have been destroyed, and northern Gaza is experiencing a full-blown
famine. For those who still have homes left standing in the north, Israel
is telling them they are not permitted to return.

So, where are over 1.4 million people — including 600,000 children —
supposed to go to survive?

The invasion of Rafah has already begun, with Israel dropping bombs and
starting its ground invasion of Gaza yesterday evening while many
Americans were once again distracted watching wealthy extravagance on
display at the Met Gala. The invasion began after Israel rejected a
proposed ceasefire and release of hostages.

This is a genocide funded by our taxpayer dollars, authorized by our
President and Congress. President Biden claimed to draw a red line if
Netanyahu invaded Rafah, but has yet to do anything to stop this.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/petition_20240511_ceasefire/?source=em20240511-34733&akid=34733%2E1203867%2EJGQTRC ]We must come together and tell Biden: No more speeches, no more lip
service — broker a ceasefire now and send Netanyahu to the Hague. Sign our
petition now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/petition_20240511_ceasefire/?source=em20240511-34733&akid=34733%2E1203867%2EJGQTRC ]Add Your Name

We will not sit idly by while our tax dollars are used to carry out
genocide and ethnic cleansing. Biden must take action NOW to save lives
and stop our government’s complicity in this horrific violence against
innocent people.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240511-34733-footer&t=1001&refcode2=34733_1203867_JGQTRC&akid=34733%2E1203867%2EJGQTRC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=34733%2E1203867%2EJGQTRC

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

There’s a joke I like to make around the office with the team: The only things that are certain in life are death, taxes... and Republicans who want to manipulate maps.
Jokes aside, after _The New York Times_ reported that the 2021 redistricting progress resulted in the fairest maps in 40 years, we couldn’t simply celebrate. We knew we had to be prepared for another barrage of vicious attempts from the GOP to turn back the progress and tilt the playing field in their favor.
**And that’s exactly what they’re doing — so we need to fight back.**[**Help us double-down and ensure we can continue to grow and expand on the progress we’ve made for fair maps by making a grassroots donation to the NDRC today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84749177/472509602/2035465197?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_mayfun_email_20240511-NDRC-Red-FairestMaps_A&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240511-NDRC-Red-FairestMaps_A&utm_campaign=mayfun&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3YTI1ZmQ5LWEwMGYtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dyIC-PAEJx4SL-3tqh8zi6RwkEH8ekiisKnL-WL2vwM=)

clean_body: | | = There’s a joke I like to make around the office with the team: The only things that are certain in life are death, taxes... and Republicans who want to manipulate maps. Jokes aside, after The New York Times reported that the 2021 redistricting progress resulted in the fairest maps in 40 years, we couldn’t simply celebrate. We knew we had to be prepared for another barrage of vicious attempts from the GOP to turn back the progress and tilt the playing field in their favor. And that’s exactly what they’re doing — so we need to fight back.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Getting to the position we’re at now sure wasn’t easy. But your support made it possible. Now, as we’re faced with another round of Republican attacks on our fair maps movement, we’re facing a critical moment. Will we choose to keep going full speed ahead, being ready to face whatever the next attack is? Or will we not have the resources to protect our progress from Republican map-manipulators? = Your investment in our work is greatly appreciated — and we couldn’t do it without you! Thank you, Biz John Bisognano President of the NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Janelle Bynum
subject: My race for Congress could determine the fate of the House Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the House Majority from the anti-abortion, anti-democracy Republican extremists – and we’re one of them.
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-bynum-split.yW2tk0&refcode=em240511-1-tt&t=1&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk)
Hi friend — The Long Run said I could reach out before the Oregon primary election on May 21 (just 10 days from today):
I’m a State Representative, small business owner, and mother of four, and **I’m running to unseat extreme Republican Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer in Oregon’s 5th Congressional District.**
I’ve defeated Lori Chavez-Deremer – _twice_ – before, and I’m the only one in this race prepared to do so again in November.
[**So please, with only 10 days left before Election Day, will you split $5 between The Long Run and my campaign today? Every single dollar goes a long way.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-bynum-split.yW2tk0&refcode=em240511-1-tt&t=2&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk)
Friend, here’s why this election matters:
→ OR-05 has been deemed a **pure TOSS UP** and called one of the most flippable seats in the entire country.
→ **Democrats only need to flip four seats** to take back the House Majority from the anti-abortion, anti-democracy Republican extremists – **and we’re one of them.**
→ **I’m the only candidate who has defeated Lori Chavez-Deremer twice,** and I know we’ll have what it takes to win next November.
That’s why I’m coming to you, personally, to ask for your support before our May 21 election. If Democrats are going to flip OR-05 and the House Majority blue in November, we have to get across the finish line in May.
[**Please, if you’re able, will you split $5 between The Long Run and my campaign to help me flip OR-05 blue, restore the Democratic House Majority, and deliver for working families across the country? Every single dollar goes a long way on a grassroots campaign like ours.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-bynum-split.yW2tk0&refcode=em240511-1-tt&t=3&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-bynum-split.yW2tk0&refcode=em240511-1-tt&t=4&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk)
Thank you so much. We can’t do this without you!
_Janelle_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=5299_196590_2KiRfk&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=5299%2E196590%2E2KiRfk)

Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Peter,

Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself.

You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry.

**My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support.**

I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, _**“Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.”**_

Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. **[We don't need a bought-and-paid-for Hollywood Senator representing American interests any longer.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1cde2de487394e1c9fc1680ba55ea202&_e=Zj28inECsj6a1vjR0G_wxML8JHmPv3uZiuszQscV2sVy-Rr5wsaa0unsMzrN3RTM1uHOH3GS8847IsaWzfKQuZDMvtWQLPZZ1524kAaKlvxAmxXnFEb0-dlt5QSFKy9hyq3udbny0S7P2s2xgngoZtEdK2LCkLASTCdqRZIhXwGcLuyh3on83LsmSFzQ3fQ4P-Bqmk4WWqD5NPDf8YY9-SV3rw0rj4Bkg1hzNqqOdJTtZfVBuE71nFFxlAz8SOYPyE84Q3SZZTX9RChynKH8aHsYA02Qe2SMHjCPu-NkT458933vpqCsghS1KiigfLSuIolESjk8vyRKluFDicpLH5mXx1suzdw6l4u4aT6llcBRATwxLJCBP-c4W9DpAyxYkSA08-VOrmgbjCuIXBAG8WvwT_9WBRib-tk6TNpO73g%3D)**

[**HELP ME DEFEAT CALIFORNIA'S FAVORITE SENATOR ->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1cde2de487394e1c9fc1680ba55ea202&_e=Zj28inECsj6a1vjR0G_wxML8JHmPv3uZiuszQscV2sVy-Rr5wsaa0unsMzrN3RTM1uHOH3GS8847IsaWzfKQuZDMvtWQLPZZ1524kAaKlvxAmxXnFEb0-dlt5QSFKy9hyq3udbny0S7P2s2xgngoZtEdK2LCkLASTCdqRZIhXwGcLuyh3on83LsmSFzQ3fQ4P-Bqmk4WWqD5NPDf8YY9-SV3rw0rj4Bkg1hzNqqOdJTtZfVBuE71nFFxlAz8SOYPyE84Q3SZZTX9RChynKH8aAAoju2D4b2fuDGFM8RdMMIWItFMU_cXzocd2NVACknPSvLXrOR7ga5tkNkhCTRGlezA9VKm91Js1KUljNR9gocOQUcrYL6kyj8qxP6nzVaPD3qqyGGvWsUqhcf5p7Ab5W_gyDoBmbF4ArI_4qjcCmA%3D)
**
Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite like Barbara Streisand, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? **

With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, _**there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next six months.**_

I appreciate your help with this matter.

clean_body: My opponent likes to talk about how out-of-state interests impact Montana, but the real issue is Tester himself. | Peter, Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself. You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry. My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support. I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, “Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.” Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite like Barbara Streisand, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next six months. I appreciate your help with this matter. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Since taking office, President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have made historic progress in passing gun safety legislation, capping prescription drug costs, protecting our democracy, expanding access to affordable health care and growing our economy.
But now, they're facing off against a twice-impeached former president who is facing 88 criminal charges and promising to be a "**_dictator_** " on day one if reelected. _And it's not looking good._
Right now, Donald Trump is _ahead_ of President Biden in the polls, and he and Mitch McConnell are raking in **_millions_** from dark-money megadonors.

Peter, Mike Braun is the Republican nominee to be Indiana’s next governor. Hoosiers deserve the full story of his time in the U.S. Senate. Braun cheered on the decision to overturn Roe v. **Last month, when I[tweeted](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84753038/472518413/-2097406845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM5M2Q3Ni1hNTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGxplbeVj0mJZNuOPQ5zTkmrceZWoL1pMo8-F6hwJYQ=&emci=8efa9fee-d60e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=49c93d76-a50f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=43566853) that Georgians rejected Trump in 2020 and we’ll do it again in 2024, I meant it. **

**_Let me break it down:_**

We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about jobs.
We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about health care.
We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about reproductive freedom.
We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about democracy.
We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about each other.

**_And you know what Trump cares about? Himself._** That’s why he’s using everything from the Electoral College to the media to the courts to Congress to the Proud Boys and other MAGA extremists to win this November. But he can’t win if we stick together.

[**_Trump’s sadly mistaken if he thinks he’s gonna win Georgia! But we need your help to defeat him again. Please rush what you can right now so we can keep Trump as far away from the White House as possible._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84753042/472518420/710125701?refcode=20240511.1_KO_5L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM5M2Q3Ni1hNTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGxplbeVj0mJZNuOPQ5zTkmrceZWoL1pMo8-F6hwJYQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I meant what I said | | | = Team, Kevin from GA Dems, here. Last month, when I that Georgians rejected Trump in 2020 and we’ll do it again in 2024, I meant it. Let me break it down: We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about jobs. We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about health care. We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about reproductive freedom. We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about democracy. We’ll defeat Trump again because voters care about each other. And you know what Trump cares about? Himself. That’s why he’s using everything from the Electoral College to the media to the courts to Congress to the Proud Boys and other MAGA extremists to win this November. But he can’t win if we stick together. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We got this, – Kevin Kevin Olasanoye Executive Director Democratic Party of Georgia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Friend, our election this November will be one of the most hotly contested races in the nation. That's why the national GOP and their dark money allies are pouring millions into our district. With so much at stake, we can't leave anything to chance. But it takes resources to build a grassroots campaign that can stand up to the special interests and win. We're reaching Ohioans where they are — online, in person, and over the phone. That means we need to hire more organizers, build out our voter registration and mobilization programs, and be ready for whatever comes our way. _**The best way to help power Marcy's fight for a fair economy, affordable healthcare, and real investments in our Heartland communities is by becoming a monthly supporter.**_ **[Give monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84753323/472519085/1037629634?recurring=true&refcode=240511_team_monthly&ms=240510_tk_koch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjA4ZmEwNC1hNjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AlRBaYZC6i8MivYd2-pB_a7Cuc-TBAwjAhblsir4a8w=)** Our monthly supporters help us plan, budget, and prepare for all of the twists and turns that come with such a close race. Friend, In the midst of the Israeli government’s genocide of the Palestinian people, the U.S. House of Representatives passed a bill that could criminalize protests criticizing Israel’s government.**Why are my colleagues and the mainstream media more outraged over these anti-genocide protests than they are about the more than 35,000 Palestinians killed in Gaza with U.S. backing?** Rather than listen to their constituents who are asking to divest from human rights violations, too many lawmakers at the state and federal level have asked universities to crack down on peaceful protests. **But there are courageous lawmakers in office who are demanding an end to this genocide and defending human rights, including our right to protest. They need our support.** While in office, **Zohran Kwame Mamdani** led a hunger strike outside the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire and sponsored the _Not On Our Dime Act_ to stop New York’s charities from funding Israeli settler violence. Instead of investing in violence, Zohran has won investments in better public transportation and much-needed debt relief for low-income and working people. In Delaware, the first Muslim state representative **Madinah Wilson-Anton** just secured unanimous passage of her resolution calling for a permanent ceasefire in the State House. And in Florida, **Angie Nixon** also introduced a ceasefire resolution, but faced demeaning attacks and bullying while trying to get her fellow legislators to see Palestinians’ humanity. None of them are backing down in saving lives. [**Despite attacks and attempts to vilify them, these state legislators are courageously leading the push for a permanent ceasefire. Can you split a donation between my, Angie, Madinah, and Zohran’s re-election campaigns, so we can stay in office demanding divestment from genocide and investments in our communities?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTUGJRDKCCgTgRlo6Awaomqkx2PPxPmJ6dKVHc6oFjLXwVQbJJSvE3qYziJGu8XoRStjZZSuEisMf4XhOW5mZa4zDvp9ZaWO7f4YF8A8Co59tdmUHEXSHG93Hh0jCZ10cvq430vGmIgyXptj0mxBdhqzFKCP6dv0o5PN1mGVD5gzhBL4HzDXAn31QSZs5zfX3sEXBO5uykiS5fhIXDQPpaWWCEM5eT3CqEHhJBsxC9jM84A-bt7yQAWFye8r3jqNJSHz6YnlV4FOGxXOZFTGptDcw_hlSzoszIYMOonDnuJfWRd7nvdPbqhoCxe4m3u3nKZcpDFHbxxNQhQZclSxOSG7Y9so5SSZaVydjuh0MUq5ysv3bdelAl8xkNKuZmYERJj8ce-yBmgbNiQRJy3eojH3ljvIGG93HSkh7tOr9iH4OSuMC67UT8n806kNE5bupWToPiWCDgu7HRpKvrbG78fShrDVQLF09qhTSfBn4zMWTiABxiBdr8uNLXPNFHXLyaXdBpJHPJqQNZheaYjLCsw/469/YMJ1LLKqQb6crDLEb6oIzQ/h1/h001.lyDiQcCjPUjliysWO104-TWBRRikvE6uTAXO3mDm95c) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Madinah Wilson-Anton, Angie Nixon, Zohran Mamdani, and Rashida Tlaib_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTUGJRDKCCgTgRlo6AwaomvZbOTYe4q0Tt0yXbN8Da-l4c8zEWYFKOHG30BYY4_MA9c5hZbuomKywzYlwGhJdxDuALj7TLMr7gxEgoVUcg1pGOEINf87bZVgzi9inF66FoqW6HKlkGyObSKczDi5ELPhhP3qtWIOLoRYQ3B0ZJhvR4_OY8JltBaSmUWqp1HcAz42W4abNQk61PzovHR5zV2N7ZDP8HXAEHuxKYH_GBh9eQWpAZFpjDOrTtAoT0ROcEBOpaqr9Srs3La6B3_9RYFbkYBcVGtZMiezZn2JOE8j-kl4wR2IK-G8wKEx9NA6u2Y_RssqcRn7geQyT5FeNYu2TIcvQ54Kh2RLB34qGQHymz2nijso5Y8JEhWCNDdta3DMSiCtMPZBQ2XeLUb8wcUZ7rtmvNT01AuF7Ixv9jnAwzb8RDBIC4vuzcXTE71CVWbH8l564YfAid5kdt-nSAZYLwdPnUWXyN2OKyFTbfF9vbrr4_b80qC4rDFr1h5cCkcQEekFtQv4mb3e-cyoyzLdLxvi5R-nvAxpj-_SRZaUAaT_XLoVMJsKa0nKwiLLP/469/YMJ1LLKqQb6crDLEb6oIzQ/h2/h001.sAwfsl3mRK_1B-jobHw0UNwC6ZfDddGJl1n330ExlXI)

clean_body: They’re courageously leading the push for a permanent ceasefire. | | | Friend, In the midst of the Israeli government’s genocide of the Palestinian people, the U.S. House of Representatives passed a bill that could criminalize protests criticizing Israel’s government.Why are my colleagues and the mainstream media more outraged over these anti-genocide protests than they are about the more than 35,000 Palestinians killed in Gaza with U.S. backing? Rather than listen to their constituents who are asking to divest from human rights violations, too many lawmakers at the state and federal level have asked universities to crack down on peaceful protests. But there are courageous lawmakers in office who are demanding an end to this genocide and defending human rights, including our right to protest. They need our support. While in office, Zohran Kwame Mamdani led a hunger strike outside the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire and sponsored the Not On Our Dime Act to stop New York’s charities from funding Israeli settler violence. Instead of investing in violence, Zohran has won investments in better public transportation and much-needed debt relief for low-income and working people. In Delaware, the first Muslim state representative Madinah Wilson-Anton just secured unanimous passage of her resolution calling for a permanent ceasefire in the State House. And in Florida, Angie Nixon also introduced a ceasefire resolution, but faced demeaning attacks and bullying while trying to get her fellow legislators to see Palestinians’ humanity. None of them are backing down in saving lives. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Madinah Wilson-Anton, Angie Nixon, Zohran Mamdani, and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | | Because these state lawmakers listen to their constituents and value their neighbors’ well-being, they’re leading calls for Palestinian freedom as well as championing progressive policies across a wide range of issues. In Florida, where a near-total abortion ban is in effect as of May 1, Angie Nixon is leading policies for reproductive justice, equitable healthcare, universal early childcare, and affordable housing. Angie Nixon has a background as a community organizer, as does Zohran Mamdani. Zohran helped low-income homeowners of color fight off eviction before his election, and he continues to fight for working-class New Yorkers in the state legislature. Madinah Wilson-Anton is fighting for economic and racial justice for all Delawareans, including affordable healthcare and housing, tenants’ rights, and worker power. Madinah and Angie are both trying to eliminate healthcare disparities and pushing for important changes to our prison-industrial complex. These are all bold legislators who understand that our communities need transformative changes in order to not only survive, but thrive. Thank you for continuing to support our movement to value all life, no matter faith or ethnicity or racial background. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, May 10, 2024 Subject: As the Israeli military’s assault intensifies, a new bill passed the U.S. House that could criminalize protesters To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, with ammunition and bombs paid for by our tax dollars, the Israeli apartheid regime began its long-telegraphed assault on Rafah in Gaza. Over 610,000 displaced children are trapped in Rafah, with nowhere else to go. As our government is not just complicit but is actively participating in the genocide of the Palestinian people, the U.S. House of Representatives has passed a bill that could criminalize protesters who criticize the Israeli government. Rather than listen to what the vast majority of their constituents are demanding, many lawmakers at the state and federal level have encouraged brutal crackdowns on peaceful anti-genocide protests— undermining our constitutional rights. In just the past few weeks, over 2,000 students and faculty have been arrested, and many have been hospitalized from police forces’ rubber bullets and beatings. We need more elected leaders who defend our rights and who clearly denounce war crimes. I want to lift up these three brave elected officials who are leading the call for a permanent ceasefire: Angie Nixon, State Representative FL House District 13 Madinah Wilson-Anton, State Representative DE House District 26 Zohran Kwame Mamdani, Assembly Member NY Assembly District 36 When in college, Zohran and Madinah were involved in Students for Justice in Palestine, and they recently led a hunger strike for a ceasefire outside the White House. I joined them at that hunger strike. Here’s a photo of me next to Zohran: And here’s a photo of me standing near Madinah, who’s wearing a red hijab: The first Muslim state representative in Delaware, Madinah just secured unanimous passage of her resolution calling for a permanent ceasefire in the State House. Madinah recently led a state Muslim Capitol Day and a Muslim Advocacy Day in Washington, DC, where constituents asked Delaware’s Congressional Representative “to oppose all future military funding to Israel & to stand with student protestors who are peacefully calling for a #CeasefireNow.” When Angie Nixon introduced a ceasefire resolution in Florida’s legislature, most of her colleagues stood up and physically turned their backs on her. She tried to get her fellow legislators to see Palestinians’ humanity, asking how many dead Palestinians would be enough in order to support a ceasefire. Another legislator shouted back: “all of them.” In this hostile environment of dehumanization, Angie continues to work to ensure our communities can thrive and flourish. A Black woman in a state with a near-total abortion ban (in effect as of May 1), Angie is leading policies for reproductive justice, equitable healthcare, universal early childcare, and affordable housing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Madinah Wilson-Anton, Angie Nixon, Zohran Mamdani, and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Thank you for continuing to value all life, no matter ethnicity or faith or racial background. Together, we can win the transformative changes our communities need. I've got to say I was a little embarrassed when I gave an update to our generous donor that there were only 53 people who accepted his generous 1500% match.

Ever since I broke the news to my supporters, I've been shaking in my boots because this fundraising push was supposed to obliterate every fundraising worry this campaign's had for months, and contributions have just totally undermined our expectations.

**I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers, and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections.**

name: The Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Del. Sewell's May 11th Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/New%20Sewell%20Delegate%20Logo%20.png]
April 30th Newsletter
Dear neighbors,
I hope you are enjoying the warm, if not somewhat tropical weather in the last few days! In previous newsletters I’ve provided legislative issues of the week and bill summaries, this week I will introduce you to another aspect of my responsibilities as your Delegate, Board and Commissions. I serve on six boards and commissions that coincide with my term in the General Assembly. These boards and commissions meet between once a month and once every two to six months depending on their governance structure and constitutional mandate. Below is a brief summary of the six boards and commissions on which I serve.
Virginia Addiction and Recovery Council : Formerly known as the Substance Abuse Services Council, the VARC is established in the Code of Virginia [§2.2-2696] to advise the Governor, the General Assembly and the Board of the Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Services (DBHDS) on matters pertaining to substance abuse. Its members, appointed by the governor, are representatives of state agencies, senators, delegates and representatives of provider agencies and advocacy organizations. The Code requires DBHDS to provide staff and funding to support the operation of the council. You can learn more about the council here [https://dbhds.virginia.gov/about-dbhds/boards-councils/sasc/] .
Virginia Housing Commission: The Virginia Housing Commission (VHC) exists to study and provide legislative solutions to ensure the availability of safe, sound and affordable housing in Virginia. The Commission also studies and makes recommendations concerning real property, community development, land-use, and other housing-related issues. The Commission is a standing Commission composed of legislative members as well as Governor Appointees. The Commission generally meets as a body four times per year and does not meet during the Legislative Session. Workgroups, whose membership is formed with appointed stakeholders, offer recommendations on proposed legislation for consideration to the full Commission. You can learn more about the commission here [https://vhc.virginia.gov/] .
VA Criminal Justice Services Board: The 32 member Criminal Justice Services Board is the Virginia Department of Criminal Justice Services’ policy board. It has representation from all aspects of the criminal justice system on both state and local levels of government, as well as representatives of the private security industry, the public-at-large and the General Assembly. The Board is the approving authority for the regulations the Department promulgates in accord with the Administrative Process Act and approves most of the grants the Department awards to localities, state agencies and private non-profit organizations. You can learn more about the board here [https://www.dcjs.virginia.gov/about-dcjs/boards-committees/criminal-justice-services-board] .
The Potomac and Rappahannock Transportation Commission : The Potomac and Rappahannock Transportation Commission (PRTC) is a multi-jurisdictional agency representing Prince William, Stafford and Spotsylvania Counties and the Cities of Manassas, Manassas Park and Fredericksburg. PRTC provides commuter bus service along the I-95 and I-66 corridors to points north (OmniRide & Metro Direct), and local bus services in Prince William County and the cities of Manassas and Manassas Park (OmniLink & Cross County Connector). 17 commissioners comprise the PRTC Board of Commissioners. 13 are locally elected officials from its five member jurisdictions: City of Fredericksburg (1), City of Manassas (1), City of Manassas Park (1), Prince William County (6), Stafford County (2), and Spotsylvania County (2). Three of the commissioners are appointed from the General Assembly (one Senator and two Delegates). Learn more about OmniRide here [https://omniride.com/] and about the PRTC here [https://www.spotsylvania.va.us/1303/Potomac-and-Rappahannock-Transportation-] .
Southwest Virginia Higher Education Center Board of Trustees: The Southwest Virginia Higher Education Center (HEC), located in Abingdon, Virginia, is the first multi-college and university institution of higher education in the Commonwealth. Established as a State Agency in 1991, the Higher Education Center partners with public and private colleges and universities to provide degree programs, certificates, and professional development courses. HEC is governed by a Board of Trustees that includes six members of the Virginia General Assembly; eight university presidents; two Agency Heads, and seven citizen members appointed by the Governor. Learn more about the HEC here [https://www.swcenter.edu/about-us/] .
The Opioid Abatement Authority: The Opioid Abatement Authority (OAA) is an independent body, the purpose of which is to abate and remediate the opioid epidemic in the Commonwealth through financial support from the Fund, in the form of grants, donations, or other assistance, for efforts to treat, prevent, and reduce opioid use disorder and the misuse of opioids in the Commonwealth. The OAA is governed by an 11 member board of elected officials and professionals from mental health care, public safety, health and human services, and government. Learn more about the OAA here [https://www.oaa.virginia.gov/about/who-we-are/] .
State and Local News
General Assembly updates relationships with federal Virginia Indian tribes [https://www.vpm.org/news/2024-04-25/virginia-indian-tribes-state-federal-recognition-sovereign-nations-law] | VPM
Two bills passed by the General Assembly this year will affect the commonwealth’s relationship with Native American tribes, after yearslong policy delays.
General Assembly budget leaders, Youngkin reach compromise [https://richmond.com/news/state-regional/government-politics/youngkin-torian-general-assembly-budget-special-session/article_80a31360-0e3c-11ef-8be9-4b6ebf7a3927.html#:~:text=General%20Assembly%20budget%20leaders%20and,teachers%20%E2%80%94%20without%20raising%20taxes%20and] | Richmond-Times Dispatch
General Assembly budget leaders and Gov. Glenn Youngkin have reached a compromise on the next two-year state budget that would use an additional $525 million in state revenues to pay for Democratic spending priorities.
Virginia budget leaders reach compromise with governor on state spending plan [https://apnews.com/article/budget-lawmakers-glenn-youngkin-virginia-2df36aa8ac4cb0dba0a12e63a483d872] | Associated Press
Virginia budget negotiators and Gov. Glenn Youngkin have reached a compromise on the next two-year state spending plan that would include 3% raises for state employees and teachers while not raising taxes and risking a potential veto by Youngkin.
Virginia budget leaders reach compromise with governor on state spending plan [https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2024/05/10/budget-lawmakers-glenn-youngkin-virginia/e3f2705a-0efa-11ef-ae0a-a6870885518d_story.html?ref=upstract.com] | Washington Post
Virginia budget negotiators and Gov. Glenn Youngkin have reached a compromise on the next two-year state spending plan.
Virginia budget negotiators and Gov. Glenn Youngkin have reached a compromise on the next two-year state spending plan [https://www.wric.com/news/politics/capitol-connection/youngkin-virginia-lawmakers-hope-to-have-budget-deal-for-special-session/] | ABC News
Youngkin and a key budget leader say talks are promising, but more needs to be done for a compromise.\
Community Events
May 18 - Boardwalk Twilight Hike [https://www.pwcva.gov/events/boardwalk-twilight-hike] | Join PWC park naturalists for a fun evening that brings you up close and personal with some of the wetlands best known inhabitants.
May 23 - Chinn Park Job Fair [https://www.pwcva.gov/events/chinn-park-job-fair-chinn-park] | Meet with local agencies, businesses, and organizations to learn about career opportunities. This program will be held outdoors, weather permitting.
May 26 - Bristoe Station Battlefield Heritage Park Tours [https://www.pwcva.gov/events/bristoe-station-battlefield-heritage-park-tours-5] | Bristoe Station Battlefield staff and volunteers will provide guided tours of this hallowed ground that contains camps, cemeteries and battlefields.
May 29 - Strategic Plan Resident Focus Group (Occoquan District) [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/strategic-plan-resident-focus-group-occoquan-district-tickets-895507305457] | Gather to discuss and create a strategic plan that focuses on the needs and priorities of residents in Prince William County!
June 8 - Resolve & Resolution: Marking the 250th Anniversary of the Prince William County Resolves Event [https://www.pwcva.gov/events/resolve-resolution-marking-250th-anniversary-prince-william-county-resolves-event] | Commemorate the PWC protest of the British "Intolerable Acts" in 1774 by attending a free family-friendly program including an immersive play reenacting the historic debate, Children's activities, Puppet shows and more.
June 19 - Juneteenth at Lucasville [https://www.pwcva.gov/events/juneteenth-lucasville-0] | Join Lucasville in honor of Juneteenth to learn about the celebration marking the emancipation of enslaved African Americans throughout the South.
June 28 - 8th Annual Dennis McCabe First Tee Shamble [https://firstteeprincewilliamcounty.org/] | Join First Tee for their annual benefit shamble to raise money to support their efforts to provide life skills to the youth of the Prince William community through golf.
State and Community Info & Resources
Tell Metro About Your Bus Needs: Since the fall of 2022, Metro has been working to engage thousands of people about the future vision and plans for bus service through the Better Bus Network Redesign [https://www.wmata.com/initiatives/plans/Better-Bus/about-the-project.cfm] . Last spring, they talked with over 20,000 people and received over 8,000 comments on a Visionary Network for the future bus network in the region. Learn more about the network redesign and how you can provide feedback here [https://www.wmata.com/initiatives/plans/Better-Bus/about-the-project.cfm] .
OmniRide and the PRTC: You might have taken an OmniRide bus before, but did you know that OmniRide is the operating name for the mobility services offered by the Potomac and Rappahannock Transportation Commission (PRTC)? The PRTC is a multi-jurisdictional agency representing Prince William, Stafford and Spotsylvania Counties and the Cities of Manassas, Manassas Park and Fredericksburg. OmniRide’s goal is to provide safe, reliable and flexible transportation options while helping to reduce congestion and pollution in one of the region's fastest growing areas. In FY 2023, OmniRide had more than 150 buses in its active fleet and made more than 1.5 million passenger trips. Learn more about OmniRide here [https://omniride.com/about/] .
Homeless Services Division and the Prince William Area Continuum of Care: Are you or someone you know struggling with homelessness or housing instability? The Prince William Homeless Services Division is the local agency who leads the charge of providing resources and connections to housing to anyone in our county struggling to make ends meet. The CoC is composed of local and county government, non-profit providers, faith-based organizations, outreach organizations, and citizens at large. The CoC uses a Coordinated Entry System (CES) to assess the needs of households seeking assistance and quickly connect them to the most appropriate resource for their circumstances. Contact the Coordinated Entry System (703) 792-3366 (TTY: 711). Click here [https://www.pwcva.gov/department/social-services/homeless-services] for more information about CES.
Stay In Touch
On Monday, legislators will reconvene in Richmond for a special session to approve the compromise budget which legislators and the governor have agreed to. This Saturday at 11am, you should be able to view the budget on the House Appropriations Committee website here [https://budget.lis.virginia.gov/amendments/2024/1/] .
Thanks again for reading our weekly update and staying in touch with our office. If there is anything we can help you with, don’t hesitate to call our office at 703-261-4787 or send an email to DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov [DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov] .
In service,
Briana Sewell
Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell.
Friends of Briana Sewell
PO Box 1849
Woodbridge, VA 22195
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/BDPKPY_4S0izjMklQV7G1w2?unsubscribedata=nGq51d8M6ZvrM7wiqNFo0k1YpGZPxZWBJB81vs6srZfDeNLKwXAlM%2Bo7FuiexT7hVDzKx0swNHsDW5B4wfeaBP5umaQ3qFgvpcZAp1NSNxoZygT9Lbqh7SrZY2LdSptsR9dXqlLHWs50grOE8SHTRuyKKY0aG5hFu2lgvK5cJAQvOM6sqovPTWeEoL3sdRg11qFdBAEY281Clnu14mk0uu7NXTxV1mIGJW3fk5XyEruuRBiIbb6%2BG5GOlLpBni7YbAlJlvCiZKO10lXmOLsXn4yeLrAWruIfiokwSy8ZY1fQYqiJI9Vi1DNA4PirwiAx2qjjk1qR2NUsPcOO7B%2F2A4zu5kJ%2Fw8Eywsja%2FXPl%2F%2Byj3GWqHh%2B7zaS9OERV9YGNRr8XG%2BVUedz8GuY0j1R%2FTXFubrrbJc1WR%2BpMDmxU%2BVgXC7bH7C0gf8c6u73N%2Fh4n .

name: Michael B. Moore
subject: this next month means everything to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael B
body:
Every dollar we raise could be the difference between winning and losing this fight. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. body:
As we prepare to honor the moms (and the mother figures) in our lives tomorrow, I wanted to share a special note to appreciate and celebrate two incredible moms: my mom and my wife of 18 years, Stephanie. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84756058/472525936/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmMTdhYWEtYTgwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pTxF4VDtatq0KM9dfSLLM-g-426YWs4nYP3fqZvXP8o=)
---
Peter, As we prepare to honor the moms (and the mother figures) in our lives tomorrow, I wanted to share a special note to appreciate and celebrate two incredible moms: my mom and my wife of 18 years, Stephanie. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84756059/472525938/695535462?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmMTdhYWEtYTgwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pTxF4VDtatq0KM9dfSLLM-g-426YWs4nYP3fqZvXP8o=) When I was born, my mother was a very recent immigrant to America. As I grew up in our small, upstairs apartment, she taught me so much about hard work and family by the force of her example. When my brother and I were still young, she went back to school at our local community college with basic English classes. And, while taking care of her family, she kept on working and learning for years until she ended up getting her Ph.d. as a child and family psychologist. No one has ever believed in me more than she has and seeing her great relationship with Ben and Belle is one of the joys of my life. I know it may sound cheesy, but Ben and Belle couldn’t be more fortunate to have as amazing a mom as my wife, Stephanie. In the 23 years since we met, and 18 years we’ve been married, she’s been my rock and biggest cheerleader. I couldn’t be more grateful for her steadfast support through the ups and downs of life. Being the spouse of a candidate for Congress is, in many ways, harder than being the candidate. But she’s someone who believes in service. As a lawyer, she helped fight Jan Brewer’s racist SB1070 law in the U.S. Supreme Court and stepped away from her career in the private sector to serve as newly-elected Maricopa County Sheriff Paul Penzone’s chief of staff as they cleaned things up after Joe Arpaio. She knows our democracy and our planet are on the line, and someone must step up and fight for a better future not just for our kids, but for your kids, and all Arizonans. I want to make sure she has a wonderful Mother’s Day full of pampering and celebration, so I’m making a promise no of campaign emails and no checking our fundraising progress tomorrow. **I made that promise hoping that if I asked for your support today, this team would help keep up our momentum over the weekend. So what do you say, Peter?** [Before you log off for Mother’s Day weekend, will you chip in a few bucks to help fuel our campaign to flip AZ-01? Any amount makes a difference in our grassroots campaign and is much appreciated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84756060/472525965/695535462?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmMTdhYWEtYTgwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pTxF4VDtatq0KM9dfSLLM-g-426YWs4nYP3fqZvXP8o=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84756061/472525966/695535462?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmMTdhYWEtYTgwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pTxF4VDtatq0KM9dfSLLM-g-426YWs4nYP3fqZvXP8o=)
