clean_body: As we prepare to honor the moms (and the mother figures) in our lives tomorrow, I wanted to share a special note to appreciate and celebrate two incredible moms: my mom and my wife of 18 years, Stephanie. | = Peter, As we prepare to honor the moms (and the mother figures) in our lives tomorrow, I wanted to share a special note to appreciate and celebrate two incredible moms: my mom and my wife of 18 years, Stephanie. = When I was born, my mother was a very recent immigrant to America. As I grew up in our small, upstairs apartment, she taught me so much about hard work and family by the force of her example. When my brother and I were still young, she went back to school at our local community college with basic English classes. And, while taking care of her family, she kept on working and learning for years until she ended up getting her Ph.d. as a child and family psychologist. No one has ever believed in me more than she has and seeing her great relationship with Ben and Belle is one of the joys of my life. I know it may sound cheesy, but Ben and Belle couldn’t be more fortunate to have as amazing a mom as my wife, Stephanie. In the 23 years since we met, and 18 years we’ve been married, she’s been my rock and biggest cheerleader. I couldn’t be more grateful for her steadfast support through the ups and downs of life. Being the spouse of a candidate for Congress is, in many ways, harder than being the candidate. But she’s someone who believes in service. As a lawyer, she helped fight Jan Brewer’s racist SB1070 law in the U.S. Supreme Court and stepped away from her career in the private sector to serve as newly-elected Maricopa County Sheriff Paul Penzone’s chief of staff as they cleaned things up after Joe Arpaio. She knows our democracy and our planet are on the line, and someone must step up and fight for a better future not just for our kids, but for your kids, and all Arizonans. I want to make sure she has a wonderful Mother’s Day full of pampering and celebration, so I’m making a promise no of campaign emails and no checking our fundraising progress tomorrow. I made that promise hoping that if I asked for your support today, this team would help keep up our momentum over the weekend. So what do you say, Peter? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you and happy Mother’s Day to all the wonderful moms in our community! Andrei Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I strongly endorse Kari Lake for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
She is tougher than a boiled owl

|
---
Friend,

The current situation in our country is nothing to write home about. Taking back the US Senate in 2024 will be as difficult as putting socks on a rooster, but together, we can turn the tide.

**I just endorsed Kari Lake for Senate in Arizona, and here's why:**

**_"As a mother, Kari understands the challenges facing Arizona families, and she will fight to secure our border, cut costs for hardworking Americans, and revive the American Dream. Kari's dedication to putting America first and fierce determination to stand against Chuck Schumer's radical agenda makes her our best choice to represent Arizona in the Senate. I urge all Arizonans to support Kari Lake and our shared vision for a stronger, more prosperous future for our nation."_**
[ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f17cf090fde94e1c96bc5cb4964e7845&_e=wyPx-pAjEotDbRY70zkfNxvR1s4RUmVapmyBT0-C_lEmDeg6-xa7XLLr3qHSk_Pt0dP21qQKE_ODoWvLN9A5vn4lhdTiVAkodO6lbffvEc5IqU10MhWlkXEhekzyjYEg79KDNAB0vB0DqLzwO1-8BJS5VEe-5pPFWAknOlq6KFNhWlBEijtvzvbZiLF8_6FGqLpHtbalLYqD8FCNHlRIWm5ig0RZO4PDDH5yYKFNuc7Mk_EbQWnps9qlL0Oc1bf0yyQeyvM_1JvFYWWkqBTjJJGfvvhCJvoet79wuywd6iCpjV7ISIB1-W20D7VroA_WClweg995Wd4RqIKQa1ugKoVjZPx1kxSNCNZFKJJpcRDDOEwHT9imCW-O6DQh18zYjSHiHupJMHIMxIKE0OjZlQ%3D%3D)
Kari is tougher than a boiled owl and is the only person in the race who will fight tooth and nail for the American people.

Flipping Arizona gives us a real shot at stopping the loony policies coming out of the US Senate under the Socialist leadership of Chuck Schumer.

**[Will you join me in endorsing Kari Lake for Senate?
](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f17cf090fde94e1c96bc5cb4964e7845&_e=wyPx-pAjEotDbRY70zkfNxvR1s4RUmVapmyBT0-C_lEmDeg6-xa7XLLr3qHSk_Pt0dP21qQKE_ODoWvLN9A5vn4lhdTiVAkodO6lbffvEc5IqU10MhWlkXEhekzyjYEg79KDNAB0vB0DqLzwO1-8BJS5VEe-5pPFWAknOlq6KFNhWlBEijtvzvbZiLF8_6FG2QjWb7Pb07hNx51d5pqqB2GuiR-dNEHZr7ChK12vBhN9qX7wNzgev0MX7Eeeubhg-9FYGY8qzkC8xQVHXgu_B_dMS_cZ_7UqxXTR2fGXbGSkdnWU2CIqaCO8mHeyxv-0FBTNxJhEHq-ONQXCufGtgIQJDeX-LkxaX3qdpMjK0U9MYwwK_UnC29WaKGGpQrSk)**
| [**ENDORSE KARI LAKE** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f17cf090fde94e1c96bc5cb4964e7845&_e=wyPx-pAjEotDbRY70zkfNxvR1s4RUmVapmyBT0-C_lEmDeg6-xa7XLLr3qHSk_Pt0dP21qQKE_ODoWvLN9A5vn4lhdTiVAkodO6lbffvEc5IqU10MhWlkXEhekzyjYEg79KDNAB0vB0DqLzwO1-8BJS5VEe-5pPFWAknOlq6KFNhWlBEijtvzvbZiLF8_6FGqLpHtbalLYqD8FCNHlRIWm5ig0RZO4PDDH5yYKFNuc7Mk_EbQWnps9qlL0Oc1bf0pPngaHkne1ohYwjvO7We-r7TFrcqBIh8rK15qthJxbXIrTx_wjacR9Ln7H8A2gmOegu6yFGc-hNLbkW2xqm1jcGmzsZFQkvOAartGHXaTUGUN-EY9V4XgFtLcciL-mR88EAUZDJuKeT6A73NNjEaCg%3D%3D)
---

We are up against pink-haired, kale-sniffing, Kombucha-drinking wokers, which is why we need people like Kari in the Senate to fight back.

Like myself, Kari is an honest voice for the American people. She wants to see the Southern Border secure, America thriving, and our god given rights protected. One thing is for sure – Kari is a fighter.

**[Now is the time to join the action and help me Take Back the Senate by endorsing Kari Lake.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f17cf090fde94e1c96bc5cb4964e7845&_e=wyPx-pAjEotDbRY70zkfNxvR1s4RUmVapmyBT0-C_lEmDeg6-xa7XLLr3qHSk_Pt0dP21qQKE_ODoWvLN9A5vn4lhdTiVAkodO6lbffvEc5IqU10MhWlkXEhekzyjYEg79KDNAB0vB0DqLzwO1-8BJS5VEe-5pPFWAknOlq6KFNhWlBEijtvzvbZiLF8_6FG2QjWb7Pb07hNx51d5pqqB2GuiR-dNEHZr7ChK12vBhOxVJXHySpWt0vJs2BwT1lwRpurJ3DCJIWi7C2s9ZpuWR_16b3nj60Wm3bDPUt9BTDPnJVeUuML6xi98N0tMKMaId1Ue_9nssWc6H5DjgZdIBmixdQyTH6dbX8DgSdT2Q5NgSBXBaASHMM2oPaKWvzm)**

You joining me today would make me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

Thank you,

Senator Kennedy

Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Tougher than a $2 steak.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
I am proud to endorse Kari Lake for Senate!I am proud to endorse Kari Lake for Senate!

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=71c602be2407459393c805ece1675b0d&_e=CJt5JyFcwo6vHVeyOxzH1XRz0IvUs21R0qQ5dPjlOoFDDxyDtasfQi4TWoRyjQZSNIOWKT6PcxXI7fHtTtNeyL3HnBs7XUFt3jINjCNHVIZqAKBqr5rkmcnBMS677dMp2AvVbfrUIwXRkQSp-A0FsynF439Z_KNu-yzibLmfBOpmMYbk3Ju_IAEhu7zA3q9lMxPIwTgNhdRIs-a5Ju23jGWssFCMsyJSmHFXjFCes3V5eAcPLtQNP6N3xqadhUG7C40xPEedO6jeaAxGIYi_CLfZcpthOkAXWrq0FOHPOcOfWWiT6QzuPJnKb5qJBwOXLG3rf80xCgCWPMpdX3ZLGhE2uKt_QVUl-qTLxa-Dq2h6nt3-pqXbKBV-S1ma11b2z1-O5XzNhhU80GvwjeJ7sw%3D%3D)

Friend,

You know, it has gotten awfully lonely here in Washington, being one of the few people who freely speak their mind.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Kevin McCarthy Targets Conservative Leader
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by House Freedom Fund
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWKN9ojWMN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWKN9ojWMN

Fellow
Conservative:

If you're
tired of spineless Republicans selling out our country, then read
this email carefully.

Former
House Speaker Kevin McCarthy and his Establishment allies are
dumping millions of dollars into a congressional race in Virginia
to defeat conservative Congressman Bob Good, the chairman of the
House Freedom Caucus.

They
aren't spending the money to defeat a liberal Democrat. No! They
are targeting a conservative warrior in a Republican primary
election.

WHY?

Because
Kevin McCarthy and his allies want to punish conservatives like
Bob Good for ousting him as Speaker and standing up for our
freedoms, and most importantly, they want to discourage other
conservatives from fighting for us in the future.

Please
stand with Bob Good by making an urgent contribution to his
campaign now.

There is
no time to waste. We need every conservative who reads this to
take immediate action. The Republican primary election in
Virginia is on June 18, and early voting has already begun!!

U.S.
Congressman Bob Good (R-VA)

If we
don't lock arms and stand with Bob Good and the House Freedom
Caucus in this race, Kevin McCarthy and his cronies will get
their way - they will defeat a conservative warrior who has
fought the Swamp and discourage other leaders from fighting for
our values, too.

Take
action now and send the RINOs a message!

And if
the targeting of a strong conservative wasn't bad enough,
consider the state legislator they are propping up to challenge
Bob Good in the Republican primary.

John
McGuire is a true RINO who will stab us in the back faster than
you can say, Kevin McCarthy.

❌ John
McGuire voted to give taxpayer-funded college tuition assistance
to illegal immigrants.

❌ John
McGuire said that our country was too lenient when it comes to
gun regulations, and he even spoke at an anti-gun rally.

❌ John
McGuire said he doesn't consider himself a Republican or a
Democrat and has repeatedly praised Democrats like Ralph Northam,
Nancy Pelosi, and Barack Obama.

You can
see why Kevin McCarthy and his allies want this fraud Republican
in Congress.

Please
take action and donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or more to Bob Good's
campaign.

House
Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of
your contribution directly to his campaign. He's up against
millions in outside spending, so he needs every dollar you can
give.

This
congressional race in Virginia has national implications that
will impact all Americans. Please don't sit this one out. The
House Freedom Caucus and conservatives need your help now.

Thank you
for considering this urgent request and doing so much to help
fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray
Yonkura
Executive
Director
House
Freedom Fund

SUPPORT
THE FREEDOM CAUCUS

The House
Freedom Fund is the only political group in America that is
exclusively dedicated to defending and expanding the House
Freedom Caucus. Please support our conservative mission by making
a one-time or recurring donation today!

DONATE

House
Freedom Fund
300
Independence Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

House
Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action
committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S.
House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are
dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who
support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for
all Americans.

Paid for
by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

Former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy and his Establishment allies are dumping millions of dollars into a congressional race in Virginia to defeat conservative Congressman Bob Good, the chairman of the House Freedom Caucus. They aren't spending the money to defeat a liberal Democrat. No! They are targeting a conservative warrior in a Republican primary election. WHY? Because Kevin McCarthy and his allies want to punish conservatives like Bob Good for ousting him as Speaker and standing up for our freedoms, and most importantly, they want to discourage other conservatives from fighting for us in the future. Please stand with Bob Good by making an urgent contribution to his campaign now. There is no time to waste. We need every conservative who reads this to take immediate action. The Republican primary election in Virginia is on June 18, and early voting has already begun!! U.S. Congressman Bob Good (R-VA) If we don't lock arms and stand with Bob Good and the House Freedom Caucus in this race, Kevin McCarthy and his cronies will get their way - they will defeat a conservative warrior who has fought the Swamp and discourage other leaders from fighting for our values, too. Take action now and send the RINOs a message! And if the targeting of a strong conservative wasn't bad enough, consider the state legislator they are propping up to challenge Bob Good in the Republican primary. John McGuire is a true RINO who will stab us in the back faster than you can say, Kevin McCarthy. ❌ John McGuire voted to give taxpayer-funded college tuition assistance to illegal immigrants. ❌ John McGuire said that our country was too lenient when it comes to gun regulations, and he even spoke at an anti-gun rally. ❌ John McGuire said he doesn't consider himself a Republican or a Democrat and has repeatedly praised Democrats like Ralph Northam, Nancy Pelosi, and Barack Obama. You can see why Kevin McCarthy and his allies want this fraud Republican in Congress. Please take action and donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or more to Bob Good's campaign. House Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. He's up against millions in outside spending, so he needs every dollar you can give. This congressional race in Virginia has national implications that will impact all Americans. Please don't sit this one out. The House Freedom Caucus and conservatives need your help now. Thank you for considering this urgent request and doing so much to help fight for America's future. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We’re trying something new
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Powered by People volunteers are registering voters at farmers markets,
college campuses, even at their front doors — anywhere they can find
eligible, unregistered Democrats.

That’s how we registered Chloe, who told us she’ll be casting a ballot for
the very first time this year.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240511.t4Q0xJ&refcode=ema20240511-239580&t=1001&akid=239580%2E444211%2EE2bNJ8 ][IMG]

In addition to registering voters like Chloe, we’re also finding ways to
stay in touch with them throughout the election year. This personal
relationship between the volunteer and the new voter allows us to help
them navigate Texas’ tough voting laws and ensure that they are much more
likely to cast a ballot in November.

Why are we doing this?

There were 2.7 million registered, likely Democrats who didn’t vote in
2020. Imagine if they’d had personal connections with volunteers who
checked in on them to ask if they had any questions about the election, to
remind them about the importance of voting, and to help them find their
polling place.

I think we’re past the point where impersonal broadcast text messages
(“Dear Voter, make sure you vote today!”) are effective. Personal,
human-to-human contact with newly registered voters is the kind of
innovation we need to win elections in the most voter-suppressed state in
the country.

While I’m confident this is the right step for us to take, it’s going to
be tough to do this statewide at scale. It requires a significant
investment in the supporting technology, volunteer recruitment, training,
and staff. And it will take a lot of volunteers a lot of time in the field
to pull this off. But if we’re successful, it could produce the margin of
victory that we need to win big, important elections in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240511.t4Q0xJ&refcode=ema20240511-239580&t=1002&akid=239580%2E444211%2EE2bNJ8 ]I hope you’ll support this work with a donation today. Your
contribution will help us register more voters and keep in touch with them
to ensure they turn out in November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240511.t4Q0xJ&refcode=ema20240511-239580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=239580%2E444211%2EE2bNJ8 ]DONATE $3

Thank you for investing in innovation and victory.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=239580%2E444211%2EE2bNJ8

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Mark R
subject: 🎙️ ICYMI - ridiculous demands and bad chicken
body:
Here's what happened on No Doubt About It | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d34dfdc89f&e=567664f14c)

Happy Saturday friends - In case you missed it, this week's episode of [**The No Doubt About It Podcast with Krysty and Mark Ronchetti**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=234a661f1c&e=567664f14c) is a must-listen! We've got a lineup packed with eye-opening discussions and entertaining debates that you won't want to miss
**Food Expiration Dates Debate:** Are you someone who rolls the dice with expiration dates? Join Krysty and Mark as they go head-to-head in a lively debate about the reliability of food expiration dates. Plus, discover what's really wrong with the chicken we're buying from stores!
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5f77741ede&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6d2c9a1a4b&e=567664f14c)
**Campus Protestors Get More Ridiculous:**
Get the latest scoop on the absurd and downright ridiculous requests from campus protestors. You won't believe some of the things they're demanding now!
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=117369ebb5&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a2b78ee33f&e=567664f14c)
**Worst Book Tour...Ever?:**
Governor Kristi Noem was still out there pushing her new book this week, and it did not go well! Everybody keeps asking about how she admitted to killing her dog — plus a lot of other questionable details about her time in Congress. Sometimes you find out who your leaders _really_ are when it’s too late.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a20d0caf95&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=baec1ddca1&e=567664f14c)
|
---
**PLUS:** Dive deep into the implications of Joe Biden's promise to let the Trump tax cuts expire. Prepare to be shocked as we break down what this means for taxpayers and unveil some jaw-dropping numbers!

[**NEW EPISODE TOMORROW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5503ad7310&e=567664f14c)**!**

Don't forget to mark your calendars for our **special Mother's Day episode** airing TOMORROW. It's going to be heartwarming, hilarious, and everything in between

Best,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=879df09694&e=567664f14c)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Trump rally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6435%2E5257348%2EWSB-FV ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

In a matter of hours, Donald Trump will be taking the campaign rally stage
in southern New Jersey.

He will no doubt whine about his gag orders and how he is being “silenced”
— as he stands before a microphone, dozens of TV cameras, and thousands of
adoring fans, with his words broadcast and shared via social media to
billions of people around the world.

He will abide by his primary political directive where going on the
offensive means being offensive to every value Americans hold dear.

He will demean and dehumanize people, especially those who are immigrants,
or people of color.

He will take pride in the harm and suffering he has inflicted on women and
girls, and the reproductive healthcare crisis of his own making, as states
ban abortion care and threaten to criminally punish the women who seek
care, the doctors who provide the care, and even the people who drive
women seeking abortions to a clinic.

Derek, Trump
has no ethical compass, no sense of right and wrong, no allegiance to the
truth or anything else apart from self. In the Oval Office, that is a
profound danger to everything America represents. We can never go back to
that time.

The political yes men of the Republican Party surrounding Trump have given
him everything in the world he has asked for over the decade since he came
down that golden escalator in Trump Tower. Meanwhile, those who stood up
to him, like Mike Pence on January 6, or Representatives Liz Cheney and
Adam Kinzinger on the committee who joined us in investigating the attack,
are banished, with Trump’s unhinged MAGA followers going so far as to make
threats on their lives — as they have on mine.

Trump has been coddled and mollified by his one-time political rivals in
the Republican Party and a pliant far-right media misinformation machine.
Now that he is finally coming before the American criminal justice system,
he is panicking.

So we must allow that system to run its course without interference until
there is an outcome. And there will be an outcome.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6435%2E5257348%2EWSB-FV ]And no matter what Trump says on the rally stage tonight, we will still
have one job: Defeating him in November. Will you contribute any amount to
our campaign before Trump takes the rally stage in New Jersey?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=may2024_abs_em.VF5JUE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=6435%2E5257348%2EWSB-FV ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=may2024_abs_em.VF5JUE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1007&akid=6435%2E5257348%2EWSB-FV ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=may2024_abs_em.VF5JUE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=6435%2E5257348%2EWSB-FV ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=6435%2E5257348%2EWSB-FV ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for reading this longer email. Some things are just bigger than
partisan fighting — and upholding the integrity of the American justice
system is one of them.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240511_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=6435%2E5257348%2EWSB-FV ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

name: Team Harry
subject: Harry's campaign is historic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Y'all – if we haven't said it in a while, we appreciate you more than you know.
The support this campaign has seen is beyond what Harry ever thought would happen, but we knew that people would have an amazing response to an American hero running for Congress.
We've garnered support from grassroots donors in all 50 states, all while keeping our average donation around $25.
That's because Harry made a promise to serve the people, not big businesses. He's not taking a cent from corporate PACs, but that means he's being outspent on TV ads.
A billionaire funded super PAC is spending over $4 MILLION on ads for his opponent.
So if you've been waiting for a time to be a part of history and our record breaking campaign – now is that day. We've got just 3 days until the election, so we're operating at a full sprint. Please will you rush $25 to our campaign and Seth Moulton to make history and elect Harry? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
- Team Harry 4 Congress
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/harrydunn.jpg]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

name: Team Templeton
subject: BREAKING: Nancy Mace's Top Strategist Working Against Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Templeton for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://link.templetonforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ceccdd4390ee46a1bba999dfc3e5b967&_m=5d02c4ee86ab459c9fa7f285889cf6a1&_e=sBbnAk4lksuqfbPZHvxv-aNqYeJItV5F_8GKm81mmvl-V-a24kZI7G6C9jNwuHNqHS_y-t8Leyrds8BAtcn9SytUIm28i4frY89JZxoajA44L6cxdmkau3DbIZDKl-MFZEEvVzf6lGNetSdZVC6u9XOZYRNHZb3lftZ63IPoBmOw7V9ZdnFF0Uos2-IT2xa3pMB2O8pdodsfP2WLxKTtVQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, We're writing with shocking news. Nancy Mace's top strategist, Doug Stafford, is working with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. AGAINST President Trump.

President Trump has been very clear —**[helping RFK Jr. is helping Joe Biden](http://link.templetonforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ceccdd4390ee46a1bba999dfc3e5b967&_m=5d02c4ee86ab459c9fa7f285889cf6a1&_e=sBbnAk4lksuqfbPZHvxv-dGYEPD4YJ8yoBoMWNmFn9KSbUZUkGDOtwOaC-frNoLia0O4m4qmYq1qYktEzxqGnwmwhTPfwBd4vsGh_OeMmTJroUwYNg4Mm9ldv7CXDlTNZvmZgnjBOUwYPphlWHwsq6dWt9W2zKzTsqYwXdVgDUhKBXXcQQLGx9Bzqok6qxULRAbUruYJo6SXYH5N7JWDLuvQdZJkX53VKYL9pbU2kR9tInIH-hAjqYYASugF-aCX)**. Yet Doug Stafford, Nancy Mace's General Consultant and top strategist, is [**working for him**](http://link.templetonforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ceccdd4390ee46a1bba999dfc3e5b967&_m=5d02c4ee86ab459c9fa7f285889cf6a1&_e=sBbnAk4lksuqfbPZHvxv-UEgiV9u4Wi6KwcRoGeUM35USCKNPQ1rDfNll4937dyLDLnQYiTx83mkXNrukKW1aAJZrOKJnDStu4iaDgp2jbgLV4nCuaLzKVjqRpR0FpOhakMtQHo8YEkiXlFuOsCuajx0cUL2jj5Qys_0l62boZdr7BHK8p6ytRaSees089l9BfgE-eiNPRSs5lMTLa_tcmdr02TiDFsapbs6o4iUDK1kNqg9K0M9HiRI09VIXfsiMAGgSFQqookysEnL1Ngbuttnsv0Wgj2CBgPJZ0Z8kNg%3D). Stafford has criticized President Trump's position on **[vaccines](http://link.templetonforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ceccdd4390ee46a1bba999dfc3e5b967&_m=5d02c4ee86ab459c9fa7f285889cf6a1&_e=sBbnAk4lksuqfbPZHvxv-fc3ifeIoL4gy8dKIjZUs_6zahJK9rzROrlpM_XFq5P6Zl7ywV1gXjSxNEeztD7jUMcXgVhIS0FOItNQ6raHNkB2j-OmsLWRkINn7S4Zv_wT0n682HEhjanRFbRxETGf1X7OPakmstNApEMOQtH_UgANfKGmVdvNVTR_eXOaTWw4WFjEeRCDQRIyWC4FJKCRbf1YvTNHEn87MZ3TWKlqwN3rIteE0u3cLi7Vn51IoTpo)** :
---
| |
---
| | Stafford also seems to make more than $15,000 A MONTH **[working for Nancy's campaign](http://link.templetonforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ceccdd4390ee46a1bba999dfc3e5b967&_m=5d02c4ee86ab459c9fa7f285889cf6a1&_e=sBbnAk4lksuqfbPZHvxv-YTcGufOW2y_YRfilr5x47xqCXaSKYOyUTYRM-OcFvJEFs2z3cF8vV1_CCkZdRMW4JwaLqTuHRys_na2Y7EwzQnMommxZcST9xTbB6AyPCEOrssZ4ZPrZak4q631340_RRanI60cRI9SPGYNDvVya_ZmrLTbwtPH9JkmTCkQ-gHCmGJeflf9wbFvm5VPn0uuZcEnEYESX-lA26ujF-SkDpAF2YSxlJMrcZUKB-mu1uw0JORJWErQijeSZM7n_oA0CAZWHP3faImbXOuIC70ThWYr9xGJQnRmkL-krsEj_7htRXQZCoByBSlG4VvjYmXndeshsl8KvJ90WfqnRs0zg5xv-ugotpNHIjBxzJRXxNSsdLkvT7TGF1CBGwMbXN8ELQIfKLGPNtgmxomw2Tcki2g%3D):**
---
| |
---
| | Nancy Mace has betrayed President Trump (and Lowcountry conservatives) time and time again. But this is beyond the pale.

Let Nancy know on social media—her team needs to STOP working to re-elect Joe Biden.

Team Templeton

Last week, we finally captured her on camera! = It was all very exciting. We’re all anxiously waiting for her baby birds to hatch. And keeping the cat indoors in the meantime. Running for Congress often feels like a long waiting game, too. Fellow American,

I don’t say this lightly, but our House majority is facing its greatest threat yet...

This is one of those times that I’m asking you not to doubt what I’m telling you.

subject: House Speaker Jim Jordan
body:
| |
---
Ultra-MAGA extremist Marjorie Taylor Greene led an unsuccessful yet deeply troubling effort to unseat Mike Johnson from his position of Speaker of the House. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjEwNTEwMjcwODIzMTQ5MjQsXCJyXCI6MTIxMDUxMjU0MDExOTg3NTM4fSIsInMiOiIyYzcxMjU1NjNiNzUzODI1In0)

---
|
---
Friend,

Ultra-MAGA extremist Marjorie Taylor Greene led an unsuccessful yet deeply troubling effort this week to **unseat Mike Johnson from his position of Speaker of the House**.

Though MTG’s effort failed to reach a critical mass, the incident highlights the increasingly perilous situation for Johnson, who faces the same extreme right wing forces that pushed out his predecessor, Kevin McCarthy. [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjEwNTEwMjcwOTY5OTQ5OTAsXCJyXCI6MTIxMDUxMjU0MDExOTg3NTM4fSIsInMiOiI2ZmZkYWRlZDk2ZDBhODcwIn0)
|
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjEwNTEwMjcxMDMyODY0NDcsXCJyXCI6MTIxMDUxMjU0MDExOTg3NTM4fSIsInMiOiJjMTNlZjdkMjA5YmNhOTJiIn0)
---
|
---
**Huge swaths of the House GOP are extremely discontent with Speaker Johnson** : they don’t think he supports Trump enough, they don’t like that he sent critical military aid to support Ukraine in their fight against Russia, and they don’t like that he compromised with Democrats on Border funding.

The MAGA-right’s patience for speaker Johnson is wearing thin and we know that if Johnson is forced out the specter of **House Speaker Jim Jordan** looms large.

Jordan has Trump’s backing and it was only because of a small handful of Republicans that they didn’t nominate him in 2023. _God forbid if Trump wins in 2024 we know that he will pull out all stops to bring his yes-man Jim Jordan into power as speaker._

[We can’t let Jordan become speaker - can you donate $10, $25, or even $100 to stop Jordan and elect his Dem challenger Tamie Wilson before it’s too late?](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjEwNTEwMjcxMDk1Nzc5MDQsXCJyXCI6MTIxMDUxMjU0MDExOTg3NTM4fSIsInMiOiIyMzZmMDJiOWIwNjdiOTBiIn0)
|
---
| | [ Donate ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjEwNTEwMjcxMTU4NjkzNjEsXCJyXCI6MTIxMDUxMjU0MDExOTg3NTM4fSIsInMiOiJiZGE1NTU4MjFhMDk0NmMzIn0)
---
|
---
Speaker Johnson is hanging on by a thread and we cannot let Jordan assume the speakership. Thank you in advance for your support for the only effort to stop Jordan once and for all.

Thank you!

Team TW4C (Tamie Wilson for Congress)
|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84763157/472544650/1122037525?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.11_B1_GOTV_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGM0YmJjNC1iMDBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1NeSdUDJmc3zKllkRU-4tqE4CGMpDgPCVxpvi9Cik0=) Hey Peter, I’m taking a break from the campaign trail because I just got an urgent text from Dan, my campaign manager. Looks like the latest poll numbers show the race between Larry Hogan and me is getting tighter. If you ask the talking heads, Maryland’s Senate seat was never supposed to be in play. But now that Larry Hogan is throwing his hat in the ring, CNN is calling this one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip. **Not on my watch. I refuse to let Hogan do the unthinkable and flip Maryland red for the first time in 36 years. But this race isn’t just about a cage match between me and Hogan.** It’s about the grassroots support I’ve gathered from across the state versus the millions of dollars Hogan has received from special interests that’s propping up his failing campaign.

We still have three days until the primary, Peter, so there’s still time to make a difference in this race. If we can rally all of our supporters right away, we can ensure a big win on May 14 and then go on to beat Larry Hogan in November.

A donation today will help us make one last push during these final 72 hours before Election Day. It’ll help us secure the critical votes we need to come out on top in the primary and go into the general election strong. **[We’ve set up a Rapid Response Fund, and we need to raise $20,000 for it in the next 48 hours. Dan was pretty adamant that I reach out to you immediately and let you know the situation. I assured him that you would understand—and that you’d give whatever you could manage.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84763158/472544651/429773004?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.11_B1_GOTV_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGM0YmJjNC1iMDBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1NeSdUDJmc3zKllkRU-4tqE4CGMpDgPCVxpvi9Cik0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | [**$5 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84763159/472544652/1122037525?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.11_B1_GOTV_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGM0YmJjNC1iMDBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1NeSdUDJmc3zKllkRU-4tqE4CGMpDgPCVxpvi9Cik0=)

If you want to receive fewer emails, If you want to unsubscribe, = Hey Peter, I’m taking a break from the campaign trail because I just got an urgent text from Dan, my campaign manager. Looks like the latest poll numbers show the race between Larry Hogan and me is getting tighter. If you ask the talking heads, Maryland’s Senate seat was never supposed to be in play. But now that Larry Hogan is throwing his hat in the ring, CNN is calling this one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip. Not on my watch. I refuse to let Hogan do the unthinkable and flip Maryland red for the first time in 36 years. But this race isn’t just about a cage match between me and Hogan. It’s about the grassroots support I’ve gathered from across the state versus the millions of dollars Hogan has received from special interests that’s propping up his failing campaign. We still have three days until the primary, Peter, so there’s still time to make a difference in this race. If we can rally all of our supporters right away, we can ensure a big win on May 14 and then go on to beat Larry Hogan in November. A donation today will help us make one last push during these final 72 hours before Election Day. We really appreciate you. David Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate this year, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. Being a mother is a hard job — our kids are the first thing we think about when we wake up in the morning, the last thing we think about when we go to bed and they bring us so much joy...

So, why **_aren’t_** they the thing we think about when we vote?

Being a mom drives me to do the work that I do. I am disgusted by politicians who refuse to put our kids’ health and wellbeing first.

**So this Mother’s Day, give the gift of a Kids First agenda in Congress.**

body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84763317/472545260/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2NkOGQwZC1iMTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-uNvdZ4bk6NytZE8-4f9vr8oiwjRKkMPmcmTKygVWRo=&emci=4e890f7f-2f0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8ccd8d0d-b10f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=5534179)
---

| | When we think about why so many of us have to deal with underfunded schools, unaffordable child care, exploding health care costs, and no paid family leave, it might just be because **there are so few moms out there making laws in the halls of government.** Only about 7% of the folks in Congress are mothers of minor children. In state legislatures, that number is only 5%. Meanwhile, we're facing dangerous restrictions on reproductive freedoms – from abortion to IVF to threats about birth control. Costs of groceries, necessities, and doctor visits are soaring. And we still don't have universal free preschool for our three- and four-year-olds. To tackle these critical issues, we must elect more moms and parents to public office. Mothers are incredibly hard workers, and without their representation, it will be hard to move this country forward on issues that are critically important to all of us. This movement is fueled by folks like you **who are tired of seeing Republican leaders prioritize soundbites about fiscal responsibility over the need for crucial essentials like affordable childcare.** [**Chip in $5 or $10 bucks, or whatever is affordable for you, and let's elect the women, mothers, and parents who will pass a progressive agenda for schools, hospitals, and families.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84763319/472545283/-327605227?refcode=2024-05-11-moms&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8ccd8d0d-b10f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2NkOGQwZC1iMTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-uNvdZ4bk6NytZE8-4f9vr8oiwjRKkMPmcmTKygVWRo=) _Movement Labs_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | When we think about why so many of us have to deal with underfunded schools, unaffordable child care, exploding health care costs, and no paid family leave, it might just be because there are so few moms out there making laws in the halls of government. Only about 7% of the folks in Congress are mothers of minor children. In state legislatures, that number is only 5%. Meanwhile, we're facing dangerous restrictions on reproductive freedoms – from abortion to IVF to threats about birth control. Costs of groceries, necessities, and doctor visits are soaring. And we still don't have universal free preschool for our three- and four-year-olds. To tackle these critical issues, we must elect more moms and parents to public office. Mothers are incredibly hard workers, and without their representation, it will be hard to move this country forward on issues that are critically important to all of us. This movement is fueled by folks like you who are tired of seeing Republican leaders prioritize soundbites about fiscal responsibility over the need for crucial essentials like affordable childcare. = Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

name: Eugene Vindman
subject: The phone call that changed everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Eugene Vindman's campaign in Virginia from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84764735/472548580/1557491702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFjYmYyMS1iMjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZqbUgUvoWajbi32t7Fv_zDUFoSrvajotCsnQjVNG3o=&emci=4fa87ce9-b10f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=75acbf21-b20f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)_
Hello — give me just a moment to tell you the story of a phone call that changed everything.
I’m Eugene Vindman. My brother Alex and I used to serve on the White House National Security Council. I was the senior ethics official on the Council.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84764736/472548581/1582186816?refcode=em20240511am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=75acbf21-b20f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFjYmYyMS1iMjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZqbUgUvoWajbi32t7Fv_zDUFoSrvajotCsnQjVNG3o=)
In 2019, Alex overheard a phone call in which President Trump attempted to extort our allies in Ukraine. Trump threatened to withhold military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated his political rival.
After Alex reported the call to me, we both blew the whistle on Trump. We reported Trump’s corrupt phone call up the chain of command, and it led to his impeachment.
Even though the decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump was the right thing to do, it cost my brother and me our military careers after the former-president retaliated against us. But I am not done serving.
**I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy.**
And more than that, I’m running to push our country forward across the board. To restore abortion rights everywhere, act on climate change, and lower costs for working families.
So here’s the deal. If we win Virginia’s 7th district, we win a highly competitive swing district and we can begin to make progress on those issues while safeguarding against any Republican attempts to roll back our rights.
So, with Virginia’s Primary Election Day just around the corner, please:
**[Make a contribution to my campaign for Congress. Help us build a real grassroots movement in defense of democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84764737/472548582/1582186816?refcode=em20240511am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=75acbf21-b20f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFjYmYyMS1iMjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZqbUgUvoWajbi32t7Fv_zDUFoSrvajotCsnQjVNG3o=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eugene Vindman and Adam Frisch will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy. Hello — give me just a moment to tell you the story of a phone call that changed everything. I’m Eugene Vindman. My brother Alex and I used to serve on the White House National Security Council. I was the senior ethics official on the Council. = In 2019, Alex overheard a phone call in which President Trump attempted to extort our allies in Ukraine. Trump threatened to withhold military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated his political rival. After Alex reported the call to me, we both blew the whistle on Trump. We reported Trump’s corrupt phone call up the chain of command, and it led to his impeachment. Even though the decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump was the right thing to do, it cost my brother and me our military careers after the former-president retaliated against us. But I am not done serving. I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy. And more than that, I’m running to push our country forward across the board. To restore abortion rights everywhere, act on climate change, and lower costs for working families. So here’s the deal. If we win Virginia’s 7th district, we win a highly competitive swing district and we can begin to make progress on those issues while safeguarding against any Republican attempts to roll back our rights. So, with Virginia’s Primary Election Day just around the corner, please: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eugene Vindman and Adam Frisch will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for hearing me out. I hope I can count on your support. — Eugene Vindman ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Did you hear about Barbara Streisand?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The emails from the likes of Hollywood A-LISTER Glenn Close, the joint fundraising emails with Adam Schiff | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fc1d69bc689b4b7487b4d2678fcb858d&_e=zabt5xMoQ2SzhAzB61E-oh3AuCYT0c4R-97HThpHYUVRy3liYKAWoThvfChfClIZC9P7HTMpM4-LelnnOZ2IYI2IyE4bKnmHl4E_m3d6-6J9kmcCLGjX033KEColk1Pt2Rq9HPvXrWeV8I3JywkqIhRhU8iBjduM3qZIpHNWlEN-ExKxKyKGZOeU5jW-EeuZujukXJxffxOgHU-BRKmjwC4EpfPS2KL8uamO0D-irIEWSqtLQYhVO62Bus0b95nV-cf-Xt3XZDKkbkqLmWsW3AEQatbOc8Fd-hLgYdqdQUJW9oox9g1pj9fB4WplDaxchlS961pcKGI7BjBIPJZi5o6eyfoZqoYtjTON80N2R7DkvTaRJkoBHc7Vzt7BJktofGME-2940oiZLaZLLUTbU_la9vnAaYxtcOenWcj5jrU%3D)

---
Peter,

Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself.

You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry.

**My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support.**

I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, _**“Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.”**_

Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. **[We don't need a bought-and-paid-for Hollywood Senator representing American interests any longer.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fc1d69bc689b4b7487b4d2678fcb858d&_e=zabt5xMoQ2SzhAzB61E-oh3AuCYT0c4R-97HThpHYUVRy3liYKAWoThvfChfClIZC9P7HTMpM4-LelnnOZ2IYI2IyE4bKnmHl4E_m3d6-6J9kmcCLGjX033KEColk1Pt2Rq9HPvXrWeV8I3JywkqIhRhU8iBjduM3qZIpHNWlEN-ExKxKyKGZOeU5jW-EeuZujukXJxffxOgHU-BRKmjwC4EpfPS2KL8uamO0D-irIEWSqtLQYhVO62Bus0b95nVeoo2b7RsT618NCgrsLbi3EXJPPUikh1MljYcgZ9k9Pj4eOdqoLv1N200tj-KhDqAEaSnj-RveBR1F-MtcTOszeUFzd_cwobuXeRY6zUPlVzLz-Mfda8aWTRhuH2ewMS7TbCJdCRBu9UdNRoBsXLnkjkwaX9NT1hIOUofkn2O0wU%3D)**

[**HELP ME DEFEAT CALIFORNIA'S FAVORITE SENATOR ->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fc1d69bc689b4b7487b4d2678fcb858d&_e=zabt5xMoQ2SzhAzB61E-oh3AuCYT0c4R-97HThpHYUVRy3liYKAWoThvfChfClIZC9P7HTMpM4-LelnnOZ2IYI2IyE4bKnmHl4E_m3d6-6J9kmcCLGjX033KEColk1Pt2Rq9HPvXrWeV8I3JywkqIhRhU8iBjduM3qZIpHNWlEN-ExKxKyKGZOeU5jW-EeuZujukXJxffxOgHU-BRKmjwC4EpfPS2KL8uamO0D-irIEWSqtLQYhVO62Bus0b95nVdr7yNxgkmVV4OvG49ZN6Xv5lUc9KvdXtHOdorXqq8wGVm8FPG-DSibBgF5e7-gpXXnbdJEw-VWtsagmSuaQnA2skDU8dZpMUhVcFf6x55lKDKDFvNkRT-4IhYN7hjeDDl_QpUjjTMVMy3s9-wn4l1cUsZ3HNAExFyjnHayhr6-I%3D)
**
Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite like Barbara Streisand, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? **

With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, _**there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next six months.**_

I appreciate your help with this matter.

clean_body: The emails from the likes of Hollywood A-LISTER Glenn Close, the joint fundraising emails with Adam Schiff | Peter, Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself. You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry. My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support. I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, “Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.” Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite like Barbara Streisand, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next six months. I appreciate your help with this matter. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. | | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=01e8b481d05b4e53a5c2d7836eb69310&_e=wCZ1LuLq0q2N_ebWxibumWeE5K0Fd0K4hIUot5P1RkWoziIbqA4K4x4O23zMl_QOQy5z2iDqfZyYep1xV-Dcpj9ciwBWU09xt2L_E5-jq9OP6nbpfYXIwh9c-IjZwnMMYhF6GdPAxKHSHFppdERpBGpnSFiew9c_7sMl24UlVHKM0tCpYbPmZQ2_uW0opM0ZecAoBE7GhJ7ao1V1OJbhQulfHzlbTIkRBjcRjPguaBFFjdGJQSdsenPzL5yjgMfuOhupeA9iefs-aHjJoHIdk-tTsZGBr7qN2XpwIWtI2KUn6kkOB5D0Ojb3RfwYjIAxWwzHJVJJyZOiNFfuu3dm3RdfWlXILhdmDcD9bf9vdBXgpvSLyaOVWk9Gzb4jEdEt8UgOOg1mBinc1e9gb5qqpA%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=01e8b481d05b4e53a5c2d7836eb69310&_e=wCZ1LuLq0q2N_ebWxibumWeE5K0Fd0K4hIUot5P1RkWoziIbqA4K4x4O23zMl_QOQy5z2iDqfZyYep1xV-Dcpj9ciwBWU09xt2L_E5-jq9OP6nbpfYXIwh9c-IjZwnMMYhF6GdPAxKHSHFppdERpBGpnSFiew9c_7sMl24UlVHKM0tCpYbPmZQ2_uW0opM0ZecAoBE7GhJ7ao1V1OJbhQulfHzlbTIkRBjcRjPguaBGse_hIR2aULLWtXSdXg8rj3tlyqeOEWKhKMlhHNrfycDzlVf-6R6_TtkuCKY1VC0CLd8FTC5sfiOrAQY8wLpn_fmS2siiVIRdso7BUVPwxkqgBSgUyZCvNDA9tKY7mKI_Jg7nuRYQjXi1S6BrWWpG5MJTkjOuNE29zewIQDRZsVg%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of _**$25 million**_ in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. name: Nancy Gomes (via NextGen America)
subject: For the culture: Celebrating AAPI Heritage Month
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84766651/472553837/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjNlZjBkMC1iNDBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Sl-1XPOTrW7iPy_BIcXEL5T861TGm641YjxSnszkQw=&emci=3a0c499e-250e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=123ef0d0-b40f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)
---
Hey y’all,
Nancy here, checking in from Youth Vote HQ. As a Bengali-American woman, stories about immigration and discrimination in this country hit close to home. Now that we’re in the middle of Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month, I wanted to talk to you about why this fight for our future means so much to me.
Since this country was founded, AAPI Americans have been subjected to discrimination, violence, and hardship.
As of 2022, 17% of undocumented immigrants are AAPI — that’s nearly **2 million** people.
Almost _**one-third**_ of AAPI people living in the United States are not citizens. Despite our influences in culture, food, and media, the United States continues to make it exceptionally difficult for our communities to obtain citizenship.
I know. It’s crazy.
But through it all, we persevere and are _**still**_ the fastest-growing group of eligible voters in the United States.
So while we can celebrate our successes and honor our unique cultures this month, it’s more important than ever that we keep up the fight for equality.
Programs like DACA and Temporary Protected Status (TPS) are essential for us to work and live normal lives in America. Immigrants from all over Asia helped build our agricultural and transportation industries, and they need our help.
The bottom line is that all human beings deserve to live with dignity and safety. [During AAPI Month, can I count on you to urge Congress to provide a pathway to citizenship for millions of undocumented immigrants?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84766652/472553838/-2034494711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjNlZjBkMC1iNDBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Sl-1XPOTrW7iPy_BIcXEL5T861TGm641YjxSnszkQw=&emci=3a0c499e-250e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=123ef0d0-b40f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)

subject: Enough.

body:

[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240511.RJ_mL1&refcode=em20240511-6386-P_FND_ANO_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6386%2E2526796%2EzHqzeZ)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We must find another path
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240511-3864-footer&t=1001&akid=3864%2E420207%2E6ktDXf ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter — this is a
moment of great consequence. I am proud to be one of the 37 Democrats to
vote against supplying more offensive military aid that could result in
more killings of civilians in Gaza.

Most Americans do not want our government to write a blank check to
further Netanyahu’s war in Gaza. The United States needs to help find a
path to peace and safety.

That is what our vote was about. Voting to continue supplying offensive
military aid only makes Congress complicit in this tragedy.

My vote against H.R. 8034 was a vote against supplying more offensive
weapons that could result in more killings of civilians in Rafah and
elsewhere. The dozens of Democrats who voted with me all believe strongly
in Israel’s right to self-defense and have joined colleagues previously in
affirming our shared commitment. We are committed to a sovereign, safe,
and secure future for both Israelis and Palestinians.

To protect that future, we believe the United States must help achieve a
ceasefire that allows hostages to be freed, humanitarian aid to be
delivered, and peace talks to begin.

Netanyahu appears willing to sacrifice the hostages while inflicting
extraordinary suffering on the people of Gaza. He is willing to expand
this conflict to preserve his power at the expense of Israel’s safety.

When faced with the question of whether to provide offensive aid to
further this conflict, I believe there is a moral imperative to find
another path.

clean_body: [ ]Pramila Jayapal Peter — this is a moment of great consequence. I am proud to be one of the 37 Democrats to vote against supplying more offensive military aid that could result in more killings of civilians in Gaza. Most Americans do not want our government to write a blank check to further Netanyahu’s war in Gaza. The United States needs to help find a path to peace and safety. That is what our vote was about. Voting to continue supplying offensive military aid only makes Congress complicit in this tragedy. My vote against H.R. 8034 was a vote against supplying more offensive weapons that could result in more killings of civilians in Rafah and elsewhere. The dozens of Democrats who voted with me all believe strongly in Israel’s right to self-defense and have joined colleagues previously in affirming our shared commitment. We are committed to a sovereign, safe, and secure future for both Israelis and Palestinians. To protect that future, we believe the United States must help achieve a ceasefire that allows hostages to be freed, humanitarian aid to be delivered, and peace talks to begin. Netanyahu appears willing to sacrifice the hostages while inflicting extraordinary suffering on the people of Gaza. He is willing to expand this conflict to preserve his power at the expense of Israel’s safety. When faced with the question of whether to provide offensive aid to further this conflict, I believe there is a moral imperative to find another path. [ ]If you stand with me, please consider supporting this campaign with a contribution of any amount. [ ]Donate ›› In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal Contribute to Pramila Jayapal:

| | |
# [Prosecute Republican officials who illegally interfere with Trump cases](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9d10e1d-1c7b-482b-b4b6-4463451178c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Speaker Mike Johnson is [demanding](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d79641f-b423-4492-862d-002c6a443ee5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that all cases against Trump be dropped, or he will use Congress to, in short, obstruct justice. Other republican leaders, such as Senator Rick Scott, are making similar demands and threats. Yes, as congressional leaders, they clearly have some legitimate oversight powers. **But at a certain point, they cross a legal line into outright obstruction of justice.** And when they do, they need to face the consequences. [**Add your name: Investigate and prosecute Republican officials who illegally interfere with Trump cases**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c696f35-280e-49b7-86d2-3ff366e21621/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Joe Kent
subject: She's calling us "Nazis" again...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent for Congress Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
Most Americans agree that illegal aliens should not be represented in the U.S. Congress or the Electoral College, which elects our President. This is a standard no other country follows.
Recently, the US Congress debated a bill requiring a citizenship question on the Census. This question aims to ensure that only American citizens are counted when determining congressional seats and electoral votes. My opponent, Democrat Marie Perez, opposed this bill.
When I challenged her stance, she responded by labeling me a "Nazi."
If you believe that only US citizens should have representation in Congress or the Electoral College, then according to her, you might as well be a Nazi who believes black people are "subhumans."
If you share my belief--that only US citizens should be considered for our congressional representation and Electoral College votes--please support my campaign at [JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/sr892n81ci3nChE5aR1763bLhg/oFPq8QJBNiLzOd0aY20hrA).
[](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/biImm8uRvts0892z5H2u6A0Q/oFPq8QJBNiLzOd0aY20hrA)
Marie Perez often resorts to name-calling when she cannot defend her record. Here are a few examples of how she operates:
* Support securing our borders? You're a "white nationalist."
* Believe that school bathrooms should be reserved for biological girls? You're labeled a "weirdo."
* Oppose giving "sanctuary" states more congressional and Electoral College votes for harboring illegal immigrants? You're a "Nazi."

I am committed to focusing on her record rather than resorting to name-calling. This is my strategy to win--by holding her accountable.
But I need your support. Help me continue to challenge her by contributing to my campaign at [JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/sr892n81ci3nChE5aR1763bLhg/oFPq8QJBNiLzOd0aY20hrA).
[](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/biImm8uRvts0892z5H2u6A0Q/oFPq8QJBNiLzOd0aY20hrA)
Respectfully,

Joe Kent
**P.S.** --My opponent supports giving states with large illegal immigrant populations additional representatives and Electoral votes. She even resorted to calling me a Nazi for my opposition. Help me fight back by making a donation at [JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/sr892n81ci3nChE5aR1763bLhg/oFPq8QJBNiLzOd0aY20hrA).
[](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/biImm8uRvts0892z5H2u6A0Q/oFPq8QJBNiLzOd0aY20hrA)

Paid for by the Joe Kent for Congress Victory Fund.

---
Peter, I’m sure by now you’ve heard about what happened at UVA. Campus rules are necessary to keep students safe, and UVA officials were right to prioritize the public safety of all students and enforce the law on Saturday. _After being given several opportunities to comply, protestors – many of whom were not students – broke university policy and, in some cases,___assaulted law enforcement._ _ _**[>>> ASSAULTING A POLICE OFFICER IS NOT A PEACEFUL PROTEST.AGREE? STAND WITH LAW & ORDER <<<](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6eb8243879144423b502d6699741afbe&_e=p77m_GkPJNrPAdmN-JKvnfYs2dhOPYn72--uqGjjTSzCRQSe-gjCX6F2OeQ0zlCxmAY9Fys15Cz7fW_3hiXMLkyrx3OGMllZNy0RLWCMVsNO2RVaiY9ZRCJYMfjNkx1dtH-OccEVPLS-monuJ94H8IURjKZ58RjkEKPeWIgt5NazvfkphSDgXJpnWwUVVyGEo5XX2xu2LrCgTigs2MO9wXVrBtq_0itkfLVHblO0-nIgs0aJrk_-8aDHgzc3H9fcgTgOUXL335MiAVjHJeEQeV3gStpi_BK-Ipe-v2ku8H0R9lXlFe3UVs_ro3rUpLzn54GVTCdXP6UkiueqCsTfzKW5OeoK_uOO4JC2rTik7NF8FkH4sOMuFYw3kz74kuGPpxF6Yz91XrT-Uvqrnm2QHO5gkvR-Fi9RlsFfMg0KxcIvw4tvgAkjD_W3VPdf5P9W)**_ Individuals who knowingly disregarded administrative rules and policies, receiving warning after warning, were correctly held accountable. We will protect the 1st Amendment AND maintain law and order on the Commonwealth’s college campuses. I’ve said it once, and I’ll say it again: **Virginia is not New York or California — here, we hold individuals accountable for their actions.**
---

body:
We are inching towards November and things are heating up

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84768374/472559178/-1747597063?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.11_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODIyZmRlYS1iNzBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1m9vRXkGxx6KsUKhinTpXYkGL4XHtVy5iIlusKAjSI=) We are inching towards November and things are heating up,Peter! **FIRST:** Emilia was labeled a top target for 2024 by DC Republicans – putting all eyes on her and this pivotal race in OH-13. **THEN:** Extreme Republicans started gearing up to flip this seat. **They even sent Jim Jordan to the district to endorse Emilia’s opponent – and he brought with him dozens of far-right mega donors. ** **NOW: **We have shown them that our grassroots team is stronger and more powerful than their mega donors, but unfortunately, we have seen a decline in our online fundraising. If we want to win this election, we have to get back to work. [**Can you chip in $10 right now to help us raise $5,000 by tonight so Emilia can keep fighting for Northeast Ohioans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84768375/472559179/-1747597063?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.11_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODIyZmRlYS1iNzBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1m9vRXkGxx6KsUKhinTpXYkGL4XHtVy5iIlusKAjSI=) | [**CHIP IN $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84768376/472559180/-1747597063?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.11_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODIyZmRlYS1iNzBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1m9vRXkGxx6KsUKhinTpXYkGL4XHtVy5iIlusKAjSI=)
---
People in OH-13 deserve a leader who will advocate for them on every issue no matter how big or small it is. That is exactly what Emilia has done in Congress, and _exactly what she will continue to do._
But without this amazing team, none of this would be possible. **We need your help to ensure that Emilia can keep delivering results for everyone in OH-13. **[**Can Emilia count on you for $10 or whatever you can pitch in today to keep this campaign fueled?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84768377/472559181/-1747597063?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.11_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODIyZmRlYS1iNzBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1m9vRXkGxx6KsUKhinTpXYkGL4XHtVy5iIlusKAjSI=)
[**DONATE $10 NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84768378/472559182/-1747597063?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.11_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODIyZmRlYS1iNzBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1m9vRXkGxx6KsUKhinTpXYkGL4XHtVy5iIlusKAjSI=)

Thank you,

clean_body: We are inching towards November and things are heating up = We are inching towards November and things are heating up,Peter! FIRST: Emilia was labeled a top target for 2024 by DC Republicans – putting all eyes on her and this pivotal race in OH-13. THEN: Extreme Republicans started gearing up to flip this seat. They even sent Jim Jordan to the district to endorse Emilia’s opponent – and he brought with him dozens of far-right mega donors. NOW: We have shown them that our grassroots team is stronger and more powerful than their mega donors, but unfortunately, we have seen a decline in our online fundraising. If we want to win this election, we have to get back to work. = | = People in OH-13 deserve a leader who will advocate for them on every issue no matter how big or small it is. That is exactly what Emilia has done in Congress, and exactly what she will continue to do. But without this amazing team, none of this would be possible. We need your help to ensure that Emilia can keep delivering results for everyone in OH-13. = = Thank you, Team Sykes A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. clean_body: I promise it will be worth your time. | = I want you to do me a favor. Close your eyes for a second and just imagine a future in Tennessee where we claim victory this November. I’ll tell you what I see: 🗳️ Our democracy and voting rights protected from far-right attacks 📈 A booming economy for working people and families 🩺 Reproductive rights secured 🍎 Respect for our public school students and teachers ❌ A safer Tennessee, free from senseless gun violence ✊ And a senator who keeps her promises and speaks the truth Guess what? We’re under six months away from making this a reality. But I could really use your help. With so much at stake, there's no room for setbacks. If the GOP wins this race, Marsha Blackburn and her far-right allies will push their extreme agenda, making this future impossible. We need to do everything in our power to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I can’t thank you enough for your support. Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Standing up for LGBTQ+ people and their rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] # [#]Hi there,

I was honored to have recently received the endorsement of the Human Rights Campaign PAC — as a member of the Congressional Equality Caucus, the fight for LGBTQ+ rights is something I have always fought for. Today, we’ve seen far-right MAGA extremists elevate their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community in countless ways, and I’ll never back down from combating bullying, hate, discrimination, and inequality wherever they are found.

If you’re with me in this fight for LGBTQ+ rights, can you chip in $ to my campaign for Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2405?amount=] Every dollar helps us push back against MAGA attempts to flip this seat!

DONATE $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2405?amount=10] DONATE $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2405?amount=25] DONATE $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2405?amount=50]

Together, we can build a future without hate. Thanks for standing with me in this movement.

Yours in Equality,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Greg Stanton
subject: all eyes on Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend – Greg here.

I’m reaching out today with a quick request.

You’ve heard a lot from us – and probably from others, too – about how Maricopa County is a bellwether for Arizona and for the entire country.

That’s a big responsibility, team. Since our district lives entirely within Maricopa, it’s on us to run a field program big and effective enough to win, so that we can stop extremists from imposing their dangerous agenda on everyone.

The centuries-old abortion ban that Arizona Republicans instated (and only repealed after immense pressure from around the country) is just a taste of what we can expect if far-right extremists gain ground this November. We have the power to stop them, but only if our campaign has the resources it needs to use that power.

That’s why it’s so important we hit our fundraising goals, folks. My finance team tells me we’ve had a slow week, so I’m hoping this message will help turn things around.

Here’s that donation link again: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gsq22024?refcode=em_fr_2024.5.10_b1_gs_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gsq22024?refcode=em_fr_2024.5.10_b1_gs_all&amount=25]

Thank you so much for considering it!

Have a great weekend,

Greg

--------------
To learn more about Greg Stanton's work, visit StantonForArizona.com

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix, AZ 85018
United States

Emails are a really important way for our campaign to be in touch with our supporters. We share campaign updates, and important information as Greg Stanton runs for re-election. Supporters like you are key to our campaign's success, and we rely on folks like you stepping up to help when you can.

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may click here to request fewer emails [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xvAcwzHv3k-SMpa2Fyx1Uw2] from Greg's campaign.

clean_body: Friend – Greg here. I’m reaching out today with a quick request. You’ve heard a lot from us – and probably from others, too – about how Maricopa County is a bellwether for Arizona and for the entire country. That’s a big responsibility, team. Since our district lives entirely within Maricopa, it’s on us to run a field program big and effective enough to win, so that we can stop extremists from imposing their dangerous agenda on everyone. The centuries-old abortion ban that Arizona Republicans instated (and only repealed after immense pressure from around the country) is just a taste of what we can expect if far-right extremists gain ground this November. We have the power to stop them, but only if our campaign has the resources it needs to use that power. That’s why it’s so important we hit our fundraising goals, folks. My finance team tells me we’ve had a slow week, so I’m hoping this message will help turn things around. Here’s that donation link again: [] Thank you so much for considering it! Have a great weekend, Greg To learn more about Greg Stanton's work, visit StantonForArizona.com Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. clean_body: READ NOW | {defaultIfEmpty (capitalize firstName) "Friend"}}, This is game-changing. I was torn up about whether to send this message now or later, but there's no better time than now. I want you to hear it from me first: I'm endorsing KARI LAKE for the United States Senate. I've always been a straight shooter and always do what's right, not what's convenient. The fate of the country and the United States Senate will be decided in Arizona. NOW, FOR THE NEXT 10 MINUTES, I'm honored to give you a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to help my friend and Arizona's next Senator, Kari Lake. Ruben Gallego's running around the country like a rabid dog, collecting checks from leftist establishment donors like Hillary Clinton and George Soros. Are you America First? Do you love this country? Well, we need LOYAL PATRIOTS to help us win in 2024. We can't do it without you! The time to Save America is NOW, not LATER — Stand with KARI LAKE & PUT AMERICA FIRST. DONATE BELOW!** | Thank you! Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/JwIthG8HbL4kClnWVegABw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoIiyhP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1mcGYtc3BsaXQ_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDUxMV9lbV9mcl9iMV95ZXNvbjRzcGxpdF9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZ0hsUkRoN0FXVjdjbmpCS3B6Q0RHaklNOFMmcmVmY29kZTI9MmdIbFJEaDdBV1Y3Y25qQktwekNER2pJTThTJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJnSGxSRGg3QVdWN2NuakJLcHpDREdqSU04U1cDc3BjQgpmM6GnP2bBM0qcUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) This month, Gov. Ron DeSantis’ 6-week abortion ban went into effect in Florida – a near total ban that destroys the right to bodily autonomy for millions of people. Make no mistake, Peter: This is forced birth, and a fascist attack on Floridian’s rights and health. **But we have a chance to reverse it.** Amendment 4 would enshrine the right to abortion in Florida’s constitution, and it’s on the ballot this November. This is our best opportunity to end this ban and put healthcare decisions back in the hands of Floridians — _where they belong._ That’s why my campaign has been on the ground alongside Floridians Protecting Freedom, organizing and mobilizing voters to pass Amendment 4. **But we need your help to ramp up our organizing on the ground and reach more voters before anti-choice extremists bombard them with misinformation.** [**_So I’m asking every single person reading this to step up with a split donation to Floridians Protecting Freedom and my campaign so we can fight back and get Amendment 4 passed. You can [unsubscribe from this list](https://unsubscribe.emaildeputy.com/unsub?p=Fy%2FIX18wgUqZGnonwyX%2BCywfy8kQqmXn7%2BBqe0Kfg0Itex5DrvDPym7%2ByEBOq3%2Ft030XtMAJVz7QsB9TCKWPzRwyTnw1ATSWUlK%2BCWVIfauOfKoyRovv3rHzT3%2BZpMaOi6PsSW9NsP8Xb%2Bt77LKBF5gRMgijAwCxj3AFN4sbYt6ASzIkdJlRZe78Ya6%2Fqe7qmxgNpHDBppq9H%2BqMTOhs7rKGtBbJNEIvwqJfkgcaYo0%3D).
