name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr’s Personal Message & Best Selling Merch!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Do I Want to Debate President Trump? You bet I do!

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience!
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=2) \- Monday, May 13th at 7:30 PM
Austin Voter Rally with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Nicole Shanahan and special guests JP Sears, Jessica Sutta, The Jonathan Moody band, and Ryland Engelhart! This is a FREE event with an opportunity to join a pre-rally [private reception](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-rally-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=3).
[Nashville, Tennessee](https://www.kennedy24.com/country-and-comedy-nashville?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=4) \- Wednesday, May 15th at 7:00 PM
Our third "Night of Laughter with RFK Jr." will be held at the iconic Ryman Auditorium and feature Nicole Shanahan, Russell Brand, and comic legends Rob Schneider and Jim Breuer, along with musical shooting stars and other surprise guests.
[Castle Rock, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/castlerock-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=5) \- Saturday May 18th at 6:30 PM
Join us for an intimate reception with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the serene setting of Castle Rock, CO, where you'll enjoy an evening of engaging conversation, delightful hors d'oeuvres, and cocktails.
[Aurora, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-co-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=6) \- Sunday May 19th at 3:00 PM
Catch RFK Jr. in Denver on May 19th for a dynamic rally at The Hangar at Stanley Marketplace. This is a FREE event with an opportunity to join a pre-rally [private reception](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-rally-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=7).
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austinweb3?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=8) \- Friday, May 31st at 7:00 PM
Join Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for a private fireside chat discussing blockchain, bitcoin, and Web3 community. Secure your spot for this limited-capacity event and engage in meaningful discussions directly with RFK Jr.
[Santa Monica, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/santa-monica-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=9) \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM
Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity.
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=10) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
* * *
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/country-and-comedy-nashville?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_10_24_a1&n=11)
* * *
RFK Jr.: Do I Want to Debate President Trump?
You bet I do!
I'm excited to share that I have invited President Trump to join me in a formal debate at the Libertarian Convention on May 24th and 25th.
He has often stated he's ready to debate "anytime, anyplace," and has specifically mentioned he would take me on if my poll numbers were strong.
I respect President Trump's political acumen, but I believe I bring a unique perspective that can directly challenge him on several critical issues. I want to talk about his record.
More particularly, I want to talk to him about his decision to lock down 3.3 million businesses during his presidency, a move that shifted $4 trillion in wealth away from American workers and the middle class to a new oligarchy of billionaires.
It's vital for the American people to hear a candid discussion about these actions, which have had profound impacts on our country's economic landscape and the lives of millions.
**Your support is crucial.** While Trump’s campaign might be calculating their odds, I'm ready to challenge the narrative and showcase my vision for America's future.

name: Texans for Vaccine Choice
subject: Do You Remember This?
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDc3ODE0MDEwNjg3MjY1Nzc4JmM9dzduMiZlPTAmYj0xMzE4NTgxMTk2JmQ9YzhiM3U0ZA==.BliRIycPEFyl7WgaoW_YlsbfdNUD3NAjBIu8dE6stFY)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Peter,

It wasn't long ago when our freedoms and livelihoods were threatened by the government when they violated our informed consent through vaccine mandates.
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDc3ODE0MDEwNjg3MjY1Nzc4JmM9dzduMiZlPTAmYj0xMzE4NTgxMjAxJmQ9czF6NGMxYw==.UlUfGR8alzoXpUOU8oUSzlGJ6YxGPOM-T-w180yol-8)
---
| | |
We were told that in order to travel, work, and be an active member of society, we would have to get "the jab." **That's when TFVC stepped in**. Over the last 4 years, we have fought back and won when our elected officials passed bans on vaccine passports and forced experimental jabs. **But the fight is far from over** \- that’s why we continue to push for vaccine choice, informed consent, and medical privacy in Texas! And with the Republican Party of Texas (RPT) State Convention quickly approaching in under two weeks, we need to make sure delegates remember the mistakes of the past so they make vaccine choice a top priority on the future party platform and priorities. Without a voice to advocate for vaccine choice and informed consent, the government would have full sway over your medical decisions. [Give to TFVC today](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDc3ODE0MDEwNjg3MjY1Nzc4JmM9dzduMiZlPTAmYj0xMzE4NTgxMjA1JmQ9cjN3MXk4cw==.RUg3lI5t7MkPhx58bhPtx7OkxLBfxBA5KZcjDR91UE8) to help us secure medical privacy for every Texan!

---
| | | | [Chip In NOW!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDc3ODE0MDEwNjg3MjY1Nzc4JmM9dzduMiZlPTAmYj0xMzE4NTgxMjE1JmQ9djFtOGgxeg==.We7Mr9LX8sVjob6ylX9XDEZu374XP7pPln2orSPDOdg)
---
---
| | | ****By influencing policy and providing quality educational resources, TFVC is able to mobilize and sustain support for the medical liberty movement! Your contribution of[$100, $76, $45, or just $15](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDc3ODE0MDEwNjg3MjY1Nzc4JmM9dzduMiZlPTAmYj0xMzE4NTgxMjE5JmQ9aDVyOW83Zg==.-8y5BVF2BrDPFCCka4H7E1qZ5WF_xzULLHnGdy6OtSk) ensures our organization can continue to function in this critical time! All Texans should be able to make their own vaccine decisions without pressure from employers or the government. Your support gives us the resources we need to continue to spread awareness for the cause! We appreciate your help in growing the vaccine choice movement.

---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Gratefully,
---
| Rebecca Hardy
---
---
President, TFVC
---
| |
---
| P.S. TFVC will make sure vaccine choice is a top priority at RPT - will you join us in support with a contribution of just $15?[](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDc3ODE0MDEwNjg3MjY1Nzc4JmM9dzduMiZlPTAmYj0xMzE4NTgxMjIzJmQ9ZTVpNXIzYg==.x390kVQIG62JoMgPnblVBbohEKtg7xntH1ybtMbUwrU)

body:
A difficult decision
| | |
---
Friend, our race is already living up to the headlines:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84778526/472588781/1800132588?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1202-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTJlNmQ1OGQtY2QwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J3AdWYQXu_uiG6XTJoB4RjyLcRmQuqZ85IzuL9g4sUA=)
Mitch McConnell aligned super PACs are spending more in Ohio than in any Senate race _ever_ , and Sherrod's self-funding, Trump-backed opponent, Bernie Moreno, has already poured $4.5 MILLION of his personal fortune into this race to try to buy this seat.
**That's why we're urgently asking:** [**Will you rush $5 or more ahead of our critical mid-month deadline to split between our campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s to help us reach our fundraising goal, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84778527/472588782/1800132588?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1202-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTJlNmQ1OGQtY2QwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J3AdWYQXu_uiG6XTJoB4RjyLcRmQuqZ85IzuL9g4sUA=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84778528/472588783/-31196584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1202-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTJlNmQ1OGQtY2QwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J3AdWYQXu_uiG6XTJoB4RjyLcRmQuqZ85IzuL9g4sUA=)
---
It's not just Ohio on the line, friend. Experts say this race will decide Senate control – which is why Republicans are going all out to defeat Sherrod.
Sherrod's fighting tirelessly for the Dignity of Work – but he's running a true grassroots campaign, meaning he's relying on folks like you to power us to victory. **But with time running out before our mid-month deadline, we're on track to fall short of our goal.**
[**So please, before midnight, rush $5, $25, whatever you can spare, to split between our campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s to help Sherrod fight back against the GOP's attacks, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84778529/472588784/1800132588?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1202-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTJlNmQ1OGQtY2QwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J3AdWYQXu_uiG6XTJoB4RjyLcRmQuqZ85IzuL9g4sUA=)
Your support makes a huge difference to our grassroots campaign. Thanks for coming through.
– Team Sherrod
|

| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84778530/472588785/-31196584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1202-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTJlNmQ1OGQtY2QwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J3AdWYQXu_uiG6XTJoB4RjyLcRmQuqZ85IzuL9g4sUA=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Thanks for coming through. – Team Sherrod | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Gaza Update, Stand with Students, Dark Money Targets Progressives, Maryland Uncommitted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Pressure Builds for Peace in Gaza | Stand with Student
Protestors | Dark Money Targets Susheela Jayapal for Congress | New
Endorsements in TX & NY | MD Uncommitted Vote Tuesday | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17429?t=1011&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Donate to Our Revolution today — or sign up for a monthly donation — to
help us defeat Trump, elect progressives, and advance the push for peace.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

The world is watching in horror as air strikes and tanks roll into the
southern Gazan city of Rafah, where 1.3 million people have taken refuge
from Netanyahu’s war.

Our Revolution stands in solidarity with students and helped mobilize over
600,000 “Uncommitted” Peace voters in battleground states and beyond to
demand an end to the violence. We’ve helped create outside grassroots
pressure while our allies in the Congressional Progressive Caucus push on
the inside to get President Biden to halt weapons to Israel in light of
the Rafah invasion.

As Bernie said, “We can no longer be complicit in Netanyahu’s horrific war
against the Palestinian people.” Due to the overwhelming advocacy by our
pro-Peace movement across the country, President Biden has started to
shift his Gaza policy.

Our collective action is working - Biden just halted a bomb shipment to
Israel and said he will continue withholding weapons shipments until
Netanyahu ends his ground offensive in Rafah.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17430?t=1012&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]We must keep up the pressure. Demand a permanent end to U.S. complicity
in the massacre in Gaza

★ ★ ★

The backlash we’re seeing against students exercising their First
Amendment rights to protest for Peace is unacceptable. Period.

“Students and young people are stepping forward as brave, moral leaders in
this moment, and Our Revolution will continue to have their backs," OR
Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17732?t=1013&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Atlanta Daily World. “We’re
heartened by the solidarity for peace even as the horrors in Gaza and the
retaliation against students weighs heavy on us all.”

For six months, President Biden has allowed American weapons to be used in
the atrocities against Palestine. His latest policy shift may not be
enough to avert massive protests descending on the Democratic National
Convention in Chicago this August, according to the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17735?t=1014&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Associated Press.

“The DNC is likely to become a flashpoint because these movements are
going to continue to escalate,” Joseph Geevarghese, executive director of
Our Revolution, told the AP. “I can see a replay of 1968, unless the
administration does a course correction.”

“There is widespread discontent among progressive voters, young people,
people of color — the progressive voting bloc writ large that he needs in
order to win,” Joseph said. "I’m not sure if the administration fully
recognizes the danger leading into the convention and the optics that
could be created.”

Bottom-line: Our movement is directly telling the president to change
course or risk the political consequences.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17734?t=1015&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]ADD YOUR NAME: CALL FOR PEACE IN GAZA

★ ★ ★

The next front in the fight is the Maryland primary! Our Revolution is
mobilizing our 137,000 members in Maryland to vote “uncommitted” in the
Democratic primary on Tuesday.

Our Revolution has been at the vanguard of the “Vote Uncommitted” movement
- we’re using the ballot box to pressure the Biden Administration to end
its unconditional support for Netyanahu’s brutal war in Gaza.

"Enough is enough. We have all borne witness to the unspeakable suffering
in Gaza — tragedy after tragedy that is being met with performative
rhetoric,” Our Rev Exec Director Joseph Geevarghese wrote in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17736?t=1016&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]The
Baltimore Sun.

“If President Biden’s reported outrage behind closed doors does not
translate to real policy shifts that hold Netanyahu accountable, he will
continue to disenfranchise the Democratic base and risk a return of Trump
to the White House.”

Our Revolution leaders rallied with the Listen to Maryland coalition on
Monday and joined a live online event to get out the vote for Uncommitted.

OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese spoke alongside Palestinian
voices, local leaders and student protestors.

“Two powerful protest movements are converging at the ballot box,”
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17737?t=1017&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Joseph told the crowd. “College demonstrators and pro-peace
progressives are joining forces to call on our fellow citizens to vote
Uncommitted and send the President a message about Gaza he cannot ignore -
Peace Now!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16897?t=1018&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]DONATE NOW to keep up the momentum and Get Out the Uncommitted Vote!
Every dollar helps us to reach more Maryland voters to cast their ballot
for Peace.

★ ★ ★

Sen. Bernie Sanders and US Rep. Ro Khanna just teamed up to introduce a
new bill to cancel all existing medical debt and wipe it from all credit
reports!

“People in our country should not be going bankrupt because they got
cancer and could not afford to pay their medical bills,” Bernie said.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17738?t=1019&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Read more in The Guardian.

40% of Americans have medical debt, and it has become the leading cause of
bankruptcy — even for those with health insurance. And, 25% of Americans
say they’ve skipped healthcare due to costs.

In the lead-up to the legislative introduction, Our Revolution hosted a
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17739?t=1020&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]town hall with uninsured patients struggling to make ends meet and
Rep. Khanna, and did lobbying visits on Capitol Hill to shape the bill.

This is unjust and unsustainable. It’s time for Congress to wipe the slate
clean and pass the Medical Debt Cancelation Act to end the burden of
sky-high medical bills once and for all.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17740?t=1021&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]ADD YOUR NAME: Stand with Bernie and Ro to demand an end to Medical
Debt in America.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Sen. Bernie Sanders has joined us in endorsing Susheela Jayapal for
Congress because she is a powerful voice for abortion rights, Medicare for
All, peace, democracy, wages, housing, climate, and more.

Now, Sen. Jeff Merkley has spoken out against the dark money pouring into
Oregon’s 3rd District: “I strongly condemn the dark money campaign
underway to smear Susheela Jayapal and any other dark money campaigns that
are underway or planned,” he said.

More than $3 million is being spent on attack ads against Susheela and to
prop up her opponent, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17741?t=1022&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Portland Mercury reported, but she has people
power at her back. Susheela and her sister, Pramila Jayapal, were joined
by the grassroots to knock more than 2,000 doors last weekend alone.

“Democratic voters here have made it very clear they don’t want AIPAC and
MAGA money interfering in their primaries,” Andrea Cervone, Jayapal’s
campaign manager, said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17742?t=1023&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Read the full story by The Intercept on how AIPAC money is targeting
Susheela Jayapal in this critical congressional race here.

Susheela is an AIPAC target, just like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Jamaal
Bowman, and Pramila, because she has spoken out for the human rights of
Palestinians — and stands against corporate power.

Like Bernie said this week: “The billionaires who fund these SuperPACs are
not only concerned about protecting Israel’s right to do whatever it
wants, but also about protecting corporate interests.”

“And you have a lot of wonderful members of the House of Representatives,
who have stood up for the working class, have taken on corporate
interests, and have also expressed their deep concern with what Israel is
doing in Gaza,” Bernie continued. “What you’re seeing, and this is the
corruption of the American political system.”

He rightly points out that these are some of the best people in Congress,
adding: “I’m going to do my best to protect them and defend them.” We here
at Our Revolution completely agree, and will be working overtime to
protect elected progressives under attack.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1024&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]DONATE TO HELP US DEFEND AND EXPAND PROGRESSIVE POWER IN CONGRESS IN
2024

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENTS!

We need progressives at every level of government. That’s why we’re
excited to endorse Annette Ramirez for Tax Assessor Collector in Harris
County, Texas.

She plans to prioritize collections against corporations and big
businesses over homeowners and work for language justice and same day
voter registration.

Annette beat out 5 other candidates and now heads to the May 28th runoff
election! This important public office is charged with maintaining and
improving election integrity in the nation’s third-most populous county.

Winning this seat will allow a progressive to remain in charge of voter
registration rolls. We cannot risk a Republican getting this seat and the
ability to 'clean' the voter rolls and make it harder to vote.

★ ★ ★

Claire Cousin has our endorsement for NY Assembly District 206 because she
embodies the spirit of grassroots activism and is deeply committed to
putting working families first.

Claire is the co-founder of the Hudson/Catskill Housing Coalition and the
first Black woman elected to the Columbia County Board of Supervisors.

Her top priorities of affordability, climate action, housing rights, and
education investment reflect the urgent needs of the district.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1025&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Donate any amount to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to make sure we
can mobilize our grassroots activists to get out the vote in each of these
key races!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution Massachusetts invites you to The UnConvention — a LIVE
online event June 2nd for progressives to organize around key issues and
get active in the political process this critical election year.

Keynote speakers include: Robert Kuttner, co-founder/co-editor of The
American Prospect and a Professor at Brandeis University’s Heller School,
who has written extensively on the failures of the Massachusetts
Democratic Party; and Danielle Allen, a James Bryant Conant University
Professor at Harvard University, who will speak on “Voice and Choice: Key
Reforms to Make Democracy Real.”

The UnConvention is being organized by The Massachusetts Progressive
Action Organizing Committee (MPAOC) — a coalition of MA state-wide
political and community organizations and was formed to increase
progressive political power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17743?t=1026&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]REGISTER FOR THE EVENT HERE

★ ★ ★

Our movement worked hard to elect the largest Congressional Progressive
Caucus in history. Now, we must defend these seats against $100 million in
AIPAC funding being spent to try to unseat some of our strongest voices
for Peace in Congress.

Allies like Rashida Tlaib, Pramila Jayapal, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar,
Delia Ramirez, and Cori Bush are running for re-election, and Our
Revolution will have their back!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1027&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Chip in to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to help us out-organize big
money and re-elect our top progressive allies in Congress.

★ ★ ★

As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political action
group, Our Revolution relies on our members to power our work.

In 2024, we’re on a mission to stop a return of Trump while growing
progressive power in Congress and beyond to fight back against the far
right and corporate extremists trying to hijack our democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16333?t=1028&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Sign up TODAY with a $10 monthly donation and you’ll get our 2024
sticker pack. For $27 a month, you’ll also get a handy tote bag. And, for
$50 a month, we’ll send you both plus the official Our Revolution T-shirt!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1029&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1030&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport._Ro8z9&t=1007&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport.HCFlph&t=1010&akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5964%2E5885482%2EpvyrTJ

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

body:
Bad news: Trump and his far-right allies are bombarding President Biden and Democrats with attack ads. Good news: Biden is delivering for the American people day in and day out. | |
---
Dear Derek, **We’ll start with the bad news:** Donald Trump and his far-right allies are bombarding President Biden and Democrats with attack ads on TV and the internet. They’re putting these ads up and they’re spreading lies and misinformation about the president and the upcoming election. **But we have good news to share as well:** President Biden and Democrats nationwide are delivering for the American people _day in and day out._ The Biden-Harris administration has created a record 15 million new jobs, more than 16 million Americans are enrolled in health care coverage through the Affordable Care Act, and they’re working to protect Social Security and Medicare for generations to come. While we always hope that this good news will outweigh the bad, the truth is that winning elections takes more than hope. **So, we’re calling on you, Derek: Can you donate $7 to ensure our country keeps moving forward with that spirit of hope?** Every dollar we receive from generous supporters like you fuels our fight against attacks from MAGA extremists and pushes us closer to victory for President Biden and Vice President Harris, Democrats up and down the ballot, and, ultimately, the American people.

Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=eaea57d1d0a7478993dce33fadca70ea&_e=BIECjeSGifDLmmO432rO25IJXiDdLwK5gMGfsgH3R93UoxAMGmpcVbebOsBJcrFZXslVfEYwmfgzBxmdJ4s1xRaPgejTxfGW8WwpyPYZPzFB6eXQ4Ftnb9zsLN8uAY1CxzyR9qarfwjkHlpFaLFBA-dy3O9DZn1YgMbk2nGc6w7ZOc62r-KtMEdlKF0dskBDH8JHGDlKCf7eVOFtrDtZ86oANWhsImLZAZFskZyJZ1bGDqmen9m5RozTtFDsD-ZWNQ2ENLUevUUBMTcuqYX-e55VDoxEAQQPiYyG0x1uDdJDwL4pJ1uILSN2co7_oEM8-S0j2JKsgRR9oSVgmKa_0hgMhM2aLgTrieuVgvdQKpS2f-JOmy0xnFYHyugTHZ7P7wVARUhkdkCIyM-xftBDi9iuAUgkWc6CjCyfNCZQIPXgRFQjERNMJegdWzXTavSKEp2XTwDYlVgXQyYgfqqx4Q%3D%3D)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

---
Peter,

Mother's Day is tomorrow, and I want to extend my heartfelt wishes to all the incredible moms across Alaska. With four children and eleven grandchildren of my own, I've been blessed to experience the profound joy and responsibility of motherhood firsthand. Mother's Day is not only a time to celebrate the remarkable women who have raised us, nurtured us, and guided us, but it's also an opportunity to reflect on the future we envision for our beloved Alaska. As your candidate for Congress, I believe in putting Alaska First and fighting for the conservative ideals that have shaped our state's short history. I am committed to ensuring Alaska always leads the way North to the Future. Together, we will build a brighter tomorrow for our children and grandchildren, where the Alaska story lives on. From my family to yours, I wish you all a Happy Mother's Day filled with love. Warm regards,
---

** **✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson** **✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik** **✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise** **✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer** **✅ Winning for Women PAC**

**Signing The Taxpayer Protection Pledge** I signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge because I am a battle-tested conservative who keeps my promises. I will not raise taxes on hardworking Alaskans and Americans, and I am willing to put my name on that promise. Joe Biden’s failing economic policies, rubber-stamped by Democrats in Congress including Mary Peltola, are forcing people to make needless, tough decisions with their dollars that don’t go as far. I will work to get people’s money WORKING for them, not make them overwork for their money.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Mother's Day is tomorrow, and I want to extend my heartfelt wishes to all the incredible moms across Alaska. With four children and eleven grandchildren of my own, I've been blessed to experience the profound joy and responsibility of motherhood firsthand. Mother's Day is not only a time to celebrate the remarkable women who have raised us, nurtured us, and guided us, but it's also an opportunity to reflect on the future we envision for our beloved Alaska. As your candidate for Congress, I believe in putting Alaska First and fighting for the conservative ideals that have shaped our state's short history. I am committed to ensuring Alaska always leads the way North to the Future. Together, we will build a brighter tomorrow for our children and grandchildren, where the Alaska story lives on. From my family to yours, I wish you all a Happy Mother's Day filled with love. Warm regards, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | We have the momentum with the support of conservative leaders in Alaska and across the country. They're on Team Dahlstrom, and I cannot wait to join them to help get America back on track! ✅ Anne Garland Young, Widow of Don Young ✅ Congressional Leadership Fund ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC | | | Signing The Taxpayer Protection Pledge I signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge because I am a battle-tested conservative who keeps my promises. I will not raise taxes on hardworking Alaskans and Americans, and I am willing to put my name on that promise. Joe Biden’s failing economic policies, rubber-stamped by Democrats in Congress including Mary Peltola, are forcing people to make needless, tough decisions with their dollars that don’t go as far. I will work to get people’s money WORKING for them, not make them overwork for their money. | | Mary “Present” Peltola Fails Alaskans Again It's time to see through the smoke and mirrors of Mary Peltola's political games. Her "present" vote is a clear indication that party politics take precedence over our state's prosperity. Alaska's economy is at stake, yet Peltola's actions speak volumes about where her priorities lie. Her decision to put her seat above Alaska's needs is a betrayal of the trust placed in her. | | | | Show your support for our campaign wherever you go! Grab a bumper sticker and show off your support for someone who embodies Alaskan values. | It's time to retire Mary Peltola! Week after week, month after month, Mary Peltola is abandoning Alaskan values to appease Joe Biden and the radical left. Thankfully, the dedicated volunteers at the Alaska GOP are keeping track of her destructive behavior. Once again, Mary “Present” Peltola failed to stand up for Alaskans and help pass the “Alaska’s Right to Produce Act.” In fact, she ENCOURAGED her Democrat colleagues to vote “no” on the legislation. | Thanks for scrolling through another Dahlstrom Dispatch! With your support, we can restore Alaska's conservative voice in congress. Can't donate? No problem. There are many ways that you can get involved. clean_body: I'm embarrassed | Friend, Let me tell you - I can barely contain my excitement. I just received some EXCELLENT news from one of my friends that brought me to tears. **I haven 't cried like this since 2019 when LSU beat Alabama. It's time to grab a box of tissues and cry some tears of joy because I'm about to give you some news that just might save our Red Wave. Moses might have well parted the red sea a second time because this is a MIRACLE. A Patriotic GODSEND has called and said the 6 words that every campaign wants to hear. "I'm offering you a 1300% match." I 'll tell you - I had to call my Lawyer and ask if this was legal. | I was sure I 'd see hell freeze over before I got this phone call. In case you're not looking at your calendar, this offer couldn't come at a better time. Best, Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. | | Peter, I wanted to personally reach out and not only tell you a little bit about myself, but also thank you for joining our fight to win in SC-01. I’m a proud wife and mother of 3, businesswoman, and conservative. [**And I’m running for Congress to deliver serious conservative results for the Lowcountry.**](http://link.templetonforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ceccdd4390ee46a1bba999dfc3e5b967&_m=de1a95217aac40f7aed428457a71a677&_e=u6W5L_Cg-4hwM-OZFw2Rv7dGpNo1C-s8NvOetehVEGPFP3LcycY-OwzmzKUnQirquJBC6FqdbHDGiB9-C8y-CAI5jYHs8tQ3XsPaxKJogTDIEMTctJDtaWMYmZjN53IXJWhRw1_zv2ltLV8IGq7u-wkzDr04sINuwc09ch1VgjW0O2Zi9aWYav6X2P4-GuqFNuE41Zamg91YsENv4c6nfdBnZ0qDHVmZGTqJYS6oUOvS5cj_K8ePQ5gmE9MDPWU_3VJ3qQ2zWAZA9aaQLyCsdkH24Zw2pfG-QsA8FQAork2dpwUl2VPzsG-qmwnSINiO8e4SiIk5Hmr1WsSkfjlKbTde6Obo7cixaFvIoUe3JssABVv0MNKjKDQFMyZHA3UnQUN6a9sgRzuVFZ62FczkGiOaw3yFQN3NtWm7drzd3V3AolfNIoP0zJDnL3gcoueR)

| | I’ve taken on the Obama-Biden Administration...and they sued me personally. That never stopped me. _In fact, it fueled me. _ From the courtroom to the boardroom of a major manufacturer I founded, I have fought to win for the people I represent...** _a_ _nd I plan to bring that same energy to Congress. _** **The truth is,****America is in trouble****. Our Southern Border is overrun. Rampant crime is making our cities unlivable. Out of control inflation has made everyday expenses unaffordable, while our so-called “leaders” in Washington ship our jobs overseas.** I think I speak for us all when I say we’re tired of the showmanship and antics in Washington while our families struggle at home. Peter, I’m ready to fight for our families, for South Carolina, and for our nation. I’m a fighter with a record to prove it, and I’m ready to take that fight to the next level: in Washington. [**_But I can’t get there without your support._**](http://link.templetonforcongress.com/u/click?_t=ceccdd4390ee46a1bba999dfc3e5b967&_m=de1a95217aac40f7aed428457a71a677&_e=u6W5L_Cg-4hwM-OZFw2Rv7dGpNo1C-s8NvOetehVEGPFP3LcycY-OwzmzKUnQirquJBC6FqdbHDGiB9-C8y-CAI5jYHs8tQ3XsPaxKJogTDIEMTctJDtaWMYmZjN53IXJWhRw1_zv2ltLV8IGq7u-wkzDr04sINuwc09ch1VgjW0O2Zi9aWYav6X2P4-GuqFNuE41Zamg91YsENv4c6nfdBnZ0qDHVmZGTqJYS6oUOvS5cj_K8ePQ5gmE9MDPWU_3VJ3qQ2zWAZA9aaQLyCsdlq6fgK1p2blrx--uIN4fPy5Kl00J6_Z6tQk9C7Z1hloLL7W7A8nt1pml2iUgXHwPIVamevVvC5AAsyaHLRw2fboiTbJGJgFNHR1tcsaQ-rAXzyFwvp9FsW3m7oN89FnAwQ3ID8__TlVZgPi3V9_Peg4Y9uRY8IJfNsYtXoOVL3H) Sincerely,Catherine **Catherine Templeton** _Candidate for Congress in SC-01_

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
Let's have some fun this afternoon. Here are some facts about me that I bet you didn't know, including what I like to do when I'm rarely not campaigning for Congress.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Wab.png]
If you're able to chip in to support an everyday hardworking Yooper running for Congress, I would greatly appreciate your support. Friends, thank you.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $20.24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q1bl?express_lane=true&amount=20.24&refcode=express_lane_20.24]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q1bl]
What do you miss most when on the campaign trail?
My home, my family, and my friends
What is your favorite evening?
Small gatherings with friends discussing issues and listening to their stories
Where is your favorite place to be?
Home.
How do you keep your sanity?
Faith and hope.
Why are you running for Congress?
For my grandchildren.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/333331880_6275736075804022_8904139870242530018_n.jpg]
What do you do for exercise?
I do a lot of "enjoyable physical activities," skiing and snowshoeing in the winter and hiking and biking in the summer. I also love the elliptical, where I can double-dip and read at the same time.
What is one of your personal struggles?
Many Americans struggle with their weight, as do I.
Favorite music?
I like music that gives me hope and tells a story. I enjoy many genres, but folk and soft rock are among the ones I listen to the most. I also like country, pop, jazz, and worship. James Taylor is my favorite artist.
Favorite color
Baby blue.
Favorite Holiday?
Christmas.
What is a character trait people underestimate?
Curiosity.
What would be a perfect summer day off?
Coffee, sitting outside on the porch in the morning, followed by reading and learning. Then golf with friends followed by pickleball and a bike ride – the trifecta of enjoyable activity. Cocktails and a pontoon ride. Dinner followed by a campfire
What time do you get up?
It varies, but around 5-6 am.
Favorite food?
Do I really have to answer? Grilled hamburgers
Favorite vegetable?
Brussel sprouts
Fruit?
Apple
Favorite Drink?
Sparkling water. Red wine, IPA beer
Favorite type of movie?
I love dramas based on true stories with happy endings.
What is your favorite movie, and why?
For me, "The Shawshank Redemption" stands out. It tells a strong moral story about the power of hope, friendship, perseverance, and the human spirit to overcome even the most challenging circumstances. The movie portrays how to maintain dignity, integrity, and hope for the future.
"What About Bob" is funny.
Books?
I like non-fiction. The last two books I read were on world history and another on world religions. Right now, "Renegades: Born in the USA" by Bruce Springsteen and Barack Obama is on my coffee table.
How much time do you spend learning or reading each day?
Three or four hours.
How long have you been married?
42 years on May 15, 2024
What do you tell patients the most important thing they can do to stay healthy?
Have a sense of purpose, smile, laugh and cry, eat healthy, sleep well, don't smoke, commit to enjoyable physical activities, and be part of your community.
I heard you have many cousins.
Thirty six on my Dad's side of the family. My mom was essentially an orphan with an unfortunate story, so I never knew that side of the family.
Tell me about your friends.
One of my diplomatic friends shared this with me. We all have several types of friends.
*
Just
Friends
:
friends
I
enjoy
spending
time
with
but
not
necessarily
deeply
involved
in
my
life
*
Rust
Friends
:
friends
for
many,
many
years.
*
Must
Friends
:
These
friends
are
indispensable
in
my
life,
those
you
can't
imagine
living
without.
All of them are important to me. And, Friends, so are you. If you can contribute today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q1bl] so we can continue our non-stop momentum running for Congress, I would be very grateful.
Have a great Saturday!
Yours,
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat / MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q1bl]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR. BOB

Coffee, sitting outside on the porch in the morning, followed by reading and learning. Then golf with friends followed by pickleball and a bike ride – the trifecta of enjoyable activity. Cocktails and a pontoon ride. Dinner followed by a campfire What time do you get up? It varies, but around 5-6 am. Favorite food? Do I really have to answer? Grilled hamburgers Favorite vegetable? Brussel sprouts Fruit? Apple Favorite Drink? Sparkling water. Red wine, IPA beer Favorite type of movie? I love dramas based on true stories with happy endings. What is your favorite movie, and why? For me, "The Shawshank Redemption" stands out. It tells a strong moral story about the power of hope, friendship, perseverance, and the human spirit to overcome even the most challenging circumstances. The movie portrays how to maintain dignity, integrity, and hope for the future. "What About Bob" is funny. Books? I like non-fiction. The last two books I read were on world history and another on world religions. Right now, "Renegades: Born in the USA" by Bruce Springsteen and Barack Obama is on my coffee table. How much time do you spend learning or reading each day? Three or four hours. How long have you been married? 42 years on May 15, 2024 What do you tell patients the most important thing they can do to stay healthy? Have a sense of purpose, smile, laugh and cry, eat healthy, sleep well, don't smoke, commit to enjoyable physical activities, and be part of your community. I heard you have many cousins. Thirty six on my Dad's side of the family. My mom was essentially an orphan with an unfortunate story, so I never knew that side of the family. Tell me about your friends. One of my diplomatic friends shared this with me. We all have several types of friends. Just Friends : friends I enjoy spending time with but not necessarily deeply involved in my life Rust Friends : friends for many, many years. * Must Friends : These friends are indispensable in my life, those you can't imagine living without. All of them are important to me. And, Friends, so are you. If you can contribute today [] so we can continue our non-stop momentum running for Congress, I would be very grateful. Have a great Saturday! Yours, -Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat / MI01 [] CONTRIBUTE [] Or, send a check to Friends of Dr. Bob PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR. BOB

subject: RESPOND: Are you proud to be an American?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, every day, we wake up thankful to be in the greatest country on earth.

It’s our hardworking small business owners. It’s our law enforcement officers and first responders. And it’s our brave service members who are putting their lives on the line to defend our freedom. These folks and others make up our great country, and we’re proud of it.

We hope you are proud too.

We hope you are proud too. | | | | | | | | | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record-high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

Josh Hawley was elected to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2018. Since then, he’s led the charge to overturn Roe v. Wade, paved the way for Missouri’s extreme abortion ban, and even co-sponsored a federal abortion ban in the U.S. Senate.
**Now, Missourians have a chance to hold him accountable — in more ways than one.**
This year, we’re voting directly on an initiative to enshrine abortion rights into Missouri’s constitution — ending our state’s total abortion ban and ensuring the right for every Missourian to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives.
_We’ve seen measures like this one turn out voters and pass overwhelmingly in red states like Kansas, Kentucky, and Ohio since Roe was overturned in 2022._
**And this won’t be the first time Missourians take back their power.**
Since Hawley’s last election, voters have gone way beyond what control-obsessed politicians in Jeff City and DC are willing to allow — approving measures to raise the minimum wage, expand health care, and legalize weed, all with huge margins.
**This election is our only chance to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban and to hold Josh Hawley accountable — and we really can make it happen.[So please, will you help us get it done this November by chipping in anything you can right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49718?refcode=em20240511-5490&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5490%2E614464%2EJC3vL2)**

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Take action for Mother Earth this Mother's Day and get a free card for the moms in your life!
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMra_ ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwe7V_

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11002920&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTk4MDIxODgzMgS2&spReportId=MTk4MDIxODgzMgS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11002920&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTk4MDIxODgzMgS2&spReportId=MTk4MDIxODgzMgS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s8jm-qQ0/bWJtVzloRnRsbzZBbmdxRFQ5c2NwNzVSQXVGU2RqUXJwN1gyK2xRUVdIN2xnTUhrRXl5RHQ5TGkwZ2dLVkEwRmFVaXA4Yk51Q1l3Q201VDk3aGJyY1FoWTQ4OWRXTUtGSDNLUlhHY3M1bzg9S0/

clean_body: our race is already living up to the headlines | | | Friend, our race is already living up to the headlines: = Mitch McConnell aligned super PACs are spending more in Ohio than in any Senate race ever, and Sherrod's self-funding, Trump-backed opponent, Bernie Moreno, has already poured $4.5 MILLION of his personal fortune into this race to try to buy this seat. That's why we're urgently asking: = | | = It's not just Ohio on the line, friend. Experts say this race will decide Senate control – which is why Republicans are going all out to defeat Sherrod. Sherrod's fighting tirelessly for the Dignity of Work – but he's running a true grassroots campaign, meaning he's relying on folks like you to power us to victory. But with time running out, we're on track to fall short of our goal. = Your support makes a huge difference to our grassroots campaign. Thanks for coming through. – Team Sherrod | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
|
#
---
546 votes: That was the margin of victory in Lauren Boebert’s last race. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84781274/472597619/-2031156702?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MQG_AC30_20240511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhhMDI2ZS1kOTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zY4T4Dqilh-jquBxFpHxgvvwrmItdvL_1N9_7kxQWh0=) That’s not all. In the same year, Democrat Yadira Caraveo won by just over 1,500 votes. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84781276/472597620/-2031156702?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MQG_AC30_20240511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhhMDI2ZS1kOTBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zY4T4Dqilh-jquBxFpHxgvvwrmItdvL_1N9_7kxQWh0=) Colorado was home to some of the closest House races in the country in 2022. Millions of dollars poured into the state — _and these races were decided by less than 1 percentage point._ Now with the GOP’s House majority hanging on by just 4 seats, you can bet the same high spending is already happening this election. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: A Milestone Event, The Frederick Douglass Celebration
body:
Celebrate a great American, a great Republican, by the sea | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=f761f864f9)
---
|
---
# The Frederick Douglass Celebration
A Great American, A Great Republican
**You are Invited to a Milestone Event**
_In Branford, CT, we are taking the lead in rebranding the Republican party and fighting against the false narratives that the GOP are racists, homophobes, and all the other intersectional labels that Democrats throw at us. We know they do this because they cannot stand on their record of abject oppression of minorities and the working class._
_We want to invite you to an event that highlights the Republican Party's inclusive roots, dating back to 1863 when people like Frederick Douglass transformed the Abolitionist movement into the Republican Party. The party has always stood for inclusivity and the rights of all Americans, no matter their skin color or any other objective identity._
_We are excited to announce the first-ever Frederick Douglass Celebration, where the Branford Republicans will pay homage to a great American and an exceptional Republican - Frederick Douglass._

[Click Here for Tickets, Sponsorships, Advertising ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=7a12c5d5e6&e=8763c56857)
|
---
# Download the Invitation and Share
[Click Here for Tickets, Sponsorships, Advertising ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=76c33521c6&e=8763c56857)
|
---
# Why Frederick Douglass?
**A Force for Uniting the United States:** Frederick Douglass serves as a powerful symbol for Republicans to promote the values and principles that make our nation unique. He was born into slavery in 1818, but later became one of the leading advocates for reuniting our nation as the Civil War came to an end. His strong conviction in the power of our founding values and constitutional principles, along with his self-learned eloquence, helped guide Abraham Lincoln and the recently formed Republican party to win a second term based on these values and principles. Lincoln faced the daunting challenge of rescuing a nation divided by the Civil War.
**Believed in American Principles:** History tells us that Lincoln's wholehearted embrace of Douglass's message of fighting for and preserving the values that formed our nation was not only the winning message, but also the roadmap for reunification. Today, as our nation becomes increasingly fragmented along political issues and divergent views of our fundamental values and principles of freedom, engaging people based on this former slave's unassailable historical contribution offers the most effective messaging for winning new hearts and minds.
**A Symbol of Republican Values:** Just as Lincoln turned to Douglass for guiding the salvation of America, Republicans can leverage Douglass as a pivotal symbol for fully realizing the greatness of our country. In a historical context, emulating Lincoln and using the impactful legacy of Frederick Douglass serves to open the door to all voters to find common ground and reunite our country.
**Frederick Douglass played a crucial role in the birth of the Republican Party:** The Republican Party was founded in 1854 by abolitionists who aimed to end slavery and advocate for the civil rights of Black people, with Frederick Douglass playing a significant role in initiating the political campaign.
[Click Here for Tickets, Sponsorships, Advertising ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=ab412d0144&e=8763c56857)

clean_body: Celebrate a great American, a great Republican, by the sea | | | | | | The Frederick Douglass Celebration A Great American, A Great Republican You are Invited to a Milestone Event In Branford, CT, we are taking the lead in rebranding the Republican party and fighting against the false narratives that the GOP are racists, homophobes, and all the other intersectional labels that Democrats throw at us. We know they do this because they cannot stand on their record of abject oppression of minorities and the working class. We want to invite you to an event that highlights the Republican Party's inclusive roots, dating back to 1863 when people like Frederick Douglass transformed the Abolitionist movement into the Republican Party. The party has always stood for inclusivity and the rights of all Americans, no matter their skin color or any other objective identity. We are excited to announce the first-ever Frederick Douglass Celebration, where the Branford Republicans will pay homage to a great American and an exceptional Republican - Frederick Douglass. | Download the Invitation and Share | Why Frederick Douglass? A Force for Uniting the United States: Frederick Douglass serves as a powerful symbol for Republicans to promote the values and principles that make our nation unique. He was born into slavery in 1818, but later became one of the leading advocates for reuniting our nation as the Civil War came to an end. His strong conviction in the power of our founding values and constitutional principles, along with his self-learned eloquence, helped guide Abraham Lincoln and the recently formed Republican party to win a second term based on these values and principles. Lincoln faced the daunting challenge of rescuing a nation divided by the Civil War. Believed in American Principles: History tells us that Lincoln's wholehearted embrace of Douglass's message of fighting for and preserving the values that formed our nation was not only the winning message, but also the roadmap for reunification. Today, as our nation becomes increasingly fragmented along political issues and divergent views of our fundamental values and principles of freedom, engaging people based on this former slave's unassailable historical contribution offers the most effective messaging for winning new hearts and minds. A Symbol of Republican Values: Just as Lincoln turned to Douglass for guiding the salvation of America, Republicans can leverage Douglass as a pivotal symbol for fully realizing the greatness of our country. In a historical context, emulating Lincoln and using the impactful legacy of Frederick Douglass serves to open the door to all voters to find common ground and reunite our country. Frederick Douglass played a crucial role in the birth of the Republican Party: The Republican Party was founded in 1854 by abolitionists who aimed to end slavery and advocate for the civil rights of Black people, with Frederick Douglass playing a significant role in initiating the political campaign. | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved. You have signed up to be a support of mine. Our mailing address is: Dominic For CT 4 Mariners Way Branford, CT 06405-4481 USA Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

Peter: **A recent poll from the AARP shows our race is neck-in-neck.**

_We need to act now._ National Republicans are going to see this poll and zero in on Pennsylvania. Bob Casey’s mega-millionaire opponent David McCormick already has the backing of the entire GOP war chest. This news will draw even more dark money spending against us.

name: Invitation from Sec. Pompeo {via NRSC}
subject: 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟒 𝐆𝐎𝐏 𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐘 𝐏𝐔𝐋𝐒𝐄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
A brand-new survey| | | Peter, Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo requested that we invite Republican voters to participate in a BRAND-NEW SURVEY who:
---
**●[UNAPOLOGETICALLY stand with our ally Israel](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8ddd592d2c644d9dac856b4a1dfe3e29&_e=YigLJBKfe8c3Biwxbq2nJ2gDr63379mI361j1tX6CuPEHNOiR_-B8Oblmk6swN2D-MzqGPftO8WWLJuFrq2blAJrGW5zhdqM0blsmwqvNApDJR_JBOYF2pQP_CFYxl8sx54Qlq7jdAXMT5xebp68IDNKjh97HMU8SBRX2aABv6Ls-R5zrRnKZZrTd1wQE6-mv46KO4av96C5zPBvnbyyPqDKhFbq87MzLW2vBOHMeo3co-RlBsIWBEjYOldjMiyhElS_z4TEl3Ll4eGES0ZB-QvBVyn-bsrPb1eZmE01P0FLovn_o7b9ib24tYnJPMEF6vJkYkeo5kIC4vLheT2CnuIOLkzcVTGCKRakWgFgH6HA_-2U9Xqay5YWokdNFYaZQEmDcNVb8Hh5nd_2XiHrqSxhgO2BpEa5mbKV5RyNTrvzLib5rLcpJQtPeusH51mHY9dOrRzjKyLqA0G7VjtTAQ%3D%3D)**
**● [Believe we should return to the PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH foreign policy of the Trump Administration](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8ddd592d2c644d9dac856b4a1dfe3e29&_e=YigLJBKfe8c3Biwxbq2nJ2gDr63379mI361j1tX6CuPEHNOiR_-B8Oblmk6swN2D-MzqGPftO8WWLJuFrq2blAJrGW5zhdqM0blsmwqvNApDJR_JBOYF2pQP_CFYxl8sx54Qlq7jdAXMT5xebp68IDNKjh97HMU8SBRX2aABv6Ls-R5zrRnKZZrTd1wQE6-mv46KO4av96C5zPBvnbyyPqDKhFbq87MzLW2vBOHMeo3co-RlBsIWBEjYOldjMiyhElS_z4TEl3Ll4eGES0ZB-QvBVyn-bsrPb1eZmE01P0FLovn_o7b9ib24tYnJPMEFBEHUi9kc5iTELIRq8rLollhUw_DCufbrybjl7Fgx4KlSnTGdwEsIQWTNc_WBcg2PIOfkeunwhJXPZqmyQQiL8Wzg8xU29YScz8hwvdyYj7rhU5oqBLPR740l36ZfxlwWZxgCmVJ35HaS9AAWvGNXMg%3D%3D)**
**●[ And above all, LOVE AMERICA and the American people](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8ddd592d2c644d9dac856b4a1dfe3e29&_e=YigLJBKfe8c3Biwxbq2nJ2gDr63379mI361j1tX6CuPEHNOiR_-B8Oblmk6swN2D-MzqGPftO8WWLJuFrq2blAJrGW5zhdqM0blsmwqvNApDJR_JBOYF2pQP_CFYxl8sx54Qlq7jdAXMT5xebp68IDNKjh97HMU8SBRX2aABv6Ls-R5zrRnKZZrTd1wQE6-mv46KO4av96C5zPBvnbyyPqDKhFbq87MzLW2vBOHMeo3co-RlBsIWBEjYOldjMiyhElS_z4TEl3Ll4eGES0ZB-QvBVyn-bsrPb1eZmE01P0FLovn_o7b9ib24tYnJPMEFGZIs6uCGdjZQ96vqyKn20FDv-fKoffkTh-gzJ5MLrk-SSVmCp1gIRCGx93yYzJkOlDMAXXe6cAR-TK0qugzB-wg_QAlOavAEZYTwTvEP2xvzy-n_ggsID2wUy4dsOvQqWJ5Kk6ZIRbMdIoI1vozDfQ%3D%3D)**

subject: This will only take a minute

Fellow Patriot,

We need your feedback on an urgent threat to freedom that is taking place on college campuses nationwide.

Leftist administrators are pushing a radical, woke agenda on our children and grandchildren. Yet, students have never been more eager to hear your conservative values of individual freedom, a strong national defense, free enterprise, and traditional values.

But thanks to increasing censorship by college administrators, students often can't hear your conservative ideas. Many students seeking to learn conservative ideas face leftist bullying, harassment, and discrimination.

Worse still, colleges and universities are now providing safe havens for radical Jihadist sympathizers and their hate-America ideologies.

That's why I am looking for 100 people today to share their thoughts on the current state of higher education.

Your response right now will help raise awareness about what everyday Americans think about the woke policies sweeping through higher education before it is too late.

Click here to take our short, five-question _State of Higher Education Survey_ : **[https://yaf.org/offers/2024-state-of-higher-education-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f0e258d6aae94202be5daa4aaf761109&_e=tLdO1nPoYpvRSAcLJSc4X_Q8lypKy9taDUETtejAlaAZ-8htCfXkzDxnZZfC9cKW6fZ5lS-HXBZvRAHw-hykvhY3ES5kvY5PXEEFnvE5f3f2s5W6Wni3ikapl9s_MRL1YTaakYyeZ1lBS5qlTqEs0-Rowj6dSac-PFBol1V6vem9c2QlFy2YTltCUCdx-Pm0cmJhjbIPomzaHSCPIs0R1CCJbqiJQH5OowQLDhlJDIzwWgJhUY5Yb47tGsj-59gWMOumZu-PfMCePYdJ6XDrJe5qOXmgOlJ8zlKef9zTi-nG5332m8Nb1WltBezRw50p7j7Op4apRi-6w_IwrwaHjYFICz2Ss8VQr4DOU9MLNhvaBlql7ONSy0PHvPse6_G8fQShi-bH4MxaBDkCRoIOkg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing for freedom.

Governor Scott Walker
**President of Young America 's Foundation**

body:

Fellow Patriot,

Utah needs a true Conservative leader – and that's NOT Spencer Cox. Tucker Carlson has EXPOSED the Truth about Spencer Cox.

["Bright red Utah is now led by a cut-rate Gavin Newsom imitator called Spencer Cox." ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=43fa7fb982ac4a589bd652178af9b853&_e=HZlp4Sd1NunLmUq585rJYX2ZavZfzeHNQPN9SHK8sJceu8Dca7PKnfema9TWr9K1wuQ7aTjwDt-WYQ8Duk1wpWyUkyUtaYxd_NdeUPs8OJZo8VQlSCotMCpKRAEgEmPGTYJVSluBaO1EkoxJPG8tligqg5Wzdxl4ZLrwxoCQcqWaVzmwWsB7TtmJG3_gCwSgIVWwaxDzfO7xp0naTjbVvG4zizBiIBYCFosSeCoc8t0JYzTXE2h2NO3XG3vgDpTqc4iQRy667NJCwIo2zWhIjaAe-0h4qlEEb85-nm_MhCNxztZySIzMK3FgcyS99gsTeQfKxEXXBz69pnte7YPL0fYnRNCLNRqBOk1hH3WWLB0rVkQeS8LdiffYY9Ynzgh5)
\- _Tucker Carlson_

[**WATCH HERE:**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=43fa7fb982ac4a589bd652178af9b853&_e=HZlp4Sd1NunLmUq585rJYX2ZavZfzeHNQPN9SHK8sJceu8Dca7PKnfema9TWr9K1wuQ7aTjwDt-WYQ8Duk1wpWyUkyUtaYxd_NdeUPs8OJZo8VQlSCotMCpKRAEgEmPGTYJVSluBaO1EkoxJPG8tligqg5Wzdxl4ZLrwxoCQcqWaVzmwWsB7TtmJG3_gCwSgIVWwaxDzfO7xp0naTjbVvG4zizBiIBYCFosSeCoc8t3YgDdJmhBK665_959jhwpIxyA4bO4iF1Fp2lonrsEU5q74UsCqQolvtNin1aq6z9rxkcdCni-HLYFchue-JFFtfIGQZnoJ3O-BlxUJTBCjMsoZf412EQJYvWRx4qgSnGZbI6yDk-jeo2jfa3ybnqv0)

[**Utah is a red state, and it's time we started acting like it.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=43fa7fb982ac4a589bd652178af9b853&_e=HZlp4Sd1NunLmUq585rJYX2ZavZfzeHNQPN9SHK8sJceu8Dca7PKnfema9TWr9K1wuQ7aTjwDt-WYQ8Duk1wpWyUkyUtaYxd_NdeUPs8OJZo8VQlSCotMCpKRAEgEmPGTYJVSluBaO1EkoxJPG8tligqg5Wzdxl4ZLrwxoCQcqWaVzmwWsB7TtmJG3_gCwSgIVWwaxDzfO7xp0naTjbVvG4zizBiIBYCFosSeCoc8t1KhW6ebJCanihQWeBVdPyDwtjSW8z2JJCo6TU3JYh6S_JGDjeoZjKRZELu7SI9ZSPZk_yJuU8O3A3o3DNn3VHhXgUAJP-Y4_rBH3oMfblU0ZLUlO7yrES3syupDXfbW2GmqrufoO8SA4i6XTSiFOLe)

Spencer Cox isn't interested in real reform or standing up for conservative values. He's just interested in getting voters to think that he's Mr. Nice Guy by pandering to them and the woke liberal agenda. He's interested in staying in power.
Here are some things that Tucker pointed out:
* Spencer Cox caves to the woke agenda. He even announced his pronouns, unprompted, to a young girl at a town hall once.
* The very first document Spencer Cox signed as Governor of Utah was the "Utah Compact on Racial Equity, Diversity and Inclusion." As Tucker says, "It's everything you'd imagine and more."
* Two years ago, Utah's state legislature passed a bill banning men from competing in women's sports, but Spencer Cox **vetoed** it. Apparently, he wants biological men to be able to compete in women's sports.
* Spencer Cox threatened to veto a proposed ban on gender transition surgeries for minors – _which most people in Utah say they don't want._

That's not all of it either, Fellow Patriot. The truth of the matter is: Spencer Cox doesn't have Utah's best interests at heart, and he's acting on his own agenda. He's caving to the woke agenda and governing like a liberal so he can stay in power.

We need a true Conservative leader in Utah, NOT Spencer Cox.

Will you join us in restoring Utah's values and rejecting Spencer Cox now? Support Phil Lyman, an America First conservative, today.

Dear Peter,
Exciting news: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has officially challenged President Trump to a debate at the Libertarian Convention, where they will both be keynote speakers.
Trump has repeatedly said he is not afraid to debate. Will he rise to the occasion?
The latest polls are clear: Americans want a substantial discussion about the future. Kennedy isn’t just exceeding expectations against Trump; _he’s consistently breaking the crucial 15% threshold for debate inclusion._
Voters want a leader who tackles real issues head-on, not just one who can stand on the stage repeating well-worn political establishment sound bites.
This isn’t just any debate; it’s an opportunity to redefine what leadership looks like in America. We need your help to prepare RFK Jr. to deliver a powerful, articulate presentation of our platform.

subject: Mitch McConnell is watching like a hawk

body:
|
---
Hey Peter, it’s Jon Tester. [I need you to split a donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans before our most important FEC deadline yet.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84782834/472603203/1238958201?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240511_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxY2I5MzZiLWU2MGYtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OiGaL9K7jzH7_Y2U6t909-qiB83yzm1mzae1QpdzpuY=) We’re approaching a critical turning point in this race. Let me explain.

Our final FEC deadline before the primary is on May 15th. That’s only 4 days away, and it’s the last time our numbers will go public before Montana’s general election officially kicks off.

Here’s why that matters: Mitch McConnell will be looking at our report when he decides where to spend his multi-million dollar war chest. If he thinks we’re weak, you can bet he’ll flood the airwaves with even more attacks during the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far.

But if our numbers are strong, we’ll show them that this Senate seat can’t be bought and that we’ve got a grassroots team that’ll fight them every step of the way.

**With polls tightening, we cannot afford to fall short here. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and help us hit our ambitious $500,000 fundraising goal.**

clean_body: | Hey Peter, it’s Jon Tester. = We’re approaching a critical turning point in this race. Let me explain. Our final FEC deadline before the primary is on May 15th. That’s only 4 days away, and it’s the last time our numbers will go public before Montana’s general election officially kicks off. Here’s why that matters: Mitch McConnell will be looking at our report when he decides where to spend his multi-million dollar war chest. If he thinks we’re weak, you can bet he’ll flood the airwaves with even more attacks during the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far. But if our numbers are strong, we’ll show them that this Senate seat can’t be bought and that we’ve got a grassroots team that’ll fight them every step of the way. With polls tightening, we cannot afford to fall short here. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and help us hit our ambitious $500,000 fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = Thanks, Jon Tester ******** ****** ****** ****** ****** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He just DESTROYED the GOP over their impeachment plot:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67757?t=6&akid=14490%2E878179%2EGYZDE9) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67757?t=7&akid=14490%2E878179%2EGYZDE9) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67757?t=8&akid=14490%2E878179%2EGYZDE9)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67757?t=9&akid=14490%2E878179%2EGYZDE9) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67757?t=10&akid=14490%2E878179%2EGYZDE9)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14490%2E878179%2EGYZDE9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14490%2E878179%2EGYZDE9).**

name: Josh Harder
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene vs. Speaker Johnson
body:
It all came to a head this week.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84782884/472603431/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjU1NGVkZTMtZTcwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ya3jm9Jlv0yqRrWPumo7jcQQwD_Goe5hkcUTaEnSE5o=) | Peter, After two years of coddling Marjorie Taylor Greene and giving her everything she wants to stay in her good graces, Republicans in Washington are now reaping what they sow. It all came to a head this week when Marjorie Taylor Greene led a motion to remove Speaker Mike Johnson. I’ve had a front row seat to it all, so I thought I would give you a run down of how it all went down. For over a year, Speaker Mike Johnson and Marjorie Taylor Greene were close allies - working together to push extreme policies and the MAGA agenda. But after Johnson finally agreed (after many months of stalling) to pass funding for our allies, Marjorie Taylor Greene decided to turn against him. This week, Marjorie Taylor Greene made it official by filing a motion to oust Speaker Mike Johnson. **Though the motion didn’t pass, let’s be crystal clear - this isn’t going away. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s goal was to create chaos and grind government to a halt. And she’s succeeding.** [_**We have to take back the House this year so we can get back to the real business of running our country and make progress on all the issues we care about. My race will be absolutely critical. clean_body: It all came to a head this week. | = | Peter, After two years of coddling Marjorie Taylor Greene and giving her everything she wants to stay in her good graces, Republicans in Washington are now reaping what they sow. It all came to a head this week when Marjorie Taylor Greene led a motion to remove Speaker Mike Johnson. I’ve had a front row seat to it all, so I thought I would give you a run down of how it all went down. For over a year, Speaker Mike Johnson and Marjorie Taylor Greene were close allies - working together to push extreme policies and the MAGA agenda. But after Johnson finally agreed (after many months of stalling) to pass funding for our allies, Marjorie Taylor Greene decided to turn against him. This week, Marjorie Taylor Greene made it official by filing a motion to oust Speaker Mike Johnson. Though the motion didn’t pass, let’s be crystal clear - this isn’t going away. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s goal was to create chaos and grind government to a halt. And she’s succeeding. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Josh *
