name: Gov. Phil Scott
subject: More work to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9ddd6eb71f&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| When I first entered the State Senate more than 23 years ago, I knew nothing about politics. But one person, Senator Dick Mazza, immediately took me under his wing. It didn’t matter to him that I was a Republican and he was a Democrat. He became my mentor and has not left my side since. That’s why, it is such an honor that he asked to be by my side today as I announce I’m running for reelection. During my four terms as Governor, my team and I have worked to grow the economy, make Vermont more affordable, and protect the most vulnerable. I’ve done my best to rise above partisanship to solve problems, and help people. While we’ve made progress over the years, we still have more work to do. But to do that, we need more balance in the Legislature. Although our country feels more divided than ever, I truly believe most of us are somewhere in the political middle. Some a little left of center, some a little right of center, and a whole lot in between. For the most part, I believe Vermonters want balanced debate, balanced policy and balanced politics. They want reasonable, pragmatic solutions that make Vermont more affordable, revitalize our neighborhoods, and improve public safety. They want smart investments to make our education system stronger, protect the environment and improve our infrastructure. After all the trials and tribulations of the last few years, you’ve gotten to know me. And while we may not agree on every issue, you know I’ll always do what I think is right, and what I think is best for Vermont, regardless of the politics. After reflecting on all the work still left to do, I’ve come to realize I cannot step away at a time when Vermont’s Legislature is so far out of balance, so I’ve decided to run for reelection to keep working for you. But in order to be successful, I need your help. It’s not enough to just support me, because I can’t do it alone in the State House. I need you to elect more legislators who will also put politics aside and work with me, to deliver the best results for you. Now, more than ever, we need everyday Vermonters to make their voices heard and get involved. I’m so grateful for the support you’ve shown me over the years. We have more work to do, and we need to do it together. Sincerely, Gov. Phil
---

Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! name: Colin Allred
subject: We can make history together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first black Senator from Texas – I need your help...
---
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=567)
---
| | | |
---
| | | Folks, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first ever Black Senator from Texas. If you’re already with me,****[**_will you split a donation between me and No Dem Left Behind to help power my grassroots campaign? →_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=first)
---
| [ Donate >>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=567)
---
All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black US Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. **But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better.** Black Americans have long faced _far too many_ obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote. **The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents.** I'm ready to defeat Ted Cruz this November and fight to build a more perfect union for my boys and every kid in Texas. But unlike Ted Cruz, I don't have corporate special interests footing the bill for my campaign. **To win, I need a massive movement of grassroots supporters to step up and join me in this fight.**[**_Please, will you split a donation of $24 or more between me and No Dem Left Behind to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, become the first Black Senator from Texas, and be the leader Texans deserve?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=first)

**$7.** A $7 donation is all we’re asking from you today. Grassroots donations like this carry state Democrats to victory year after year, and we’re counting on the support of Democrats like you to help our party build power this fall. [So please: Will you pitch in $7 right now to elect state Democrats across the country this November and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_VJtfmrgEjjR84h6dasTO7DocyvikYhx3Gacd_1Q7HiBG_ETNbT9NosAgb5d6foskedkkuKjgAyOVTa1mpW-V-LWT1v0p7-uy8-gor-Ga-YZLXH5YUJ-O7Ivi_gEzd3UVnr5zF_H8dG0cRHv-Nx_bsSOnDjphHLrS3DaYcy5ZDXUpE4NrZMmXJgGp4cVjh8bJdPGd3FHzrrEXz_qz7UEk5dExrpEJAKFagGNNA3p3ZOYJD-xEQhZ56XXNpd9Us_fuTM_idBMT-MoVNH-BHRSMsoUFUOTLxQSLMfTttwUyR3SQovehj7B3x099_aul3iQG1a0j2WRxHaF2acaZfTTuiVmtlGHJC8TWL18iK4nDx4yj0N5tyohwfxxqRV9iw8r9_KfN959O-j9xt27DABncP6eRV2lK7CB-u_Suq39lerScxzbC1bwqbKUz3GwD-JdII8hGc-2drUiLGrgty5xrWLFv-Z_SFozOXMd9uT6AfbWR_3FGGsqXbcvchCdDKIZI2BLHUMAXcAz8tM-yveHPF0vvpmcygmHYdoh5XOfFdvscxI0dRf2ZxHIR1nm_XPWBmytKUdsseJw7TSXEPL7cpOJO4tDr3AAvmOxxOGYv2qdr0PH8uEQ8dGe9Hy_9IhXII1guNohDpn70YwmZJ_cS64YFlqOP8KXoP9nAoZ96K_WkYHCEpobSHl-tR5DSNDsT/469/5VWRL9U5QH2uDLf7sBgXEQ/h0/h001.Pwj0MetSMYWN5XgLb76-dlPebSZfCcmDou1PkCyXg_0) **$7** helps counteract Trump’s boost to GOP candidates as he rallies from state to state. His MAGA momentum carries weight down the ballot, and his Republican allies are counting on it. **$7** helps compete against Republicans’ war chest in ultra-competitive elections in battlegrounds like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and New Hampshire. **$7** helps Democrats fight against Republicans’ dangerous agenda. Abortion rights are at stake nationwide, and millions of individuals could be left without essential reproductive health care if Republicans take control. By building Democratic power in the states, we can protect abortion rights in places like your community. The truth is, we know you receive a lot of emails asking you to donate, but _your donation makes the most impact at the state level._ **State legislators make decisions that impact your everyday lives – everything down to the roads you drive on to what children are taught in schools, so it’s crucial that state Democrats don’t get overlooked.** [Can we count on you to join our party in electing state Democrats? 2024 is the year of the states, and your donation will make a long-lasting impact in driving our movement forward → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_VJtfmrgEjjR84h6dasTO7DocyvikYhx3Gacd_1Q7HiBG_ETNbT9NosAgb5d6foskedkkuKjgAyOVTa1mpW-V-LWT1v0p7-uy8-gor-Ga-YZLXH5YUJ-O7Ivi_gEzd3UVnr5zF_H8dG0cRHv-Nx_bsSOnDjphHLrS3DaYcy5ZDXXtHbqyc_iht0h95t6SgsjqhDC6NcybLXPZGZFzUy4ZtvH6pcOBkp2il2YTZYNJT9TBYorFamgnqE-3uE7RmjFG6ltnCtFyMpEgO8_jnFJjO1UkqZ6JwtNUSwmWN9UHpevPm4l-Daq4LSXkxNbB1nTBxFujCfOhiY-exJ-zfqpXOq_WI1F6sa21_PX_VRDRMSR2bZfqn8j-sUPLhyKpBxe-17m67woyrxSYCeLW1ZNfbJ2W1wsu-thUUSfRmyiHl-tF9Q-E9bdZfelLSpMX5X3Iu7ZA9ZMF_-dCLr-WzwRHDu1veHRyN5DZy-aHCELT5U778rXrjgyUGogyfldFNIj0k_htN2pbqm8weqn3Wkcs2VPN5f76SUY1P3V21QuZ3Bf81fGTkgcR5aNKXu_0quXSXNK_Sq638bqoqDvZXCKDmyoTnO_NeejVNQTbYvPLpcahft9CToGsE8pzRbnTJQ0pjRiyOEsMhX-RbTluIDuv_HsmRBA4govkKtg4QaoIPjV-EJcwJ-l7i-p2oyjGZcps/469/5VWRL9U5QH2uDLf7sBgXEQ/h1/h001.gOnuK2w0yM4iouuJ6XolSxevA-66NMNl_8_e3YJdQC8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Grassroots donations like this carry state Democrats to victory year after year, and we’re counting on the support of Democrats like you to help our party build power this fall. | | | | | ---|--- $7. A $7 donation is all we’re asking from you today. Grassroots donations like this carry state Democrats to victory year after year, and we’re counting on the support of Democrats like you to help our party build power this fall. $7 helps counteract Trump’s boost to GOP candidates as he rallies from state to state. His MAGA momentum carries weight down the ballot, and his Republican allies are counting on it. $7 helps compete against Republicans’ war chest in ultra-competitive elections in battlegrounds like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and New Hampshire. $7 helps Democrats fight against Republicans’ dangerous agenda. Abortion rights are at stake nationwide, and millions of individuals could be left without essential reproductive health care if Republicans take control. By building Democratic power in the states, we can protect abortion rights in places like your community. The truth is, we know you receive a lot of emails asking you to donate, but your donation makes the most impact at the state level. State legislators make decisions that impact your everyday lives – everything down to the roads you drive on to what children are taught in schools, so it’s crucial that state Democrats don’t get overlooked. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC.
